title_en: In response to the carcinogenic oil scandal, Taiwan Sugar has taken preventive measures from shelves: There is a fear of a short-term shortage of salad oil.
summary_en: In response to the recent investigation by the Ministry of Health and Welfare and local health units on related products of "Zhonglian Oils and Soybean Salad Oil", Taiwan Sugar stated on the 10th that it would cooperate with the Ministry of Health and Welfare to expand the preventive removal of products "containing oil products produced by Zhonglian from April to June" from the 9th. The complete removal from the shelves was completed before noon today.

title: 裕慶營收／上半年21.11億元創同期新高 下半年營運蓄勢待發
summary: 裕慶-KY（6957）公布6月合併營收4.22億元，月增35.2%、年增33.5%，回到年月雙增走勢；累計第2季合併營收11.03億元、年增35.4%，並創歷年同期次高；上半年合併營收21.11億元、年增32.1%，創歷年同期新高。

title_en: Yuqing’s revenue/RMB 2.111 billion in the first half of the year hit a new high for the same period, and operations in the second half of the year are ready for development
summary_en: Yuqing-KY (6957) announced June consolidated revenue of 422 million yuan, a monthly increase of 35.2% and an annual increase of 33.5%, returning to a year-to-month double growth trend; the cumulative second quarter consolidated revenue was 1.103 billion yuan, an annual increase of 35.4%, and the second highest in the same period in previous years; the consolidated revenue in the first half of the year was 2.111 billion yuan, an annual increase of 32.1%, a record high for the same period in previous years.

title: 寶成營收／第2季629.98億元年增0.4%下半年進入傳統旺季有望逐季增溫
summary: 全球製鞋龍頭寶成工業（9904）10日公布6月自結合併營收189.52億元，月減12.6%、年減3.3%，為近16個月以來低點；第2季合併營收為629.98億元，較去年同期微增0.4%；累計上半年合併營收為1,260.9億元，則較去年同期減少2.9%。

title_en: Baocheng’s revenue/RMB 62.998 billion in the second quarter increased 0.4% year-on-year. The second half of the year will enter the traditional peak season and is expected to increase quarter by quarter.
summary_en: Baocheng Industrial (9904), the global leader in shoemaking, announced on the 10th that its consolidated revenue in June was 18.952 billion yuan, a monthly decrease of 12.6% and a year-on-year decrease of 3.3%, the lowest in the past 16 months; the consolidated revenue in the second quarter was 62.998 billion yuan, a slight increase of 0.4% from the same period last year; the cumulative consolidated revenue in the first half of the year was 126.09 billion yuan, a decrease of 2.9% from the same period last year.

title_en: Celebrating rich revenue/June hits a 20-month high, online e-commerce revenue hits record high
summary_en: Shangqingfufu Industrial (9935), a comprehensive supplier of home furnishings, announced on the 10th that its June consolidated revenue was 494 million yuan, a monthly increase of 11.2% and an annual increase of 17%, a record high in the past 20 months. It mainly benefited from online e-commerce customers' increased investment in promotional activities and marketing resources, which led to a simultaneous increase in platform traffic and stocking demand.

summary_en: Typhoon Bavi continues to affect Taiwan. In line with the local government's measures to suspend work and classes and maintain the safety of customers and employees, department stores have successively announced that they will continue to suspend operations on July 11 (Saturday), including Taipei 101, Breeze Group, and Beijing Station Fashion Plaza. They will all be closed for another day. The subsequent resumption of business hours will be adjusted depending on weather conditions.

title_en: Typhoon Bawei hits, Hsinchu County Government announces suspension of classes on the 11th
summary_en: The strong typhoon Bavi continues to approach. The Hsinchu County Government announced this evening that according to the forecast data of the Central Meteorological Administration, the rainfall and wind in Hsinchu County have reached the standard for suspending classes and classes. Classes and classes in Hsinchu County will be suspended tomorrow (11th).

summary: 巴威颱風來襲，今天傍晚新北市新北市災害應變中心工作會報中，台大氣候天氣災害研究中心指出，依照天氣風險預估雨量，淡水區河口、新店部分道路有積淹水機率，另烏來、三峽可能達土石流紅色警戒，民眾需要慎防。

title_en: Bawei hits New Taipei. Tamsui and Xindian are prevented from flooding. Wulai and Three Gorges are prevented from landslides.
summary_en: Typhoon Bawei is approaching. In the work report of the New Taipei City Disaster Response Center in New Taipei City this evening, the National Taiwan University Climate and Weather Disaster Research Center pointed out that according to the weather risk forecast rainfall, there is a chance of flooding on some roads in Hekou and Xindian in Tamsui District. In addition, Wulai and Three Gorges may reach the red alert for landslides, and the public needs to be careful.

title: 巴威颱風逼近 已釀5人受傷 全台預防性撤離2050人
summary: 中度颱風巴威影響台灣的時間為10日至12日，受颱風外圍環流影響，台灣東部、北部、恆春半島和馬祖沿海地區須留意長浪影響，適逢暑假，民眾勿前往海邊觀浪，北海岸地區港口須留意風暴潮，主要強降雨區為北部、東北部及全台山區，須留意短延時強降雨導致積淹水災情，淹水警戒區為宜蘭縣、基隆市、台北市、新北市、桃園市、新竹縣、 苗栗縣和等7縣市沿海、河口低窪與易淹水區，須注意強降雨造成積淹水。中央災害應變中心指揮官劉世芳指示，中央地方合力防颱。

title_en: Typhoon Bawei is approaching, 5 people have been injured, and 2,050 people have been evacuated as a precaution across Taiwan
summary_en: Moderate Typhoon Bavi will affect Taiwan from the 10th to the 12th. Due to the influence of the typhoon's peripheral circulation, eastern and northern Taiwan, the Hengchun Peninsula and the coastal areas of Matsu must pay attention to the impact of long waves. It is summer vacation, and people should not go to the beach to watch the waves. The north coast Regional ports must pay attention to storm surges. The main heavy rainfall areas are in the north, northeast and the entire Taishan District. They must pay attention to flooding caused by short-term heavy rainfall. The flood warning areas are Yilan County, Keelung City, Taipei City, New Taipei City, Taoyuan City, Hsinchu County, Miaoli County and other seven counties and cities including low-lying and flood-prone areas along the coast and estuaries must pay attention to flooding caused by heavy rainfall. Liu Shifang, commander of the Central Disaster Response Center, instructed the central and local governments to work together to prevent typhoon.

title: 巴威颱風來襲 新竹市明天停班停課

To ensure the safety of the people, Yunlin County will suspend work and classes on July 11 (Saturday).

summary_en: Central Taiwan Bavi continues to approach Taiwan. From nightfall to tomorrow daytime, the typhoon will affect Taiwan most severely. Although the typhoon continues to weaken, there is still a chance that the Category 7 storm radius will cover the north of central China and the Yihua area. The Meteorological Administration continues to issue maritime and land typhoon warnings. The latest land warning range includes Changhua County and Lianjiang County, a total of 14 counties and cities.

title_en: Yunlin vegetable prices rise. A handful of vegetables costs 40 to 50 yuan in traditional markets. Consumers: Too expensive to buy.
summary_en: Typhoon Bawei is approaching. The weather in Yunlin County is still sunny during the day. The wind gradually increased in the afternoon. People went out to buy before the rain came. At dusk, there were crowds of people stocking up in markets and chain supermarkets. In traditional markets, a handful of green vegetables costs about 40 to 50 yuan, and each catty of cabbage costs about 60 yuan. Some consumers say, "vegetables are so expensive that they can't afford to buy them."

summary: 蘋果（Apple）公司已經釋出平板與電腦漲價訊息，理由是零組件等成本大增。研調機構Counterpoint Research預估，最高階的iPhone 18 Pro Max（12GB + 1TB）BOM（物料成本）將較前一代增加近300美元，市場推估下半年將登場的iPhone 18漲價也可能擋不住。
title_zh: Counterpoint Research：iPhone 18 Pro Max BOM 成本預估增近300美元

title_en: Counterpoint Research: iPhone 18 Pro Max BOM cost is expected to increase by nearly US$300
summary_en: Apple has announced price increases for tablets and computers, citing a significant increase in the cost of components and other components. Counterpoint Research estimates that the BOM (material cost) of the highest-end iPhone 18 Pro Max (12GB + 1TB) will increase by nearly US$300 compared with the previous generation. Market estimates suggest that the price increase of the iPhone 18, which will be launched in the second half of the year, may not be able to stop it.

title: 當包裝寫「0克」，你真的沒吃進反式脂肪？揭開加工食品裡的數字騙局
summary:
一種能讓食品「保鮮」數年的成分，為何同時被證實與心臟病、癌症、糖尿病脫不了關係？當你在超市拿起標示「0克反式脂肪」的產品，是否想過那個數字可能是精心設計的假象？有「醫界福爾摩斯」曾嶔元醫師在其新書《精準飲食》中指出，反式脂肪這種人工產物，之所以能為加工食品帶來誘人的延長保鮮期優勢，原因在於細菌難以消化其特殊的雙鍵結構。


然而不幸的是，我們自身的粒線體，這個細胞內的能量工廠，也同樣缺乏分解這種鍵結的酵素。因此反式脂肪一旦攝取，便容易在肝臟中累積，進而導致脂肪肝和心血管疾病。攝取反式脂肪，無異於讓身體攝取難以排出的毒素。


曾嶔元強調，反式脂肪的危害早已被證實，它與一系列嚴重疾病息息相關，包括心臟病、肥胖、癌症和糖尿病。更令人擔憂的是，反式脂肪的攝取並沒有所謂的「安全劑量」。研究數據顯示，每增加2％的反式脂肪熱量攝取，心臟病風險幾乎增加至2倍。

title_en: When the package says "0 grams", are you really not consuming trans fat? Uncovering the digital scam in processed foods
summary_en:
Why is an ingredient that can keep food fresh for several years also proven to be linked to heart disease, cancer, and diabetes? When you pick up a product in the supermarket that says "0 grams of trans fat," have you ever thought that that number might be a carefully designed illusion? In his new book "Precision Diet", Dr. Zeng Jiyuan, the "Medical Sherlock Holmes", pointed out that the reason why trans fat, an artificial product, can bring attractive advantages to extended shelf life of processed foods is that it is difficult for bacteria to digest its special double bond structure.


Unfortunately, our own mitochondria, the energy factories within our cells, also lack the enzymes to break down these bonds. Therefore, once trans fat is ingested, it is easy to accumulate in the liver, leading to fatty liver and cardiovascular disease. Consuming trans fats is tantamount to ingesting toxins that are difficult for the body to eliminate.


Zeng Jinyuan emphasized that the harm of trans fat has long been proven, and it is closely related to a series of serious diseases, including heart disease, obesity, cancer and diabetes. What’s even more worrying is that there is no so-called “safe dose” of trans fat intake. Research data shows that for every 2% increase in trans fat caloric intake, the risk of heart disease almost doubles.

title: 京元電決赴美國設立晶圓測試廠 投資金額不超過14億美元
summary: 台系半導體廠持續卡位美國市場。IC測試大廠京元電董事會今（10）日決議通過美國投資設廠案，投資金額初估約 14億美元內、約449億元台幣，將在美國投資設立晶圓測試廠。這也是繼矽品後，又一家半導體後段封測廠前進美國投資。

title_en: KYEC decided to set up a wafer testing plant in the United States with an investment amount of no more than US$1.4 billion.
summary_en: Taiwanese semiconductor factories continue to be stuck in the US market. The board of directors of KYEC, a major IC testing company, decided today (10th) to approve the investment and establishment of a factory in the United States. The investment amount is initially estimated to be approximately US$1.4 billion, or approximately NT$44.9 billion, and will invest in the establishment of a wafer testing plant in the United States. This is also another semiconductor back-end packaging and testing factory to invest in the United States after Silicon Products.

summary: 立法院交通委員會將於 7 月 13 日審議《電信管理法》修正草案，擬取消國外低軌衛星業者直接持股不得超過 49% 的限制。對此，學者指出，在強化通訊韌性的同時，不宜犧牲國家安全與打詐工具，缺乏配套的鬆綁將產生不可逆的風險與治理考驗。

title: 蔡英文綠能 vs. 賴清德軍工 朱成志：美國軍工股長空，但台灣無人機產業走多
summary: 2023年黃仁勳來台掀起AI旋風，第一波主角是AI伺服器。當時緯創股價還在25元附近，之後一路衝高，並在那年7月創下161.5元天價。接著，AI伺服器供應鏈像雨後春筍般冒出，從電力、重電、機殼、導軌、PCB、CCL、ASIC到散熱族群，幾乎全面被資金點火。電力股王台達電創下2585元天價，重電股王華城創1115元天價，AI機殼股王勤誠飆到1590元，導軌的川湖7/7也一度衝上8560元，變成為台股第二高價股，打敗之前的股后，也是晶圓檢測股王穎崴。川湖今年Q1毛利率77.7%，比台積電66.2%還高，全年EPS上看200元；散熱股王健策3-6月營收連創新高，但由4月天價5685元回檔到2800-3300元，也近3個月了。從台積電這座護國神山往外擴散，AI熱帶動晶圓檢測、CoWoS設備、半導體供應鏈、廠務工程、特用化學、IP矽智財與ASIC一整串產業鏈。CoWoS的熱度延伸到CoPoS，連面板廠都跨進來搶，不過，這一波真正最猛的，其實是記憶體。

title: 1至5月實質經常性薪資年增1.27% 近六年同期新高
summary: 薪資持續成長，且再度跑贏通膨。主計總處10日公布最新薪資統計，1至5月全體受僱員工經常性薪資平均數為48,907元，年增2.81%；扣除物價因素後，實質經常性薪資平均為44,128元，年增1.27%，創下近六年同期新高，顯示勞工薪資持續穩健成長。

title: 國巨是它股東！這檔半導體Q2起動能逐步回升，新品VCore推升營收倍數成長
summary: 電源管理IC廠力智（6719）日前召開法說會，公布了2025年的亮眼成績單。全年合併營收達到45.81億元，比前一年成長了24%。獲利表現更是驚人，全年稅後淨利6.93億元，年增率高達2.01倍，全年每股盈餘（EPS）衝上6.58元，是前一年的2.7倍。從產品組合來看，力智的三大產品線在2025年第四季的營收占比分別為：整合型產品Power Stage占47.5%，電源管理IC(PMIC)占32.5%，功率元件Power MOSFET占21.5%。2025年度，Power Stage占39%，PMIC占37%，Power MOSFET則占24%。展望2026年，總經理黃學偉在法說會上給出的基調是「先蹲後跳」。今年第一季因為客戶庫存調整、工作天數較少，加上CPU、GPU供貨仍吃緊，以及記憶體漲價等因素影響，營收預期會呈現季減。不過，管理層預期第二季開始，營運動能就可望逐步回升。

title: AI 需求續強 電子零組件業加班工時近46年來同月新高
summary: AI需求持續挹注製造業生產動能，帶動加班工時維持高檔。主計總處最新統計顯示，5月製造業平均加班工時18.2小時，雖較4月的18.5小時略減，仍寫下近16年來同月新高，也是2010年8月以來單月次高，電子零組件業加班工時更寫下近46年來同月新高，反映製造業接單與生產需求依舊熱絡。

title: AI續熱　前5月電子零組件加班工時創47年同期最高
summary: （中央社記者潘姿羽台北10日電）AI熱潮延燒，帶動製造業相關業別滿手訂單，主計總處統計，今年前5月電子零組件、電腦電子光學製品製造業加班工時續創有統計以來、近47年同期最高紀錄。

title: 八方雲集營收／6月7.72億元、年增10.85% 第2季創下單季歷史新高

title: CRIF：跨境金融面臨四痛點 跨境合規從傳統 KYC 升級為 UBO 穿透識別
summary: 隨著全球供應鏈重組、地緣政治風險升溫，以及穩定幣等新興支付工具快速發展，跨境金融正進入效率與風險並行的新階段。過去企業與金融機構關注的是資金能否快速流動，如今更關鍵的是交易背後的實質控制人是否能被清楚辨識，並在交易發生前完成合規判斷與風險攔阻。

title: 沒收到稅單不是理由！稅務局點出社區代收、郵局寄存都算送達
summary: 不少民眾以為，只要沒有親自收到稅單，就不用繳稅或可以主張未收到通知。不過，台中稅務局提醒，這是常見誤解，只要稅單依法完成送達程序，即使是由社區管理員代收，或因家中無人而寄存在郵局並留下招領通知，都視為已合法送達，不會因本人沒有親自簽收而影響效力。

title: 5月全台員工平均月薪達49,216元 年增幅2.95%

title: 南亞科加速AI布局 W2W、3D IC齊發 新廠2028年投產再徵1500人
summary: 人工智慧（AI）記憶體需求從晶片製造向先進封裝延伸，南亞科加速布局客製化記憶體與後段整合技術。南亞科總經理李培瑛表示，公司已投入Wafer-to-Wafer Bonding（W2W）技術，並同步準備SoC（系統單晶片）整合方案，未來也將發展3D IC及TSV等客製化封裝，若需求持續增加，不排除另覓新廠房擴充封裝與測試產能。

title: 巴威今晚至明天影響最劇烈 20縣市達停班課標準
summary: 中度颱風巴威進逼，中央氣象署今天已發布海上陸上颱風警報，預期今晚到明天白天是影響台灣最明顯的時候。後續颱風假評估，根據氣象署今天下午4時的風雨預測，風力達標有19個縣市，另根據24小時累積雨量預測有12個縣市達標，綜合評估共計20縣市達標。

title: 南亞科：Q3、Q4獲利持續改善 AI客戶涵蓋輝達、谷歌、高通及英特爾

title: 台股大怒神 近1個月來主動式台股ETF僅3檔正報酬
summary: 台股大怒神行情，漲跌千點已成常態，不少投資人以靈活選股的主動式台股ETF介入，期望降低暴跌的衝擊；不過，近1個月台股指數上漲1.45％，統計20檔主動式台股ETF中，僅3檔維持正報酬，分別為主動群益台灣強棒（00982A）、主動安聯台灣高息(00984A)與主動統一升級50(00403A)，近1個月表現分別上漲2.3％、1.37％與0.67％，其中，00982A績效打敗大盤。

title: 巴威來襲如遇災損可減免稅
summary: 巴威颱風來襲，民眾要注意颱風動向並做好防颱準備以維護自身安全，高雄市稅捐稽徵處表示，如受巴威颱風影響而有財產損失，請記得先拍照存證，檢具證明文件於災害發生後三十日內可申報減免。（見圖）受災情形符合以下減免規定者，請於規定期限內，就近向稅捐處或所屬分處申報減免房屋稅、地價稅、使用牌照稅及娛樂稅。申報項目包括：一、房屋稅：（一）如房屋毀損面積達整棟面積五成以上，必須修復始能使用者，房屋稅免徵；（二）如毀損面積占整棟面積三成以上不及五成之房屋，其房屋稅減半徵收；（三）淹水受災房屋，其淹水樓層房屋稅免徵。二、地價稅：依土地稅減免規則第十二條規定，因山崩、地陷、流失、沙壓等環境限制及技術上無法使用之土地，地價稅免徵。三、使用牌照稅：（一）汽車及汽缸總排氣量達一五一立方公分以上機車， ...

title: 張忠謀95歲生日禮！台積電7.5億大紅包入袋　自律養生心法曝光
summary: 晶圓代工龍頭台積電（2330）創辦人張忠謀今（10日）喜迎95歲壽誕。每逢這位半導體教父生日前夕，台積電總會延續多年的暖心傳統，由經營團隊設宴祝壽。今年也不例外，現任董事長暨總裁魏哲家已於7日晚間，率領副總經理以上的高階主管北上，選在台北晶華酒店擺宴慶生，張忠謀夫人張淑芬也偕同現身，現場氣氛溫馨。不僅如此，台積電昨（9日）發放去年第四季現金股利每股6元，若以張忠謀退休時持有約12.5萬張持股且未出脫來推估，此次可望有高達7.5億元的股息入帳，堪稱一份分量十足的生日大紅包。

title: 致癌油案續燒！泰山公告遭裁罰600萬元 涉延遲通報、規避調查
summary: 中聯油脂生產的1300公噸大豆沙拉油被檢出第一類致癌物「苯駢芘」超標，致癌油品風暴持續延燒，受影響業者新增至360家。彰化縣衛生局認定，泰山（1218）明知上游中聯油脂問題油品資訊，卻未依規定即時通報主管機關，且涉及延遲通報及規避調查兩項違規，共裁罰600萬元。泰山今日發布重訊表示，將依主管機關指示辦理改善事宜。

title: DRAM大缺貨還沒完！李培瑛：供應不足將持續數季，毛利率與ASP續走揚
summary: 【財訊快報／記者李純君報導】針對DRAM後續市況，南亞科(2408)總經理李培瑛表示，記憶體供給不足預期將持續數季以上。而公司第二季毛利率已經逼近八成，李培瑛透露，第三季和第四季毛利率仍有改善的狀況，ASP也將持續走揚，並揭露自家LTA長約比例已達五成。南亞科今揭露第二季成績單與第三季展望，就後續市況的展望與供需，李培瑛表示，AI強勁需求推動記憶體供需結構性改變，降低景氣循環因素，而雲端資料中心AI及一般伺服器對HBM、RDIMM需求持續擴張，排擠手機、PC、車用及消費型記憶體供給，預期記憶體供給不足將持續數季以上，也因此，長期LTA(數年合約)形成供需共識。供給端部分，各供應商積極擴充產能，並動態調整產品組合，提升高利潤產品比重，新產能規劃將依據客戶的長期LTA(數年合約)需求，2028年起逐步擴增。就市場關心DRAM後續報價上漲動能與幅度，尤其法人圈預估南亞科第三季的ASP季增幅度上看50%，李培瑛表示，基本上詳細的數字，沒有辦法做confirm，但從季價格的角度來看，第三季的季價格比第二季還高，南亞科的價格基本上隨著市場的波動在改變。而就DRAM未來數季仍會缺貨一事，李培瑛分析，

title: 想拿「正二」質押換現金 券商秒拒他不解 內行曝真相
summary: 在台股頻創新高的全民投資時代，愈來愈多股民不再滿足於單純的「買進持有」，而是透過「股票質押」將手上的資產活化，藉此套出更多現金來靈活運用。然而當投資人試圖將手中資產極大化時，卻往往會撞上金融機構嚴格的風險控管高牆。為什麼同樣是上市櫃標的，有些劇烈震盪的個股可以輕易借到錢，而看似有整體台股大盤保護傘的「槓桿型ETF」卻被許多券商拒之門外？這種看似矛盾的金融規則，近期在投資圈掀起了熱烈辯論。

Compared with May, stocks and bond assets faced simultaneous capital outflows. summary_en: Former Cathay Investment Trust Director Guo Mingjian concurrently serves as the independent director of World Core-KY (3661). The aftermath is rippled, and the internal control investigation of the investment trust industry has been fully launched! The Financial Supervisory Commission officially took action to fill the gap and sent a letter to the Investment Trust and Investment Consultants Association, requesting that all member companies be notified to strengthen the stakeholder control mechanism for fund assets and discretionary investment businesses. It also required investment trust and investment consultants to do two things: first, the internal control system must be strengthened, and second, the notification of major incidents must not be delayed or omitted. title_en: Bahrain will hit Taiwan today and tomorrow. Wu Derong: It is still a large-scale Taiwan. Be careful of strong winds and rain.
summary_en: Typhoon Bavi, a moderate typhoon, will affect Taiwan today and tomorrow. Wu Derong, an adjunct associate professor at the Department of Atmospheric Science at National Central University, said in the "Tianji Classroom" column of the "Meteorological Application Promotion Foundation" today that Bavi no longer has a clear eye, but the circulation is strong and it is still a large central platform. Bawei is about to invade. You should pay close attention to the warnings from the Meteorological Administration and be prepared for typhoon prevention. Do not take it lightly.

title_en: At 5:30 this morning, land and sea police were dispatched to New Taipei, Yilan, and Hualien.
summary_en: The current intensity of Typhoon Bavi is the upper limit of moderate typhoon, and the Central Meteorological Administration issued a maritime and land typhoon warning at 5:30 this morning. The Meteorological Administration said that the intensity of Typhoon No. 9 Bavi has weakened slightly in the past three hours. It is currently centered in the sea east of Eluanbi and moving northwest, posing a threat to New Taipei, Yilan and Hualien.

title_en: Chip stocks led gains, US stocks closed 139 points higher, Taiwan index futures rose 633 points in night trading
summary_en: The stock prices of large chip manufacturers rebounded, driving the U.S. stock market to rebound and close 139 points higher. TSMC ADR (TSM) fell $0.13, or 0.03%, to close at $436.85. Taiwan Index futures rose 633 points, or 1.39%, to close at 46,281 points in night trading; TSMC futures rose 21 yuan, or 0.86%, to close at 2,455 yuan in night trading. "Full text..."

title: 台積挺美元配息 楊金龍︰有助減緩台幣波動

title: 盤勢分析》多空拉鋸量縮 上檔壓力待解
summary: 美伊戰事又升溫，推升油價急漲，費城半導體指數前天止跌反彈，帶動台股昨日早盤多頭企圖反攻月線，記憶體族群在SK海力士即將赴美掛牌的激勵下重振雄風，被動元件族群亦反彈，矽晶圓、ABF載板相關個股續強，封測族群亦吸引買盤進駐，但台積電（2330）、聯發科（2454）扯後腿，盤中韓股又跳水下殺，台股賣壓再出…

summary:

summary:

title: 擔心吸金？楊金龍︰AI發展方向沒問題
summary:
關注信用過度擴張、槓桿過高、金融資源過度集中

summary:
大型晶片製造商股價回升，帶動華爾街股市反彈，同時，由於投資人淡化美伊之間的新衝突，油價下跌也促使股市走高。

道瓊工業指數上漲139.02點或0.27%，收52487.41點。

title: 勤美在台中打造 SPARKiT 攜手逾80家品牌挑戰全台最破框的商業革命
summary: 勤美生活創新事業歷經兩年籌備，在台中誠品綠園道商場打造以全新自有品牌「SPARKiT」為核心的概念場域9日正式開幕，強調為結合選物、品牌快閃、主題策略等，與品牌端有更多合作模式的平台，攜手逾80家品牌挑戰全台最破框的商業革命。

title: 影／強颱巴威來襲 大賣場人山人海現搶購人潮
summary: 強颱巴威襲來，中央氣象署已於今天下午2時30分發布海上颱風警報，預估10日晚上至周六影響台灣最劇烈，台北市政府也在晚間宣布明天停止上班上課，許多民眾晚上擁進大賣場搶購食材與零食，結帳時形成大排長龍的景象。

title: 10縣市明放颱風假 氣象署最新預測 僅4縣市達標
summary: 強颱巴威步步進逼，影響最劇烈時間點落在明天下半天至周六。但全台10縣市搶先宣布明天放颱風假，氣象署晚間10時再公布最新24小時累積雨量預測，明天凌晨2時至後天凌晨2時，卻仍僅有4縣市達標。強風部分，明天中午12點至晚上6點，全台各地風力皆未達標。

title: 巴威颱風基隆明停班停課 公車停減班、開放部分紅線、停收垃圾
summary: 巴威颱風逼近，基隆明天停班停課，市府公布明 公車停減班、開放部分紅線、停收垃圾，請民眾注意。

title: 新北派出所長勾結黑幫三部曲詐騙 法院裁定羈押 拔官停職
summary: 台北地檢署獲報，指新北市金山分局民防組官警李語堂，涉在擔任金山派出所長期間，與竹聯幫詐團主謀宋杰峰勾結，利用借車貸款、投資醫材、房產借貸三部曲，詐騙張姓早餐店老闆上千萬元，甚至還幫詐團濫查個資，檢方前天搜索拘提李語堂、宋杰峰及「金主」何拓源到案，訊後認有串滅證之虞聲羈禁見，法院認裁准羈押，李男也被停職。

title: 致癌油風波...北市稽查增2下游業者 泰山允諾研議設「信託基金專戶」
summary: 中聯「大豆沙拉油」致癌物超標案，北市衛生局今日再更新中聯問題油品的福壽、福懋下游業者2家，已即刻要求下架。另，北市府已主動出擊，正式商請國內優良的消費者保護團體，依消保法相關規定提起團體訴訟，依法爭取應有賠償。

title: AI搶飯碗！中研院新科院士李奭學示警：最慢15年翻譯面臨生計問題
summary: 中研院9日公布第卅五屆院士暨名譽院士，六月甫從中研院中國文哲所退休的李奭學獲選為人文組院士。「學者的宿命就是退而不休。」他笑說剛從美國留學回到台灣時「是一名作家」，但因學術研究而荒廢了文學，退休後他要重新拿起文學之筆，繼續他鍾愛的專欄寫作，但也會繼續學術研究。

title: 被酸「乾脆別放」？ 中市府頂罵名提早宣布的「2大考量」
summary: 因應巴威颱風來襲，台中市政府周四(9日)晚間宣布周五(10日)下午6時起，以及周六（11日）全天，全市停止上班上課。然而，「周五傍晚6點才放」隨即引發強烈爭議。不少綠營議員與網友痛批「看得懂盧市府放什麼假嗎？」「下班才放颱風假意義何在？」甚至酸諷「乾脆全天上班上課算了！」對此，盧秀燕市府回應外界質疑，曝光決策幕後的關鍵考量。

title: 基隆34條土石流潛勢溪流44戶保全戶必要時撤離 謝國樑：全面備戰
summary: 強颱巴威逼近，基隆市明天停班停課，市長謝國樑指示各局處依最新風雨預報滾動檢討各項應變措施，視情勢適時提升災害應變中心開設層級。針對轄內34條土石流潛勢溪流，市府已完成現有44戶、80位保全戶資料更新，並持續密切掌握中央發布的紅、黃色警戒資訊。對於低窪易淹水地區、土石流潛勢區及溪流周邊等高風險區域，均已建立預防性疏散撤離及收容安置機制，必要時立即啟動。

title: 強颱巴威襲來...台北動物園明天休園 7月11日夜間延長開放活動取消
summary: 巴威颱風將至，台北市明天停止上班上課。台北市立動物園今晚間表示，明天因應颱風休園一天，7月11日夜間延長開放活動取消。

title: 1張圖看風雨時程變化 專家示警2地區 明天恐受巴威颱風最核心區域掃過
summary: 中颱巴威來勢洶洶，中央氣象署昨天下午已經發布海上颱風警報，預計今天清晨5時30分發布海上陸上颱風警報。天氣風險公司粉專「天氣風險 WeatherRisk」 表示，今天下半天起，巴威颱風對全台各地、澎湖的影響會逐漸變得明顯，尤其西半部平地沿海、金門以外的離島地區風勢都會明顯增強。

title: 國1北向湖口路段凌晨重大車禍 目前全線封閉 高公局成立應變小組處理
summary: 國道1號今天凌晨發生1起重大車禍，高速公路局北區養護工程分局表示，今天凌晨1時43分，在國1北向87.3K湖口服務區路段，發生1輛自小客車和1輛小貨車、1輛全聯結車的追撞事故，占全車道。目前全線封閉中，建議用路人提早改道，小心駕駛。

title: 巴威以中颱上限強度進逼 風雨白天起就有感 愈晚開始風速愈大
summary: 中度颱風巴威目前距離台灣的東南東方約800公里，民間氣象粉專「觀氣象看天氣」今天凌晨表示，東部海域目前皆已觀測到7米以上巨浪、中部3000公尺以上高山及蘭嶼也都出現了8至9級強陣風，目前山區及海邊皆已非常不宜前往。

title: 中颱巴威掀巨浪 氣象署預計今晨5時30分海陸警齊發
summary: 巴威颱風目前強度是中度颱風，中央氣象署表示，若此颱風行徑無特殊變化，氣象署預計今天清晨5時30分發布海上陸上颱風警報。

title: 昨天空氣特別透明 台東可遠眺蘭嶼綠島 鄭明典曝和巴威颱風有關
summary: 巴威颱風今晚起將威脅台灣，中央氣象署已經發布巴威颱風海上颱風警報。昨天北台灣和東半部地區不少民眾發現天空萬里無雲，甚至能從台東看到蘭嶼、綠島，或是在桃園龍潭遠眺台北101大樓。前中央氣象局長鄭明典解惑，他說，台灣受颱風外圍沉降影響。

title: 巴威降為中颱 暴風半徑維持380公里 預計明晨發陸警
summary: 巴威颱風北上過程降級中颱，但七級暴風半徑仍維持380公里、十級暴風半徑180公里，帶來強風驟雨仍不可小覷。氣象署最快周五上午6時前發布陸上颱風警報，首波警戒範圍以花蓮縣及宜蘭縣機率最大，但不排除因為颱風中心擺盪，增加或減少陸警縣市。

title: 巴威颱風將侵台 台灣壽司郎北部4店鋪今天暫停營業
summary: 巴威颱風今天起威脅台灣，台北市、新北市等10縣市昨晚已宣布今天停止上班、停止上課。台灣壽司郎今天凌晨在臉書公告，受颱風影響，台灣壽司郎的汐止遠雄店、南港CITYLINK店、天母高島屋店、三重CITYLINK店，今天暫停營業。

title: 巴威眼牆置換挫敗 專家估颱風侵台時仍是龐然大物 今晚風雨將明顯增強
summary: 巴威颱風昨天深夜減弱至中度颱風上限，天氣風險公司資深顧問吳聖宇今天在「天氣職人-吳聖宇」臉書粉專表示，今天中颱巴威開始準備進入第3度的眼牆置換，不過，看起來過程並不順利。

title_en: Grab will drive growth in the food delivery market
summary_en: The latest "Food Delivery Platforms in East Asia 2026" released by third-party research organization Momentum Works pointed out that Taiwan's food delivery market is entering a new turning point. The market's gross merchandise volume (GMV) in 2025 will be approximately US$3.6 billion, and the annual growth rate has slowed to 5.5%, which is far lower than the past rapid growth stage.

title_en: Yangming and Taihua performed well in June
summary_en: Yang Ming Shipping benefited from rising freight rates driven by peak season demand and the geopolitical situation. Its monthly revenue in June was 16.591 billion yuan, an increase of 1.487 billion yuan, or 9.85%, from revenue in May, and an increase of 2.786 billion yuan, or 20.18%, from revenue in the same period last year. Cumulative revenue in the first half of the year was 84.583 billion yuan, a slight increase of 0.49% compared with the same period last year.

title_en: World Advanced's consolidated revenue hit a high in June, with a monthly increase of over 40%. Legal persons are optimistic about reaching the top in the third quarter.
summary_en: World Advanced (5347), a wafer foundry reinvested by TSMC, announced yesterday (9th) that its June consolidated revenue was 5.977 billion yuan, a new monthly high, with a monthly increase of 40.9% and an annual increase of 33.6%. Legal persons are optimistic that thanks to the increase in shipment prices and volume, as well as the optimization of product mix, the world's operations are expected to continue to improve this quarter and reach new highs.

title: 至上6月合併營收月增14% 衝破600億元
summary: 半導體通路商至上（8112）昨（9）日公布6月合併營收首度衝破600億元大關、達616.29億元，創新高，月增14.3%，年增231.2%。

title_en: Consolidated revenue in June increased by 14% monthly, exceeding 60 billion yuan
summary_en: Semiconductor distributor Supreme (8112) announced yesterday (9th) that its consolidated revenue in June broke through the 60 billion yuan mark for the first time, reaching 61.629 billion yuan, a new high, with a monthly increase of 14.3% and an annual increase of 231.2%.

title: 弘塑6月合併營收月增12% 同期最佳
summary: 半導體設備廠弘塑（3131）昨（9）日公告6月合併營收為6.31億元，為歷年最強6月，並且是單月歷史次高，月增12.8％，年增15.2％。
title_zh: 弘塑6月合併營收月增12% 同期最佳

title_en: Hongsu's June consolidated revenue increased by 12% monthly, the best in the same period
summary_en: Semiconductor equipment factory Hongsu (3131) announced yesterday (9th) that its June consolidated revenue was 631 million yuan, the strongest June in history, and the second highest in single-month history, with a monthly increase of 12.8% and an annual increase of 15.2%.

title: 12檔領先大盤創高股 聚焦
summary: 台股昨（9）日受制外資賣壓持續宣洩，月線得而復失，盤面資金快速輪動，鈺創（5351）、友達等強勢股領先大盤越過6月23日高點，並獲法人買盤加持，專家預期後市仍有上檔空間，建議採低接不追高方式酌量布局。

title_en: 12 stocks leading the market to hit highs Focus
summary_en: The Taiwan stock market continued to vent yesterday (9th) due to the selling pressure of foreign investors. The monthly line gained and lost, and the market funds rotated rapidly. Strong stocks such as Etron (5351) and AUO led the market and crossed the high point on June 23, and were supported by legal person buying. Experts predict that there is still room for upside in the market outlook, and it is recommended to consider the layout by picking up the low and not chasing the high.

title: 樺漢提併購 雜音浮現
summary: 工業電腦大廠樺漢（6414）日前宣布，擬以每股23.5歐元現金，公開收購旗下德商Kontron AG普通股，惟Kontron執行董事會和監事會收購委員會8日建議股東，不接受樺漢此次開價的收購提案。對此，樺漢昨（9）日回應，該案將按照排程表持續進行。
title_zh: 樺漢提併購 雜音浮現

title_en: Hua Hanti M&A noise emerges
summary_en: Industrial computer giant Huahan (6414) recently announced that it plans to publicly acquire the ordinary shares of its German company Kontron AG for 23.5 euros in cash per share. However, Kontron's executive board and the acquisition committee of the supervisory board recommended on the 8th that shareholders not accept Huahan's acquisition proposal. In response, Hua Han responded yesterday (9th) that the case will continue according to the schedule.

title_en: Typhoon Bavi is approaching, Jijie will operate normally on the 10th and adopt a holiday schedule
summary_en: In response to Typhoon Bavi's approach to Taiwan, the Taoyuan Mass Rapid Transit Company stated on the evening of the 9th that the direct trains and ordinary trains of the Airport MRT on the 10th will depart according to the holiday schedule and will maintain normal operations and will...

title: 廣積、安勤6月營收攀峰
summary: 工業電腦（IPC）廠廣積（8050）、安勤公布6月營收雙創單月歷史新高，廣積為9.56億元，月增66.6%，年增143.6%；安勤為8.83億元，月增13.3%，年增27.9%。

title_en: Guangji and Avalue reach peak revenue in June
summary_en: Industrial computer (IPC) manufacturers Guangji (8050) and Avalue announced that their June revenue hit a record high in a single month. Guangji was 956 million yuan, a monthly increase of 66.6%, and an annual increase of 143.6%; Avalue was 883 million yuan, a monthly increase of 13.3%, and an annual increase of 27.9%.

title: 桂盟6月營收年增31% 巨大6月合併營收年增16%
summary: 自行車產業需求回暖，巨大（9921）6月合併營收57.59億元，年增16%，為今年來單月最高；上半年營收291.8億元，年減10.5%。鏈條大廠桂盟6月營收5億元，年增31.7%，也是今年來最高；上半年營收27.5億元，年增8.4%。
title_zh: 桂盟6月營收年增31% 巨大6月合併營收年增16%

title_en: Guimeng’s revenue in June increased by 31% year-on-year; Huge’s consolidated revenue in June increased by 16% year-on-year
summary_en: Demand in the bicycle industry is picking up. Huge (9921)'s consolidated revenue in June was 5.759 billion yuan, an annual increase of 16%, the highest in a single month this year; revenue in the first half of the year was 29.18 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 10.5%. Guimeng, a major chain manufacturer, had revenue of 500 million yuan in June, an annual increase of 31.7%, the highest this year; revenue in the first half of the year was 2.75 billion yuan, an annual increase of 8.4%.

title: 就市論勢／PCB、被動元件 題材加持
summary: 台股歷經上半年強勁反彈後，近期走勢轉趨震盪，市場焦點重新回到企業基本面與產業展望。台灣內需與出口動能維持穩健，整體經濟基本面仍具支撐，市場並未改變中長期多頭架構看法。

title_en: Market situation/PCB, passive components theme blessing
summary_en: After a strong rebound in the first half of the year, Taiwan stocks have recently turned volatile, with the market focus returning to corporate fundamentals and industry outlook. Taiwan's domestic demand and export momentum remain solid, and the overall economic fundamentals remain supportive. The market has not changed its view on the mid- to long-term bullish structure.

title: 董座陳柏廷親自上場　萬海羽球隊獲得航海節羽球賽冠軍
summary: 萬海航運董事長陳柏廷熱愛羽毛球運動，公司的羽球社積極鼓勵員工參與，自己除了參加每周兩次的羽球社運動，還在2009年7月1日成立亞柏球團，成為當時唯一的民營球團，並在2010年斥資1.9億元，在高雄小港興建佔地1600坪的羽球基地，今年航海節舉辦的羽球聯誼賽，陳柏廷親自上場參加比賽，也讓連三年參加比賽的萬海拿下第一個冠軍盃。 《詳全文...》

title_en: Chairman Chen Boting played in person and Wanhai Badminton Team won the Nautical Festival Badminton Championship
summary_en: Chen Boting, chairman of Wanhai Shipping, loves badminton. The company's badminton club actively encourages employees to participate. In addition to participating in twice-weekly badminton club sports, he also established the Yabo Team on July 1, 2009, becoming the only private team at the time. In 2010, it invested 190 million yuan to build a 1,600-square-meter badminton base in Xiaogang, Kaohsiung. In this year's sailing festival, Chen Boting personally participated in the badminton competition, which also allowed Wan Hai, who has participated in the competition for three consecutive years, to win the first championship cup. "Full text..."

title: 大立光奪首張CPO訂單 最快明年中量產
summary: 大立光共同封裝光學（CPO）新事業首張訂單到手，董事長林恩平昨（9）日於法說會證實，已有一家客戶期望光纖陣列（FA）量產訂單，預計本月送樣，客戶將以最快速度認證。
title_zh: 大立光奪首張CPO訂單 最快明年中量產
summary_zh: 大立光共同封裝光學（CPO）新事業首張訂單到手，董事長林恩平昨（9）日於法說會證實，已有一家客戶期望光纖陣列（FA）量產訂單，預計本月送樣，客戶將以最快速度認證。
title_en: Largan has won its first CPO order and will start mass production next year at the earliest
summary_en: Largan's new co-packaged optics (CPO) business has received its first order. Chairman Lin Enping confirmed at the FA conference yesterday (9th) that there is already a customer expecting a mass production order for fiber arrays (FA). Samples are expected to be delivered this month, and the customer will be certified as quickly as possible.

title: 股匯期今天休市
summary: 因應巴威颱風強勢來襲，台北市政府宣布今（10）日停班停課，據此，台北股、匯、期市休市一天，原應於10日交割款券順延辦理一天。
title_zh: 股匯期今天休市
summary_zh: 因應巴威颱風強勢來襲，台北市政府宣布今（10）日停班停課，據此，台北股、匯、期市休市一天，原應於10日交割款券順延辦理一天。
title_en: The stock exchange period is closed today
summary_en: In response to the strong attack of Typhoon Bavi, the Taipei City Government announced that all classes will be suspended today (10th). Accordingly, Taipei's stock, foreign exchange and futures markets will be closed for one day, and the delivery of securities that was supposed to be on the 10th will be postponed for one day.

title: 室博會照常舉辦
summary: 經濟日報在南港展覽館舉辦的「室內設計博覽會」及「AI應用設計展」今（10）日照常舉辦。依雙北市政府公告，有需要準備防颱之展商及居住在東北角、北海岸員工，應依政府公告不要到館。

title: 出口連32紅 創最強6月 四大因素催動續航力
summary: 財政部昨（9）日公布6月出口748.3億美元，是歷年最強6月，年增40.3％，累計上半年出口4,166.6億美元，創同期新高。財政部表示，受惠AI風潮，台灣出口續航力十足，年增率已連32紅，遠勝其他主要經濟體。

title: 財部分析 傳產逐步走出外銷谷底
summary: 財政部昨（9）日指出，非電子及資通類產品出口已連續七季正成長，今年第2季增幅、規模都是近四年最佳水準，代表傳產已逐漸走出外銷谷底。

title: 亞銀：台灣今年GDP增9.5% 幅度、預測值雙雙稱冠亞太
summary: 亞洲開發銀行昨（9）日調升包含台灣等先進亞太經濟體今年經濟成長率預測，並大幅上修台灣2026年經濟成長預測至9.5%，稱冠亞太，且調幅為全亞太最大，台灣明年的成長率預估仍可達4%，依然是昔日亞洲四小龍最高。

title: 美伊緊張未撼動市場　歐股多收漲
summary:
歐洲主要股市今天漲多跌少，投資人重新青睞科技股，對美國與伊朗之間的劍拔弩張則大多視而不見。

倫敦FTSE 100指數下跌16.59點或0.16%，收在10472.45點，主要受到製藥及生物...…

title: Google 揪台廠 攻 AI 代理
summary: Google Cloud年度雲端盛會「Google Cloud Day Taipei」昨（9）日登場，聚焦代理式企業時代下，秀出Google Cloud AI與雲端技術的最新發展，並邀來合作夥伴中華電信（2412）、宏碁智雲資訊、統一資訊打造各種解決方案，攜手搶進市場。

title: 力積電6月合併營收攀四年新高
summary: 力積電（6770）昨（9）日公告6月合併營收64.74億元，攀上47個月來高點，月增12.2%，年增68.75%；第2季合併營收172.9億元，為近15季最佳，季增27.4%，年增53.3%；上半年營收308.63億元，年增37.81%。

title: 仁寶6月合併營收月增36% 三年半最佳
summary: 代工大廠仁寶（2324）昨（9）日公告6月合併營收958.54億元，攀上2022年10月以來單月新高，月增36％，並較去年同期增加58.4％；第2季合併營收2,382.95億元，為七季來高點。

title: 台塑四寶上半年大賺千億 總額1,084億元 南亞EPS 5.17元居冠
summary: 台塑四寶昨（9）日公布6月營收暨最新自結獲利，第2季稅後純益合計為642.76億元，季增45.5%，並擺脫去年同期虧損陰霾；上半年合計大賺逾千億元、達1,084.53億元，遠優於去年同期虧損。

title: 台塑集團下半年營運 穩健看待
summary: 台塑集團四大公司昨（9）日發布第3季、下半年營運展望，隨著石化產品需求旺季來到，待先前高價原料庫存逐步出清後，預期營運回歸市場供需基本面、整體仍穩健看待；南亞則預估，電子材料成長強勁、加上轉投資挹注，下半年營運效益值得期待。

title: 美伊緊張未撼動市場　歐股多收漲
summary: （中央社倫敦9日綜合外電報導）歐洲主要股市今天漲多跌少，投資人重新青睞科技股，對美國與伊朗之間的劍拔弩張則大多視而不見。

title: 台達電好威 6月單月業績創高 受惠AI相關電源、散熱出貨
summary: 電源龍頭台達電昨（9）日公布6月合併營收656.03億元，創單月歷史新高，月增11.3%，年增55.4%，主要受惠AI相關電源及散熱等出貨熱潮。本季邁入傳統旺季，法人看好，台達電業績將續戰新高。

title: 光寶6月營收月增8% 攀近八年高點
summary: 受惠AI與雲端運算高階伺服器電源、高效備援電池系統（BBU）等需求強勁，電源大廠光寶昨（9）日公布6月合併營收187億元，攀上2018年9月以來單月新高，月增8%，年增37%。公司看好，下半年將「非常忙碌」，營運看俏。

title: 日月光營收月增4% 最旺6月
summary: 全球半導體封測龍頭日月光投控昨（9）日公布6月合併營收657.83億元，為歷年最旺的6月，也是單月歷史次高，月增4.4%，年增32.9%。

title: 大立光Q3產能利用率滿載 董座林恩平報喜 拉貨動能月來月好
summary: 大立光昨（9）日召開法說會，針對本季營運展望，大立光董事長林恩平表示，7月拉貨動能比6月好一點，8月比7月好，本季產能利用率將滿載。

title: 大立光上半年每股純益82.35元
summary: 大立光昨（9）日召開法說會，公布第2季稅後純益46.69億元，雖然季減23.7%，但較去年同期大增3.5倍，為近四年同期最佳，每股純益35.72元；上半年大賺107.93億元，每股純益82.35元。

title: 我上半年對美出超千億美元 累計對五大市場出口規模飆高
summary: 台美貿易關係緊密，財政部昨（9）日發布統計，上半年對美國出超高達1,040億美元，是歷年同期新高，全年對美出超將超過2,000億美元，美國穩坐台灣最大出口國、最大出超國；同時台灣AI相關出口強勁，高度仰賴南韓記憶體，南韓已成台灣最大入超國。

title: 中研院新科院士 19位入列
summary: 中研院昨（9）日公布第35屆院士暨名譽院士名單，共選出19位新科院士、三位名譽院士。其中，這一屆有兩位新科院士來自產業界，分別為台積電技術發展資深副總經理吳顯揚、台達電技術長郭大維；吳顯揚也是台積電第三位中研院院士。

title: 中研院院士遴選不足額...人才危機縮影
summary: 第36屆中研院院士會議昨（9）日選出19位院士，不到足額的一半。2018年中研院院士陳力俊曾在院士審查會議後表示，中研院院士「十年後將真正面臨斷層問題」，十年之期將屆，中研院院士的斷層危機，正是台灣人才危機的縮影。

title: SK海力士ADR 超額認購七倍 南亞科、華邦、旺宏等台廠添動能
summary: 外電報導，SK海力士美國存託憑證（ADR）發行案獲投資人熱烈認購，全球長線基金、科技基金、主權財富基金及亞洲投資人踴躍下單，超額認購逾七倍，預計美東時間10日在那斯達克交易。

title: DRAM合約價看漲18%
summary: 研調機構集邦科技（TrendForce）昨（9）日發布最新報告指出，預期本季伺服器DRAM合約價將再漲13%至18%。隨著市場供不應求格局延續，後續可能出現各原廠競相上修報價的情況。

title: 環球晶、美光簽十年長約
summary: 美光加入擴產行列，9日表示美國新廠投資額將增至2,500億美元，以助滿足AI基建潮引發的空前記憶體需求；同時，台廠環球晶與美光將簽訂十年長約，美光也將提供5億美元的戰略融資給環球晶，以深化長期策略合作關係。美光表示，雙方也要合作研發下一代晶圓技術。

title: 輝達H200銷陸鬆綁 台積利多 接單有望增溫
summary: 美國科技媒體The Information報導，中國大陸打算允許其國內頂尖AI廠商，少量採購輝達（NVIDIA）的H200晶片，這顯示北京當局有意鬆綁對美國技術的管制。外界看好，這對輝達相關供應鏈如台積電等將是好消息。

title: AI旺爆台股！高盛躍升外資券商一哥　台北分公司獲利年增近6成
summary: AI 熱潮帶動台股狂飆，也讓外資券商排名出現大洗牌。高盛集團（Goldman Sachs）今年在台股交易市場急速竄升，從 2025 年初的第 10 名，一舉成為上半年台灣交易量最大的外資券商，超越摩根大通、摩根士丹利等華爾街同業。 《詳全文...》

title: 輝達發展機器人生態系 跨步
summary: 輝達積極推動機器人生態系發展，宣布與全球最大AI模型社群平台Hugging Face攜手，共同為LeRobot導入全新模型與框架，提供開放機器人社群使用。

title: 華碩6月營收 衝破千億元 伺服器、PC業務成長是主因
summary: PC品牌大廠華碩昨（9）日公布6月集團營收首度衝破千億元大關、達1,067.23億元，創新高，較5月激增54.5%，並較去年同期大增55.6%，帶動第2季、上半年集團營收同步攻頂，主要受惠AI伺服器與PC業務同步成長。

title: 巴威減弱為中颱 逐漸逼近台灣
summary: 根據中央氣象署今天深夜最新颱風消息，巴威逐漸逼近台灣，但已減弱為中度颱風，氣象署持續發布海上颱風警報

title: 華碩強打電競 兩新品亮相
summary: 華碩持續衝刺電競業務，旗下電競品牌ROG玩家共和國正歡慶品牌成立20周年，昨（9）日無預警宣布再推出「ROG Gjallar」旗艦電競Soundbar，以及可高度自定義的「ROG Raikiri II Pro」 PC控制器等兩大新品。

title: 辭高薪工作照顧家人燒光2240萬   他血淚告白「勸世文」曝光了
summary: 〔財經頻道／綜合報導〕美國58歲女子強森（Tamara Johnson）原本是美國政府高級官員，卻因母親罹病、丈夫心臟病與中風，不得不放下事業成為全職照顧者。由於兩人都沒有長照保險，她一家至今已...…

title: 錢鏡你家1／台積電愈漲不動愈好買　蔡明翰揭「市值比重」逆向布局法
summary: 台股熱潮爆棚！根據證交所資料顯示，截至6月底，全台股票開戶人數已達1,448萬人，單月大增超過15萬戶，再創歷史新高。不過，同時也引發投資人集體焦慮，不斷詢問：現在高檔還能買嗎？到底要買0050（元大台灣50）還是買台積電？

title: 錢鏡你家2／300萬滾出1590萬　蔡明翰：0050定期定額爬得慢但永遠在爬
summary: 台股高檔盤整震盪，投資新手常陷入「漲了想等跌，跌了怕再跌」的無限輪迴，永遠進不了場。對此，資深分析師蔡明翰指出，投資其實可以很簡單，只要解決「選標的」與「選時間」兩個問題，其餘就讓時間放大複利效果。

title: 別被洗出場外！經理人「這句話」點醒散戶　台股基本面大解密
summary: 台股頻創新高引發過熱疑慮，永豐投信經理人周立行指出，台股漲勢有企業獲利飆升四成作為強勁支撐，且AI十年科技大週期才剛起步，現在布局並不晚。面對市場高檔震盪，主動式ETF展現靈活選股優勢，能避開被動投資機制僵化侷限，從供應鏈底層挖掘潛力黑馬。投資人應持續關注AI變現能力與總體經濟動態，透過主動式操作卡位機器人與AI應用商機，在享受科技成長紅利的同時，也能透過靈活換股策略有效防範市場波動風險，搶攻下一波科技產業漲幅。

title: 第四波科技牛市推動台股新高 永豐00410A精選AI潛力股
summary: 近期台股氣勢如虹，作為全球 AI 供應鏈核心，主計總處調高台灣今 (2026) 年 GDP 成長預估值至 9.64%。台股結構正在轉型為「AI 產業鏈輪動」，以前五月為例，電子零組件與玻璃陶瓷族群就分別上漲 140% 與 99%

title: AI 時代住宿安全升級 胡智鈞談旅宿業反針孔管理與隱私保護新趨勢
summary: AI時代住宿安全全面升級！為協助旅館業者建立更完善的安全管理制度，台中市旅館商業同業公會特別邀請旅宿經營管理實務專家胡智鈞擔任講師，以「提升住宿安全及資料保護－反針孔管理與隱私維護實務」為主題，分享最新安全管理觀念與實務經驗，吸引眾多旅館業者參與。

title: 林佳龍午宴巴拿馬跨黨派議員團　盼開展互惠友好關係
summary: 外交部長林佳龍今天午宴巴拿馬跨黨派國會議員訪問團時表示，台灣與巴拿馬具高度合作潛力，期待訪團返國後持續發揮影響力，支持友...

title: 環球晶獲美光5億美元支持　破紀錄10年長約助攻德州擴產
summary: 美國記憶體大廠美光9日宣布，將啟動最高30億美元的美國半導體供應鏈投資計畫，其中包括提供環球晶5億美元策略性資金，支持其美國德州12吋矽晶圓廠擴產，雙方並規劃簽署10年供應協議。環球晶表示，此次合作反映AI帶動長期需求，也將推動德州廠後續擴產，提升美國在地供應能力。

title: 美國單週新申請失業金人數略降至21.5萬人　優於預期
summary: （中央社華盛頓9日綜合外電報導）美國勞工部今天公布，至4日為止的1週內，美國新申請失業給付人數略減2000人至21萬5000人，低於慧甚（FactSet）調查分析師預估的22萬人，顯示美國裁員情況仍處於歷史低點。

title: 金管會：綠色投融資規模5月底達5.3兆　達標率88%
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北9日電）金管會統計顯示，截至今年5月底，台灣綠色投融資規模已達新台幣5兆3046億元，占2030年6兆元目標的88%。至於是否進一步上修目標，金管會指出，目前仍以2030年6兆元目標為重要里程碑，是否調整將視市場發展滾動檢討。

title: 投資人淡化美伊衝突 美股道瓊漲139點、費半漲3.06%、台積電小跌
summary: [Newtalk新聞] 美國和伊朗再度互相攻擊，中東緊張局勢升級，投資人淡化美伊衝突影響，國際油價下跌，美國股市4大指數9日全部上漲，道瓊工業指數上漲139.02點、0.27%，那斯達克指數上漲1.30%，標普500指數上漲0.81%，費城半導體指數勁揚3.06%，台積電ADR幾乎平盤，微跌0.02美元，收在436.96美元。 綜合外媒報導，中東戰火一觸即發，伊朗近日再度襲擊多艘能源運輸船，美國隨即對伊朗發動軍事打擊，兩國脆弱的臨時和平協議破裂。美國8日宣布發動軍事行動後，油價一度飆升，但9日回落，美國原油下跌1.44美元或2.0%，收每桶72.08美元；布蘭特原油下跌1.72美元或2.2%，收每桶76.30美元。 焦點個股方面，中國可能允許有限度地使用輝達H200晶片，提振股市情緒。另外，SK海力士赴美ADR上市，已超額認購逾7倍，預計將成為繼SpaceX之後全球第二大股票發行。輝達10日下跌0.66%，英特爾上漲2.09%，AMD上漲5.67%，美光上漲4.52%。美國經濟數據方面，上週申請失業救濟金的人數量下降，但房屋銷售意外下滑，房價卻創下歷史新高。 美股9日收盤，道瓊工業指數

title: 美國櫻桃賣不到好價錢？竟有農民含淚放棄果園  慘烈原因曝光
summary: 〔財經頻道／綜合報導〕美國西北地區是全美最重要櫻桃大產區，今年產季的收購價令果農大失所望。原本不少農民期待2026年能迎來價格反彈、改善收入，但目前跡象顯示，這個期待恐怕落空，部分果農因無利可圖...…

title: 兒子沉迷電玩意外成財神爺   他轉念創業1年海撈6.4億爽翻了
summary: 〔財經頻道／綜合報導〕看到孩子沉迷籃球電玩，多數家長只會碎念，但創業家穆迪（Craig Moody）當年一句「為什麼不出去打球？」意外激發靈感，讓他萌生把籃球訓練變得像電玩一樣有趣的構想，歷經多...…

title: 夜盤走揚、美股領漲！「台股放颱風假」這群人哀號
summary: 財經中心／李明融報導受到強烈颱風巴威來勢洶洶影響，台北市宣布10日停止上班上課，台灣金融市場也同步按下暫停鍵，證交所與期交所雙雙公告股匯市、期貨及選擇權市場全日休市一天。然而，這對滿腦子投資經的股民來說卻是個晴天霹靂的消息。因為在休市前的最後一個台指期夜盤，受到美股半導體類股狂飆領漲的激勵，大盤指數一飛衝天、強勢飆破4萬6千點大關，讓大批滿手多單準備數錢的投資人氣炸，紛紛在社群與PTT上崩潰哀號「少賺一天誰要負責！」。

title: 10天爆2次違約交割！國巨*累計金額衝破8,000萬元　13家券商同步申報
summary: [FTNN新聞網]記者莊蕙如／綜合報導被動元件大廠國巨*（2327）再度出現鉅額違約交割。臺灣證券交易所9日公告，共有13家券商通報國巨違約交割案件，合計金額約4...

title: 外資提款9.59億元！0050獲「國家隊」逢低買進4091張　00685L爆量30.9萬張奪買超王
summary: [FTNN新聞網]記者陳思穎／綜合報導台股昨（9）日開高震盪，午盤跳水翻黑，終場收在45354.61點，下跌379.80點，漲幅0.83%，成交金額9461.22億元。根據「玩股網...

title: 颱風巴威10日停班停課縣市　兩大外送平台暫停服務
summary: （中央社記者江明晏台北9日電）颱風巴威逼近，北北基桃等縣市陸續宣布10日停止上班上課。foodpanda表示，自10日零時起停止外送服務，並提前30分鐘關閉平台，UberEats也暫停停班停課地區營運和外送服務。

title: 市售健康險第2年才給付引議　金管會將全面清查
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北9日電）外界關切市面多張健康險保單設計疑似出現漏洞，條款規定第二個保單年度才給付特定傷病等部分項目，長於現行等待期規範。金管會表示，相關保單屬於備查商品，將請業者說明，也會進行全面清查，如果有問題可能停售或祭出其他行政處分。

title: 颱風巴威逼近　新光三越7/10多店停業SOGO北部休館
summary: （中央社記者何秀玲、江明晏台北9日電）颱風巴威逼近台灣，各地百貨業者陸續宣布明天將調整營運。新光三越台北、桃園共9店10日停業，台中店提前於晚間6時閉店；遠東SOGO北部及中壢、新竹等分店將停止營業，京站宣布休館一天，其他業者將視天候及地方政府公告滾動調整。

title: 日圓兌美元 165成官方防線
summary: 日圓近日跌至1986年以來最低，且貶破1美元兌162日圓關卡，避險基金對日圓看法也轉為2007年以來最悲觀的水準，引發市場揣測日本官員何時會進場阻貶日圓。富邦金控首席經濟學家羅瑋表示，日圓短期偏向貶值，但165元就會觸碰到美國跟日本央行的底線，7月相關政策宣布將是影響日圓的重要觀察點。渣打銀行則預期三個月內美元兌日圓，將來到1美元兌161日圓的水準，12個月內回到1美元兌155日圓。

title: 楊金龍看AI熱 提三警訊…強調產業發展沒問題
summary: AI浪潮持續推升台股表現，市場資金高度集中於AI概念股，也讓不少人擔憂AI泡沫化。中央銀行總裁楊金龍昨（9）日指出，AI產業發展方向沒有問題，具備長期成長動能，真正令人擔憂的並非「產業泡沫」，而是於信用資源過度集中至AI領域，信用槓桿快速擴張，政府需密切關注三大方向。

title: 錢進股市 國銀周轉金放款攀升 5月新增3,500億元
summary: 金管會昨（9）日公布本國銀行今年5月份最新存放款情形，市場最關注的「錢進股市」指標周轉金放款，月增3,501億元，寫下歷年同期新高，主因AI產業鏈需求旺盛，帶動企業購料，也帶動個人理財需求增加。

title: 外資匯出…央行穩匯 「柳樹理論」成主軸
summary: 外資持續匯出引爆新台幣貶值潮，昨日兌美元收在卅二點一七八元，較前一交易日貶值一點四六角。中央銀行總裁楊金龍昨在立法院財委會答詢指出，央行對匯率的態度就是「柳樹理論」，匯率要能波動，但不能波動太大；匯率應由市場供需決定，央行角色是「管理」而非「管制」。

title: SpaceXAI 推新模型 台鏈補
summary: SpaceXAI攜手AI程式設計新創公司Cursor共同開發的全新人工智慧模型Grok 4.5，主打金融、法律和程式設計的處理能力，展現馬斯克設法縮短和Anthropic和OpenAI等對手差距的企圖心，同時也將助攻緯創、英業達等相關ODM供應鏈後續訂單動能續衝。

title: 大立光奪首張CPO訂單 最快明年中量產
summary: 大立光共同封裝光學（CPO）新事業首張訂單到手，董事長林恩平昨（9）日於法說會證實，已有一家客戶期望光纖陣列（FA）量產訂單，預計本月送樣，客戶將以最快速度認證。

title: SK海力士ADR超額認購七倍 南亞科、華邦、旺宏等台廠添動能
summary: 外電報導，SK海力士美國存託憑證（ADR）發行案獲投資人熱烈認購，全球長線基金、科技基金、主權財富基金及亞洲投資人踴躍下單，超額認購逾七倍，預計美東時間10日在那斯達克交易。

title: 輝達H200銷陸鬆綁 台積利多 接單有望增溫
summary: 美國科技媒體The Information報導，中國大陸打算允許其國內頂尖AI廠商，少量採購輝達（NVIDIA）的H200晶片，這顯示北京當局有意鬆綁對美國技術的管制。外界看好，這對輝達相關供應鏈如台積電等將是好消息。

title: 受惠客運暑期旺季、深化航網布局 長榮航、虎航6月營收高飛
summary: 暑假旅遊旺季加上AI供應鏈推升貨運熱潮，長榮航和台灣虎航昨（9）日公告6月營收表現亮眼。尤其，長榮航創單月合併營收歷史新高，上半年亦創下客運營收及合併營收歷年同期新高。

title: 台塑四寶上半年大賺千億…總額1,084億元 南亞EPS居冠
summary: 台塑四寶昨（9）日公布6月營收暨最新自結獲利，第2季稅後純益合計為642.76億元，季增45.5%，並擺脫去年同期虧損陰霾；上半年合計大賺逾千億元、達1,084.53億元，遠優於去年同期虧損。

title: 我上半年對美出超千億美元 累計對五大市場出口規模飆高
summary: 台美貿易關係緊密，財政部昨（9）日發布統計，上半年對美國出超高達1,040億美元，是歷年同期新高，全年對美出超將超過2,000億美元，美國穩坐台灣最大出口國、最大出超國；同時台灣AI相關出口強勁，高度仰賴南韓記憶體，南韓已成台灣最大入超國。

title: 出口連32紅 創最強6月…四大因素催動續航力
summary: 財政部昨（9）日公布6月出口748.3億美元，是歷年最強6月，年增40.3％，累計上半年出口4,166.6億美元，創同期新高。財政部表示，受惠AI風潮，台灣出口續航力十足，年增率已連32紅，遠勝其他主要經濟體。

title: 財部分析 傳產逐步走出外銷谷底
summary: 財政部昨（9）日指出，非電子及資通類產品出口已連續七季正成長，今年第2季增幅、規模都是近四年最佳水準，代表傳產已逐漸走出外銷谷底。

title: 金管會修法推動OIU　保經代支付轉介費合法化
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北9日電）金管會今天表示，將預告修正「保險經紀人管理規則」及「保險代理人管理規則」，明定保經代為國際保險業務分公司（OIU）的保險業務可支付轉介費，並規定保經代公司任用人員不得同時登錄為保險公司或其他保經代公司的保險業務員，以避免利益衝突。

title: 金價跌向4,000美元關卡 專家：短線承壓、長線仍看多 黃金買點還沒到
summary: 國際金價近期持續走弱，9日現貨金價回落至每英兩4,061美元，市場關注是否進一步下探4,000美元整數關卡。市場分析，近期美伊衝突升溫推升油價，引發通膨疑慮，加上市場對美國聯準會（Fed）維持高利率甚至再次升息的預期升溫，帶動美元走強、美債殖利率攀升，使不具孳息收益的黃金承受賣壓。

summary: 台股近期屢創新高，市場熱度居高不下，引發國人對股市是否過熱的疑慮。中央銀行總裁楊金龍今（9）日赴立法院財政委員會進行專題報告並備質詢，面對立委緊盯台股泡沫化風險、產業「K型化」以及資本市場失衡等議題，楊金龍坦言自己並非股市專家，不敢輕易斷言股市沒有過熱，但他強調台股背後有AI基本面支撐。不過，楊金龍也罕見公開呼籲，投資人應維持風險意識，千萬「不要過度運用槓桿」，以防範潛在的金融風險累積。

title: 颱風假還要上班嗎？勞動部解惑出勤一次看
summary: 強颱「巴威」逼近，恐帶來強風豪雨。勞動部提醒，勞工在縣市首長宣布停班停課後，依要點規定可不出勤，且雇主不得視為曠工、遲到或強迫勞工以事假或其他假別處理。如確需要勞工出勤，雇主應提供勞工通勤協助，如支付計程車費用。

title: 中聯油品風暴擴大 卓榮泰祭五大措施：退貨從寬、停工無期限
summary: 中聯油品風暴持續延燒，行政院長卓榮泰今（9）日在行政院會表示，政府將全面維護消費者權益，中央、地方將共同協助消費者團體提起訴訟，相關費用由衛福部食安基金支應；同時要求下游業者採取「從寬、從優、從速、從簡」原則辦理退換貨，民眾只要持發票、收據、刷卡紀錄、消費紀錄等足以證明購買的憑證，或持有商品本身，都可辦理退換貨。

title: 特化及半導體先進製程貢獻續增 法人調高中華化目標價

title: 高階光模塊需求強勁 法人點名兩台廠市占提升可期

title: 大數據攜《KEYPO》全新功能 首登2026 LEAP East、拓展海外市場
summary: 生成式AI快速改變全球使用者搜尋、取得資訊與企業決策模式，品牌經營也邁向從搜尋到同步掌握 「AI聆聽（AI Listening)」的新階段。台灣AI數據科技業者大數據公司（BIG DATA）宣布首次參與亞洲科技盛會 2026 LEAP East，展示旗下AI 輿情分析平台《KEYPO 大數據關鍵引擎》全新AI聆聽功能，以及企業盡職調查平台《KEYKYC》及《網路溫度計 DailyView》、《香港網路溫度計》，完整呈現從品牌智能、企業信任與風險管理到產業分析的一站式AI數據解決方案。

title: 美股高檔震盪 法人建議定期定額全球型基金

summary: 隨著巴威颱風持續增強，外界高度關注其可能帶來的強風豪雨影響。振宇五金（2947）表示，每逢強烈颱風來襲前夕，防水、防颱及修繕用品的詢問度都會明顯提升，建議民眾把握風雨來臨前的黃金準備時間，從「擋水、止漏、排水、防護」四大面向全面檢視居家環境，提前做好防颱部署，降低豪雨及強風可能造成的災害損失。

title: 日本 AI 加持後市水漲船高 四大亮點產業齊現

title: 7月9日盤前／美伊紛爭推升油價 惟輝達傳好消息 指數月線附近整理
summary:
昨日盤勢
受美股走弱影響，加上主計總處公布6 月CPI年增率2.6%，創下 2025 年 2 月以來新高。此外，荷姆茲海峽傳出一連串油輪遇襲事件，推升國際原油報價重返七字頭。在多空交錯下，台股開盤以 45,524 點紅盤開出，盤中一度下探至 45,036 點。所幸護國神山台積電在尾盤展現神龍擺尾之姿，終場拉抬指數翻紅收在45,734 點，小漲 255 點，指數仍未站回月線；惟盤面上AI指標題材股轉強，包括聯亞、南亞、景碩及順達等，亮燈漲停。
權值股方面，台積電上漲1.02%，鴻海上漲0.21%，聯發科下跌0.86%，廣達上漲1.07%，台達電下跌0.26%。盤面強勢股，研華、禾伸堂、合晶、鑽石投資、麗臺、南亞、雷虎、精材、聯亞、景碩等漲停；GIS-KY、威宏-KY、聯電、台勝科、南電、上詮、昇達科等漲幅6%以上；盤面弱勢股，志聖、捷敏-KY、宏旭-KY、聖暉*等跌停；三晃、來億-KY、遠傳、富世達、奇鋐、大亞、大毅、致茂、華新科等跌幅5%以上。
終場台灣加權指數上漲 255.3 點，以45734.41點作收，成交量為9583.46億元。觀察盤面變化，三大類股全面上漲，電子上漲0.44%

title: 雙線戰法1／大盤崩千點照買　54歲宗哥靠「布林線」咬住波段滾6千萬
summary: 台股震盪加劇，時而暴跌千點，散戶心驚肉跳，人稱「股神宗哥」的莊文宗卻格外冷靜，「大盤一片慘綠，可是還是有個股漲停啊！只要從技術指標找出這樣的股票，就不會被大盤拖著走。」他強調，投資看的不是指數漲跌，而是個股是否出現買進訊號。靠著「布林線」框住股價波動空間，咬住波段行情，30年來讓他在股海累積6,000萬元資產。

title: 雙線戰法2／別再被洗出場　達人只看「寶塔線」：翻黑就走、翻紅就買
summary: 散戶常因1、2天的大跌而恐慌出清，結果隔天股價反轉回彈，只能捶心肝。投資達人莊文宗教戰，善用工具過濾市場雜訊，他用主圖「布林線」搭配副圖「寶塔線」（Tower Indicator），主要原因是寶塔線只專注「收盤價」，能洗掉盤中震盪的干擾，「我只在乎寶塔線有沒有變臉？」當寶塔線「由黑翻紅」，代表空方力道轉弱，該進場了；反之，只要寶塔線尚未翻黑，就持續抱股。

title: 雙線戰法3／海軍陸戰隊練出鐵紀律　達人8成衝波段、2成抱金融股攻守兼備
summary: 莊文宗在30歲時熱衷當沖、憑感覺殺進殺出，短短半年內慘賠200多萬元，他痛定思痛、鑽研指標，用「主副圖裡應外合」策略進攻，再搭配2成「雷都打不動」的金融股防禦，每年穩領50萬股息。

title: Meta、谷歌挺過三世代…芒果股誕生！MANGOS科技新帝國帶來什麼投資機會？
summary: 全球資本市場正經歷一場結構性的深度轉移。過去十年，主導華爾街與全球投資組合的核心力量，是建立在網際網路、軟體服務與消費性電子產品基礎上的科技七巨頭；然而，隨著生成式ＡＩ崛起，市場關注的焦點已逐漸從軟體應用與終端消費，轉向底層算力、能源基建以及低軌道衛星通訊的垂直整合。六月，SpaceX掛牌上市，一個全新的縮寫開始在華爾街與財經媒體圈流傳，由Meta、Anthropic、輝達、谷歌母公司Alphabet、OpenAI與SpaceX組成的「MANGOS」，被視為取代Mag 7的新代表。儘管FAANG、Mag 7等稱號過去熱度都相當高，卻始終不是官方認定的正式產業分類，亦不受交易所或監管機構承認，更深層的意涵其實是市場、法人與媒體描述當前資金高度集中的方式─市場更相信什麼故事，熱錢又會流向何方。
title_zh: Meta、谷歌挺過三世代…芒果股誕生！MANGOS科技新帝國帶來什麼投資機會？
summary_zh: 全球資本市場正經歷一場結構性的深度轉移。過去十年，主導華爾街與全球投資組合的核心力量，是建立在網際網路、軟體服務與消費性電子產品基礎上的科技七巨頭；然而，隨著生成式ＡＩ崛起，市場關注的焦點已逐漸從軟體應用與終端消費，轉向底層算力、能源基建以及低軌道衛星通訊的垂直整合。六月，SpaceX掛牌上市，一個全新的縮寫開始在華爾街與財經媒體圈流傳，由Meta、Anthropic、輝達、谷歌母公司Alphabet、OpenAI與SpaceX組成的「MANGOS」，被視為取代Mag 7的新代表。儘管FAANG、Mag 7等稱號過去熱度都相當高，卻始終不是官方認定的正式產業分類，亦不受交易所或監管機構承認，更深層的意涵其實是市場、法人與媒體描述當前資金高度集中的方式─市場更相信什麼故事，熱錢又會流向何方。
title_en: Meta and Google survive three generations...Mango stocks are born! What investment opportunities does the new MANGOS technology empire bring?
summary_en: The global capital market is undergoing a profound structural shift. In the past decade, the core forces that dominated Wall Street and global investment portfolios were the seven technology giants based on the Internet, software services, and consumer electronics. However, with the rise of generative AI, the focus of the market has gradually shifted from software applications and terminal consumption to the vertical integration of underlying computing power, energy infrastructure, and low-orbit satellite communications. In June, SpaceX went public, and a new abbreviation began to circulate on Wall Street and financial media circles. "MANGOS", composed of Meta, Anthropic, Huida, Google's parent company Alphabet, OpenAI and SpaceX, is regarded as a new representative to replace Mag 7. Although titles such as FAANG and Mag 7 have been quite popular in the past, they have never been officially recognized as a formal industry classification, nor are they recognized by exchanges or regulatory agencies. The deeper meaning is actually the way the market, legal persons and media describe the current high concentration of funds - which stories do the markets believe more and where will the hot money flow?

title_en: Taiwan stock market volatility intensifies, so we should operate with caution and flexibility. The 16 "foreign capital double-biased operations" stocks have advantages
summary_en: High-end selling pressure on Taiwan stocks emerged, and market volatility intensified. Experts pointed out that the difficulty of short-term operations has increased, and it is recommended to be patient and cautious. "Double long operation stocks" such as United Microelectronics (2303), Taishin Shin Kong Gold and other foreign investors have overbought and covered their positions by borrowing bonds to sell. They have chip advantages and indicator significance. They are expected to lead the rise and resist the fall in the future market, acting as a beacon for the bulls.

title_en: The 5th CHEP Cup Archery Competition kicks off. CHEP has long taken root in rural sports to cultivate new archery talents.
summary_en: The 5th CHEP Cup Archery Competition hosted by Taiwan Centralized Depository and Clearing House was held on July 4 at Kaohsiung Municipal Fengxi Junior High School. Nearly a hundred archery players from eight primary and secondary schools across Taiwan gathered to compete. CHEP continues to support the development of rural sports with practical actions through long-term investment in grassroots archery training, cultivating more future stars for Taiwan’s archery movement.

title: 謝金河：台股窗外有藍天，傳產股的逆襲行情
summary: 今年上半年俄羅斯股市下跌十五％，排名跌幅第二，比較意外的是香港恆生指數上半年下跌二七四九．四八，跌幅十．七二％，國企指數也跌十五．二％，對照深圳成分指數今年上漲十九．八％，上證指數小漲三．一八％，港股的顯著下跌很值得探討。今年在香港掛牌的兆易創新、壁仞、智譜、稀宇科技股價都大漲，智譜從一一六．一漲到二九八○港元，成為最亮眼的ＡＩ應用企業，但是過去叱吒風雲的比亞迪、小米、阿里巴巴、美團、百度、京東、快手、嗶哩嗶哩，這些被視為舊科技股，今年股價表現都很慘烈。而大家熟悉的中國旺旺股價一度跌到三．○五港元，康師傅、統一中國股價也頻創新低，尹衍樑賣給阿里巴巴的高鑫零售從十四．三跌到○．八九港元，這個現象也顯示，即使是在Ａ股、Ｈ股以中國為主的市場，也走出完全不同的面向。

title_en: Xie Jinhe: There is a blue sky outside the window of Taiwan stocks, and the counterattack of industry stocks
summary_en: In the first half of this year, the Russian stock market fell by 15%, ranking second in decline. What is more surprising is that the Hang Seng Index in Hong Kong fell by 2,749% in the first half of the year. Forty-eight, a drop of ten. 72%, and the state-owned enterprise index also fell by 15%. 2%, compared with the Shenzhen Component Index which rose by 19% this year. 8%, the Shanghai Composite Index rose slightly by 3. 18%, the significant decline of Hong Kong stocks is worthy of discussion. The share prices of GigaDevice, Biren, Zhipu, and Xiyu Technology listed in Hong Kong this year have all soared. Zhipu has gone from 116. As soon as it rose to HK$2,980, it became the most eye-catching AI application company. However, BYD, Xiaomi, Alibaba, Meituan, Baidu, JD.com, Kuaishou, and Bilibili, which were all-powerful in the past, are regarded as old technology stocks, and their stock price performance this year has been tragic. The stock price of Want Want China, which everyone is familiar with, once fell to 3. ○5 Hong Kong dollars, the stock prices of Master Kong and Uni-President China have also hit new lows frequently, and Sun Art Retail, which Yin Yanliang sold to Alibaba, has increased from 14. Three dropped to ○. HK$89. This phenomenon also shows that even in the markets where A-shares and H-shares are dominated by China, they have taken a completely different direction.

title: 群益金鼎證券進駐高雄啤酒音樂節 實踐普惠金融與在地共榮
summary: 群益金鼎證券（6005）長期積極投入在地參與，持續落實企業社會責任，今(2026)年特別進駐2026高雄啤酒音樂節，將「大型理財學堂」移師至夢時代廣場，不僅成功與南台灣民眾零距離互動，更以「理財享樂全都賺」的創新模式，透過現場ETF知識問答與線上開戶互動體驗，成功將嚴肅的理財觀念轉化為輕鬆的闖關任務，開戶即贈啤酒的特色活動更引發熱烈迴響。此次活動不僅成功縮短了金融服務與年輕族群的距離，更讓金融教育以更輕鬆、貼近生活的方式走入大眾視野，持續實踐普惠金融精神，擴大理財教育的影響力。

title_en: Qunyi Jinding Securities enters Kaohsiung Beer and Music Festival to practice inclusive finance and promote local co-prosperity
summary_en: Qunyi Jinding Securities (6005) has long been actively engaged in local participation and continues to implement corporate social responsibilities. This year (2026), it specially entered the 2026 Kaohsiung Beer Music Festival and moved the "large-scale financial management school" to Dream Times Plaza. It not only successfully connected with the people of Southern Taiwan The zero-distance interaction, and the innovative model of "financial enjoyment and all-earning", through on-site ETF knowledge quizzes and online account opening interactive experience, successfully transformed serious financial management concepts into easy tasks. The special event of free beer when opening an account has aroused enthusiastic responses. This event not only successfully shortened the distance between financial services and young people, but also brought financial education into the public eye in a more relaxed and life-friendly way, continuing to practice the spirit of inclusive finance and expanding the influence of financial education.

title: 凱基證券揭年輕人四大投資話題 串聯 LINE Bank 布局2026下半年
summary: 世足賽進入關鍵賽程，各隊積極排出最佳先發陣容；投資市場邁入2026下半場，投資人同樣也需要重新檢視手中的投資布局名單。凱基證券分析上半年35歲以下客戶的交易行為與數位操作數據，發現AI概念股、主動式ETF、零股定期定額及七月除權息，成為年輕投資人最關注的四大焦點話題。整體趨勢顯示，年輕世代正從追逐單一熱門題材，逐步轉向兼顧成長性、風險分散與長期累積的投資策略，而選定數位原生服務如LINE Bank（連線商業銀行）綁定作為「交割帳戶」，能輕鬆調度資金及實現「自動扣款」，更是簡化投資流程，掌握市場「進球時機」的最佳助攻。

title_en: KGI Securities reveals the four major investment topics for young people and collaborates with LINE Bank to plan for the second half of 2026
summary_en: The World Football Championship has entered a critical schedule, and each team is actively arranging the best starting lineup; the investment market has entered the second half of 2026, and investors also need to re-examine their investment layout lists. KGI Securities analyzed the trading behavior and digital operation data of customers under the age of 35 in the first half of the year and found that AI concept stocks, active ETFs, odd-lot regular quotas and July ex-rights dividends have become the four hot topics that young investors pay most attention to. The overall trend shows that the younger generation is gradually shifting from chasing a single hot topic to an investment strategy that takes into account growth, risk diversification and long-term accumulation. Choosing digital native services such as LINE Bank (line commercial bank) to bind as a "delivery account" can easily allocate funds and realize "automatic deductions". It is also the best assist to simplify the investment process and grasp the market's "scoring opportunities".

title: 國泰證7月投資觀點：AI 行情撐美股、日股四大產業升溫
summary: 隨著6月美國聯邦公開市場委員會（FOMC）落幕，全球市場進入高利率、通膨與地緣政治風險交錯的新階段。Kevin Warsh接任聯準會（Fed）主席後首次會議，市場關注焦點不僅在利率決議，更在於政策溝通方式轉變、通膨預測上修與點陣圖顯示升息風險提高，未來利率波動可能加大。

title_en: Cathay Securities Investment Viewpoint for July: AI market supports the heating up of the four major industries of US stocks and Japanese stocks
summary_en: With the conclusion of the U.S. Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) in June, the global market has entered a new stage where high interest rates, inflation and geopolitical risks are intertwined. At Kevin Warsh's first meeting after taking over as chairman of the Federal Reserve (Fed), the market focused not only on the interest rate decision, but also on changes in policy communication methods, upward revisions to inflation forecasts, and dot plots showing that the risk of interest rate hikes has increased, and interest rate fluctuations may increase in the future.

title: 臺灣璞玉指數逾六成成分股的員工薪資中位數居上市公司前段班
summary: 臺灣指數公司運用近期揭露的2025年度非擔任主管職務之全時員工薪資資訊，分析臺灣璞玉指數最新331檔成分股公司的表現，排除無須申報此項資料之第一上市外國發行人（KY公司）後，299檔成分股公司中，計有188檔的員工中位數薪資水準位居全體上市公司前50% 、屬前段班，占比63%，顯示成分股公司除具備獲利與配息穩定特質外，在薪酬吸引人才上，亦具競爭力，可為營運成長蓄積潛能。

title_en: The median salary of employees of more than 60% of the Taiwan Jade Index’s constituent stocks ranks among the top ranks of listed companies.
summary_en: The Taiwan Index Company used the recently disclosed salary information of full-time employees who are not in supervisory positions in 2025 to analyze the performance of the latest 331 constituent companies of the Taiwan Jade Index. After excluding the first listed foreign issuers (KY companies) that are not required to declare this information, 188 of the 299 constituent companies have median employee salaries that rank in the top 50% of all listed companies. , belongs to the front-end class, accounting for 63%, which shows that in addition to the characteristics of stable profits and dividend distribution, the constituent companies are also competitive in terms of salary to attract talents, and can accumulate potential for operational growth.

title_en: The stock exchange and the Venture Capital Association deepen the link between innovation and capital markets to help innovation board companies expand their visibility
summary_en: In order to enhance the information transparency of companies listed on the Taiwan Innovation Board (tib-Innovation) and expand communication channels between companies and investors, the Taiwan Stock Exchange and the Venture Capital Association held a special event for companies listed on the Innovation Board on July 8, inviting five innovation board companies to present their financial services. The event attracted nearly a hundred participants including investors, innovative companies and investment institutions, and the response was enthusiastic.

summary_en: China Trust Securities continues to focus on sustainable development and corporate social responsibility. It recently held a movie reservation event for "Island of the Sacred Tree" at Taipei Arena Showtime Cinemas, inviting customers to enjoy this documentary depicting the story of Taiwan's mountains and nature guardians, conveying the value of environmental sustainability and land care through local images.

title: 凱基證券率先導入集保財力資料線上傳遞 打造數位投資服務新體驗
summary: 隨著台股表現亮眼，投資人參與市場熱度持續升溫。為回應日益成長的投資需求，凱基證券積極強化數位服務體驗，率先導入由集保結算所推動的「線上傳遞財力資料服務」，成為首批上線的證券業者之一，持續引領業界數位轉型升級。

title_en: KGI Securities takes the lead in introducing online transmission of CHEP financial information to create a new digital investment service experience
summary_en: With the outstanding performance of Taiwanese stocks, investor participation in the market continues to heat up. In response to the growing investment demand, KGI Securities actively strengthens its digital service experience and takes the lead in introducing the "online financial information transmission service" promoted by CHEP, becoming one of the first batch of securities companies to go online, and continues to lead the industry's digital transformation and upgrading.

title: 群益證攜手集保推動 開放證券2.0 打造跨券商一鍵授權財力證明更便利
summary: 隨著開放金融與資料共享趨勢持續推進，群益金鼎證券（6005）7月8日宣布，配合臺灣集中保管結算所推動的「開放證券2.0線上傳遞財力資料服務」，作為首波參與券商之一，正式推出「跨券商資產證明服務」。投資人透過線上授權機制，即可安全傳遞其於其他券商持有的證券資產資料作為財力證明使用，免除傳統紙本與人工申請流程，大幅提升申辦效率與使用便利性。

title_en: Qunyi Securities joins hands with CHEP to promote Open Securities 2.0 and create one-click authorization to prove financial resources across securities firms more conveniently
summary_en: As the trend of open finance and data sharing continues to advance, Qunyi Jinding Securities (6005) announced on July 8 that in conjunction with the "Open Securities 2.0 Online Financial Information Transmission Service" promoted by Taiwan Centralized Custody and Clearing, as one of the first wave of participating brokers, it has officially launched the "Cross-broker Asset Certification Service". Through the online authorization mechanism, investors can securely transfer their securities asset information held with other securities firms for use as proof of financial resources, eliminating the need for traditional paper-based and manual application processes, greatly improving application efficiency and convenience.

title_en: The Port Management Company has fully launched the typhoon prevention deployment. Chairman Zhou Yonghui personally presided over the contingency preparation meeting.
summary_en: In response to the approach of Typhoon Bawei, the Taiwan Port Authority held the "1st Typhoon Preparation Preparation Meeting" in advance today (8). The meeting was personally presided over by Chairman Zhou Yonghui. General Manager Wang Jinrong led relevant port managers and colleagues to participate in the meeting via video conference to gain real-time access to the operating status and preparation progress of all commercial ports in Taiwan, and to comprehensively strengthen flood prevention and typhoon prevention contingency measures. title: 元大證券2026永續生活節 攜手員工與眷屬共創綠色未來
summary: 為持續實踐企業永續發展理念並深化員工關懷，元大證券2026年度家庭日活動於南港瓶蓋工廠、花博圓山公園、台中后里馬場及高雄駁二藝術特區盛大舉辦，共吸引約8,622位員工及眷屬熱情參與。今年家庭日特別以「2026元大永續生活節-綠生活派對，邀你一起FUN」為主題，並且以在地人文、地方創生、永續環境作為核心主軸，希望透過不同城市場域的串聯，讓員工與家屬在歡樂參與之餘，也能更深入認識台灣各地的人文特色與城市故事。

title_en: Yuanta Securities 2026 Sustainable Living Festival joins hands with employees and their families to create a green future
summary_en: In order to continue to implement the company's sustainable development concept and deepen employee care, Yuanta Securities' 2026 Family Day event was held grandly at the Nangang Bottle Cap Factory, Flower Expo Yuanshan Park, Taichung Houli Racecourse and Kaohsiung Pier 2 Art Zone, attracting a total of approximately 8,622 employees and their families to enthusiastically participate. This year's Family Day is specially themed "2026 Yuanta Sustainable Living Festival - Green Life Party, invite you to have fun together", and takes local humanities, local creation, and sustainable environment as the core themes. It is hoped that through the connection of different urban areas, employees and their families can not only participate in joy, but also have a deeper understanding of the humanistic characteristics and urban stories of various parts of Taiwan.

summary: 【財訊快報／劉敏夫】外電報導指出，高盛集團表示，若緊張局勢再度升溫導致荷姆茲海峽航運受阻，中東原油供應復甦腳步或將被拖慢。高盛測算資料顯示，6月波斯灣原油日產量仍較戰前水準低約1,050萬桶。包含Yulia Zhetkova Grigsby在內的高盛分析師發佈研究報告指稱，過去一個月中東產油國雖已逐步重啟關停油井，但荷姆茲海峽航運中斷風險可能放緩原油恢復生產的進度。本週美伊衝突再度升溫，全球能源市場遭遇劇烈震盪，布蘭特原油期貨盤中一度重回每桶80美元上方。美伊連續兩日互相發動襲擊後，荷姆茲海峽通航近乎停滯。此前該航道已發生多起船舶遇襲事件，脆弱的臨時停火協議正經受嚴峻考驗。美國總統川普週三表態，美伊之間的臨時停火協議已經失效，美國同時撤銷允許伊朗原油外銷的豁免許可。不過他補充稱，與伊朗的談判仍有繼續推動的可能。分析師指出，近期多艘油輪遇襲事件凸顯海峽通航風險居高不下，當前停火狀態模糊不清，航運企業或將猶豫是否通行，進而壓制短期荷姆茲海峽原油運量。高盛估算，此前荷姆茲海峽航運恢復至戰前八成以上水準，而接連發生油輪襲擊後，波斯灣原油運輸量已回落至正常運力的七成左右。高盛認為，當前波斯灣原油

title: 美伊協議生變　美股3大指數多收黑
summary: （中央社紐約8日綜合外電報導）美國總統川普稱旨在結束伊朗戰爭的臨時協議「已經結束」，美股3大指數今天多收黑，但博通（Broadcom）帶動近期遭重創的晶片股走高。

title: 產業AI輔導進度超前  經濟部估2028年突破2萬家
summary: （中央社記者曾筠庭台北9日電）經濟部今天表示，去年10月成立「產業競爭力輔導團」，積極協助企業導入AI，截至目前已輔導9249家企業，其中93%為中小企業。產發署長邱求慧指出，原先訂定2028年輔導家數達1.4萬的目標，如今執行進度超前，預期可望突破2萬家。

title: Fed六月會議紀錄曝光！驚見「1大通膨新壓力」：恐被迫再升息
summary: 聯準會（Fed）官員在6月會議上大致有志一同，若今年通膨受中東戰事、關稅或 AI 投資熱潮帶動的強勁需求影響，持續居高不下，就有必要升息。不過周三公布的會議紀錄也顯示，多數官員認為，若通膨壓力能相對快速消退，Fed 可以維持利率不變，甚至最終轉為降息。這份紀錄是主席華許上任後頭一份政策會議紀錄，凸顯經濟前景出現明顯轉折。今年初，官員關注的還是「什麼條件才夠格降息」，如今焦點已轉向「是否需要升息」。

title: PCB族群成「兩極煉獄」　12檔個股有氣無力下跌！三雄強攻上漲也救不了
summary: 台股今（9）日盤中遭多頭空軍突襲，盤中原本在AI概念股與中小型電子股的買盤簇擁下氣勢如虹，加權指數一度勁揚324.99點，衝上46059.40點；豈料好景不常，尾盤買氣後繼無力，瞬間急轉直下，截至12時49分，指數翻黑暫報45633.15點，下跌101.26點，跌幅達0.22%。值得留意的是，昨日全面紅不讓的PCB族群，今日卻明顯失速停滯，即便載板三雄南電（8046）、欣興（3037）、景碩（3189）氣勢如虹一路衝高、甚至南電攻上漲停，也難以拉抬其餘同族群個股跟進走揚。

title: 楊金龍開講3 /  鬆口信用管制「未來某時點鬆綁」 楊金龍坦言房市軟著陸速度太慢
summary: 央行自2024年9月祭出堪稱史上最嚴厲的「第七波選擇性信用管制」以來，房市投機炒作風氣已明顯降溫，但管制政策何時退場、是否傷及無辜換屋族，始終是市場焦點。中央銀行總裁楊金龍今（9）日赴立法院財委會備詢時，面對立委詢問未來是否會放鬆房市管制，首度明確回應「會啊！」，並直言「不會永遠管制下去」。不過，楊金龍並未鬆口具體的時間表。

title: 吸引逾750企業申請 勞動部托育補助申請期限延至9月30日
summary: 勞動部今（115）年度推動企業托育補助新制，事業單位新興建完成或已設置托兒設施，得申請「托兒設施」補助，最高補助金額分別為500萬元及100萬元。如另有提供員工育兒補貼的...…

title: AI量化分析運動動態　楊智偉助選手遠離傷害表現攀巔峰
summary: （中央社新德里7日綜合外電報導）台灣裔美國人第二代的楊智偉在紐約創立科技新創公司，透過人工智慧（AI）技術使量化分析運動動態成為可能，協助使用者遠離運動傷害，並且有依據地修正動作、提升表現。

title: 股房吸金、產業缺血？林岱樺促央行｢引導游資｣挺製造業　楊金龍正面回應
summary: 立法院財政委員會9日邀請中央銀行進行業務報告，立委林岱樺質詢指出，目前台灣游資過度集中於股市及房市，製造業等實體產業資金不足，呼籲央行攜手財政部、經濟部引導資金投入非紅供應鏈及重點產業。同時，她也主張調整房市信用管制措施，保障自住換屋族及財務健全的中小型建商。央行總裁楊金龍表示，將把相關建議帶回研究，並於9月理監事會議研議放寬換屋族限制及檢討高價住宅認定標準。

title: AI真正風險不是泡沫！楊金龍憂：是信用槓桿失控
summary: AI浪潮席捲全球，台股近期在半導體與AI概念股帶動下持續走高，市場資金大量集中於科技族群，股市熱度引發「泡沫化」疑慮。中央銀行總裁楊金龍9日赴立法院財政委員會備詢時表示，AI產業發展方向正確，也具備實質成長動能，但央行真正關注的並非AI產業本身，而是市場信用是否出現過度擴張，若投資人透過借貸、融資等方式放大投資部位，恐成金融穩定最大風險。

title: AI真正風險不是泡沫！楊金龍憂：是信用槓桿失控
summary: AI真正風險不是泡沫！楊金龍憂：是信用槓桿失控

title: 道明證券示警，韓元料難改疲軟趨勢
summary: 【財訊快報／劉敏夫】外電報導指出，道明證券表示，儘管本週SK海力士創紀錄的ADR上市提振了韓元，但鑒於美元整體走強，韓元可能仍將保持疲軟。道明證券策略分析師Howard Du等人在報告中寫道，預計美元將保持堅挺，直到美國經濟數據出現疲軟並導致市場淡化聯準會升息預期。近期走勢表明，韓元任何實質性反彈都只發生在美元整體疲軟的情況下。這份報告指出，淨股票投資組合從韓國流出至美國，這是今年以來令韓元承壓的一個因素，但近幾週來這個趨勢似乎已趨於平穩。這使得韓元在7月得以反彈。報告指出，美元/韓元的1493-1494一線是需要關注的關鍵價位。如果現匯在未來一週繼續維持在該價位上方，預期美元上漲趨勢將持續的投資者應在該價位附近再次買入美元。

title: 路易莎擴大餐飲布局　拚打響白霧時光品牌 (圖)
summary: 餐飲集團朝多品牌發展，路易莎從單一咖啡事業轉型，深化餐飲布局，旗下新品牌「白霧時光」將持續走進全台藝文中心、文化特區、飯店及商場等據點。

title: 楊金龍開講2 / 外資狂提款新台幣走貶 楊金龍力挺「美元發放股利」靠柳樹理論穩匯市
summary: 台灣金融市場迎來7月除權息旺季，外資在領取豐厚股利後的資金去留，成為匯市多空拉鋸的關鍵。面對外資近期在台股累計賣超超過8000億元，並持續大舉匯出資金，導致新台幣兌美元匯率頻頻走貶、甚至跌破32元整數大關，中央銀行總裁楊金龍今（9）日在立法院財政委員會明確表示，外資近期的提款行為「是在停利」，屬於獲利了結的正常資產配置。

title: 千附營收／6月6.6億元、年增200% 半導體廠務、量子電腦出貨雙重挹注
summary: 千附實業（8383）受惠全球AI、高效能運算（HPC）及先進製程持續推升半導體資本支出，帶動半導體建廠工程需求暢旺，加上子公司千附精密（6829）營運穩健成長，6月合併營收6.6億元，月增69%、年增200%，為單月營收歷史次高；累計上半年合併營收24億元、年增55%，創同期新高，營運動能持續增溫。

title: 福貞營收／進入傳統旺季、6月站高崗 上半年突破51億元創同期新高
summary: 福貞-KY（8411）公布6月合併營收9.11億元，月增15.1%、年增7.6%；第2季、上半年合併營收分別為24.62億元、51.88億元，年增率14.6%、19.3%。6月、第2季及上半年合併營收均創歷年同期新高，其中上半年合併營收首度突破51億元大關。

title: 大立光下午法說會　外資目標價搶先看
summary: 光學鏡頭龍頭大立光（3008）即將於9日召開法說會，市場高度期待董事長林恩平對營運前景釋出利多，尤其在折疊手機新機連發及蘋果相關布局下，供應鏈獲利看俏。大立光股價於法說前夕強勢表態，盤中一度衝破4140元大關。法人對後市信心大增，高盛證券更將目標價大幅調升至6231元，加上金控投顧與瑞銀等外資同步喊買，看好大立光在CPO技術布局與手機旺季帶動下，迎來強勁成長動能。投資人應留意法說會釋出的關鍵展望，但仍須審慎評估市場投資風險。

title: 釋兆元活水楊金龍說分明 指AI沒泡沫、信用過度擴張才是問題
summary: 近期市場議論中央銀行釋出新台幣兆元至市場，助長台股活水。央行總裁楊金龍今天(9日)在立法院財政委員會答復立委質詢時澄清，強調央行目前貨幣政策「緊縮」沒有改變。楊金龍也強調AI發展持續向上沒有問題，目前市場信用過度擴張才是央行所擔憂。 台北股市近期雖高檔震盪，但成交量仍維持在新台幣兆元上下，資金熱絡。根據中央銀行統計，去年底定存單未到期餘額為新台幣7兆多元，但近期已下降至6兆多，市場解讀央行上半年釋放資金活水超過1兆元。 央行總裁楊金龍9日在立法院財委會答復立委質詢時進一步說明。楊金龍表示，外界用定存單來解讀央行「放水」1兆，但事實上央行為穩定新台幣匯價，第一季賣匯超過125億美元，財政部稅收放在央行帳戶內也有6,000至7,000 億元，兩者合計約上兆元，等同與定存單釋出的活水抵銷；換言之，央行的貨幣政策至今仍是「緊縮」，若只說釋放1兆元資金活水，可能太過簡化。 對於近期主要股市包括美股、日韓股以及台北股市受惠於AI浪潮，都呈現大幅成長，民進黨立委郭國文指出，人工智慧(AI)熱潮帶來金融市場3大風險，也就是資金集中AI相關產業、外資資金進出對匯市穩定帶來挑戰，以及投資人運用槓桿情況增加

title: 世界前十大富豪新排名 7科技大咖財富都縮水、僅馬斯克暴增居第一
summary:
〔財經頻道／綜合報導〕《富比士》公布最新全球十大富豪名單，截至2026年7月1日，全球十大富豪的總財富為2.951兆美元，比前一月榜單前十名增加了370億美元。


6月，SpaceX上市後，馬...…

title: 楊金龍開講1 /  AI基本面撐腰卻藏K型失衡 楊金龍示警：投資人切勿過度使用槓桿
summary: 台股近期屢創新高，市場熱度居高不下，引發國人對股市是否過熱的疑慮。中央銀行總裁楊金龍今（9）日赴立法院財政委員會進行專題報告並備質詢，面對立委緊盯台股泡沫化風險、產業「K型化」以及資本市場失衡等議題，楊金龍坦言自己並非股市專家，不敢輕易斷言股市沒有過熱，但他強調台股背後有AI基本面支撐。不過，楊金龍也罕見公開呼籲，投資人應維持風險意識，千萬「不要過度運用槓桿」，以防範潛在的金融風險累積。

title: 股市劇烈震盪沒在怕！巴菲特靠「7字名言」破解熊市　不急抄底曝黃金買進時間
summary: [FTNN新聞網]記者張雅茹／綜合報導全球股市上半年的瘋狂漲勢，近期又出現劇烈震盪，短期內股價不易持續上漲，引發投資人恐慌。「股神」巴菲特（WarrenBuffett...

title: 市場愈亂、愈需要判斷力！CLUB21菁英匯培養房仲新世代顧問力
summary: （記者周德瑄／台北報導）在信用管制、房貸政策調整及市場交易回歸理性的環境下，房地產市場正迎來新一輪競爭。當市場 […]

title: 6月營收翻倍創高超預期！美系外資重申喊買鴻勁，目標價直指萬一
summary: 【財訊快報／記者劉居全報導】美系外資在最新出爐的報告中表示，鴻勁(7769)6月營收達53.02億元創新高，年增106%，月增28%，優於預期，2026年第二季營收創下137.94億元的歷史新高，年增101%，季增29%，分別超出美系外資及市場的預期的19%及12%；美系外資重申鴻勁「買進」評等，目標價上看11,000元。美系外資指出，強勁業績主要受惠於冷板產品需求超出預期，以及其主要GPU和ASIC客戶的ATC處理器銷售穩健。隨著銷售結構優化（冷板貢獻率提高）和營運槓桿增強，美系外資認為市場對第二季利潤率的預估還有向上空間。展望未來，隨著員工人數的持續增加和產能逐步提升，預估自2026年第四季起，隨著新收購的工廠投產，產能提升速度將加快，預計鴻勁的季度營收成長將在未來幾季加速。美系外資表示，從長遠來看，對鴻勁成長前景持樂觀態度，尤其在發展多年的AI GPU/ASIC和CPU項目，同時看到鴻勁在CPO業務方面的強勁發展將帶來的成長機會。

title: 楊金龍坦言擔心AI泡沫化　示警注意槓桿是否過度擴張
summary: 近期人工智慧（AI）熱潮帶動台灣股市大幅上揚，中央銀行總裁楊金龍今（9）日面對立委質詢是否擔心AI浪潮走向泡沫化。楊金龍坦言「也是會擔心」，不過他認為AI的動力仍在，所以台灣的電子業才會蓬勃發展，央行須注意的是槓桿是否過度擴張。

title: 台積電發放千億元現金股利！國發基金進帳99億　魏哲家領逾4千萬

title: 全台最大Costco新高雄店開幕，通力電梯打造大型商業空間安全及高效人流
summary: 【財訊快報／記者戴海茜報導】全台最大Costco新高雄店正式開幕，為南台灣最新商業地標，也象徵高雄亞洲新灣區商業發展再添重要里程碑。全球電梯與電扶梯領導品牌通力（KONE）此次參與新高雄店垂直運輸設備建置，展現其在人流密集大型商業場域的人流解決方案實力。台灣Costco會員數突破400萬人，有4家門市躋身全球營收前十大，其中台中南屯店更長年蟬聯全球店王，高密度人流也讓大型量販商場對垂直運輸設備的安全性、穩定性與營運效率提出更高要求。近年大型量販店、購物中心及複合式商業空間快速發展，商場競爭已不再侷限於商品與服務，更延伸至人流管理與整體營運效率。假日大量湧入的消費人潮、親子家庭、購物推車及物流補貨等多元情境，使垂直運輸系統成為大型商業空間營運的重要環節，也更加考驗設備的穩定性與可靠性。通力（台灣）董事總經理劉繼然表示，對大型商業空間而言，電梯與電扶梯早已不只是建築設備，而是串聯人流、提升營運效率與顧客體驗的重要基礎設施。大型商業空間的規劃，也逐漸由「設備配置」轉向「以人流規劃為核心」，透過完善的動線設計、穩定的設備品質及專業維護服務，打造更安全、更高效率的商場營運環境。劉繼然進一步指出，

title_en: <Taiwan Stocks After Market> Flushed up and down 800 points, TSMC Shenlong closed up 255 points but failed to break through the monthly line
summary_en: The Taiwan stock market reached a high of 45837.12 points in early trading, and once fell to 45036.64 points during the session, fluctuating 800 points high and low. However, TSMC came to the rescue in late trading. With the help of 4833 buy orders, the market rose by 255.3 points to close at 45734.41 points, with a trading volume of 958.347 billion yuan.

title_en: Was the "bastard" Brazil beans betrayed? Level 3 quality control failed? Shi Chongliangyun's reforms: Adding third-party compulsory sampling and tracker clauses
summary_en: The carcinogenic oil incident continues to spread, and the Legislative Yuan today (8th) launched a fierce attack and defense on the current food safety inspection system. Legislators questioned the collapse of the current "three-level quality control" system for food safety. The operators found abnormalities in May but chose to hide them. It is obvious that the mechanism that relied on the operators' independent management has failed. Minister of Health and Welfare Shi Chongliang promised to lead the introduction of "third-party compulsory sampling inspection machines".

summary_en: In response to the major food safety incident involving Zoomlion Oil's carcinogen oil, the Executive Yuan and relevant competent authorities are fully investigating the flow of problematic oil products. She criticized the Ministry of Health and Welfare for its slow decision-making and the risk of administrative failure, and read the words of the Commissioner of Food and Drug Administration on the spot.

title_en: The 8th store of Xuji under Xibin opens in Taichung Far Eastern Department Store, challenging the 550 million yuan store
summary_en: The Japanese-style Buffet "Xuji" under Xibin Group (7883) The 8th branch of "Japanese Food Collection" will open at Far Eastern Department Store in Taichung on July 9, and it will also be the first store of Xuji Taichung. Xuji Taichung Dayuan 100 stores occupy an area of 469 square meters and are planned to have 367 seats. Based on the store size and shopping mall crowd conditions, the annual revenue target is estimated to be 550 million yuan. It is expected to become the second highest revenue store in the group and become the "back-of-store" of Xibin Group, second only to "Xian A" located in Taipei 101 with annual revenue of more than 850 million yuan. "Joy" symbolizes that the high-end Parkway layout of Xibin extends from the two north to the core cities in central Taiwan, officially connecting the three major high-end consumer markets in the north, central and south. title_en: Selling one year's worth of goods is not enough to compensate! Zoomlion Oils and Fats was fined 165 million, major shareholder Fushou suffered heavy losses
summary_en: Zoomlion Oils and Fats was fined 165 million yuan by the Ministry of Health and Welfare because the test results of benzene pyrene (BaP), a raw material for soybean oil, did not meet my country's regulatory standards. Fushou (1219), a major shareholder of Zoomlion Oils and Fats, announced today (8) that the company holds 32.33% of the shares of Zoomlion Oils and Fats. If the fine is confirmed, investment losses will be recognized in accordance with IFRS international financial reporting standards. Based on this estimate, Fushou admitted a loss of more than 53.4 million yuan, which was much higher than last year's operating profit of 3.303 million yuan. "Full text..."

summary_en: The recent trend of the Taiwan stock market has been like a roller coaster. It fell sharply one day and rebounded strongly the next day. The violent fluctuations have made many investors feel warm. "Should we enter the market now or wait and see first?" has become one of the questions investors are concerned about. What can you do to hold the band and make profits? Wang Weimin (Boss Lei), who once served as a senior manager of China Trust Corporation and has participated in thousands of over-the-counter company legal briefings, said that as long as you set up your entry and exit strategies and abide by discipline, you don’t have to worry about the ups and downs of the market, and you can magnify your return rate. Nanya opened at 167.5 yuan in early trading and quickly completed the interest rate filling. In the intraday session, large orders were placed, hitting the upper limit of 182 yuan. Formosa Plastics Four Treasures completed the interest rate filling show.

summary_en: In the past two months, the stock price has doubled in the passive component group, and profit-taking selling pressure has emerged. Today (8), two high-priced indicator stocks, Yageo* (2327) and Heshentang (3026), went up and down. Hesentang took advantage of the revenue growth theme in June and went up to the daily limit of 953 yuan. It overtook Yageo* and became the leader of the passive component group. title_en: The chairman of the board of directors said not to pay too much attention to "filling interest rates in seconds". Wistron's ex-dividend show flashed interest rate filling of 30%, and it fell by more than 30% in early trading.
summary_en: Wistron (3231-TW) conducted an ex-dividend transaction today (8th), allocating a cash dividend of 5.5006 yuan per share, and the ex-dividend reference price is 150 yuan. After Wistron opened flat at 150 yuan in early trading today, it once rose to 152 yuan, filling interest rates by more than 30%. However, it later turned negative and fell into a discount.

summary_en: The outside world has recently been concerned about whether Taiwan stock trading hours may be extended from 1:30 pm to 3:30 pm. Financial Supervisory Commission Chairman Peng Jinlong said today that the extension of trading hours will not be implemented for the time being. This is not a priority now and there is no timetable. The market has diverse participants and will not promote things before reaching social consensus. "Full text..."

title_en: <Real Estate> Taipei real estate market H1 transaction volume of 12,000 units bucked the trend and increased by 2.8% year-on-year. Real Estate Agents Association: Core cities have high resilience
summary_en: The number of building transfers in Taipei City in the first half of the year totaled 12,000, bucking the trend and registering an annual increase of more than 2%, which is better than Taoyuan, Taichung and Tainan and other urban areas. Su Jincheng, chairman of the Taipei Real Estate Agents Association, pointed out that this shows that the market does not rely on the support of the housing transfer wave, but is based on stable owner-occupied demand.

title_en: Formosa Plastics Four Treasures Support Tray! Strong stock Nanya exits the market and fills interest rates within seconds. Sinopec’s heavy volume hits the daily limit.
summary_en: Nanya (1303) went ex-dividend on the first day after the disposal ended today (8), marking the finale of the Formosa Plastics Four Treasures ex-dividend show. The allotted cash dividend per share was 0.8 yuan. The ex-dividend reference price today was 165.7 yuan, and it opened at 167.5 yuan. title: 颱風假也要上班！5大苦命行業曝光　逾8成被迫出勤
summary: 強烈颱風巴威逼近台灣，各地是否放颱風假成為民眾關注焦點。不過，對不少上班族而言，即使地方政府宣布停班停課，也未必能真正休假。根據yes123求職網最新「颱風天上工與企業防災調查」顯示，約8成勞工曾在颱風假期間照常出勤，其中超過6成是因公司或主管要求上班。若依產業別分析，大眾傳播與公關廣告、批發零售與貿易、醫護與生技、餐飲住宿與休閒旅遊，以及農林漁牧、礦業與環保生態等五大行業，成為颱風天最難放假的族群。 《詳全文...》

title_en: I still have to work during the typhoon holiday! Five miserable industries exposed: more than 80% are forced to work
summary_en: As Typhoon Bavi approaches Taiwan, whether various places have a typhoon holiday has become the focus of public attention. However, for many office workers, even if the local government announces the suspension of work and classes, they may not be able to truly take a vacation. According to the latest "Survey on Typhoon Skyworkers and Enterprise Disaster Prevention" by yes123 job search website, about 80% of workers have attended work as usual during the typhoon holiday, and more than 60% of them have done so because their companies or supervisors required them to go to work. Analyzed by industry, five major industries, including mass communication and public relations and advertising, wholesale, retail and trade, medical care and biotechnology, catering, accommodation and leisure travel, as well as agriculture, forestry, fishery, animal husbandry, mining and environmental protection and ecology, have become the groups most difficult to take holidays during typhoon days. "Full text..."

title_en: E10 national standard completed! Industry, government and academia call for accelerating the introduction of ethanol gasoline to assist low-carbon transportation and energy resilience
summary_en: With the United Nations Climate Change Conference (COP31) to be held in Turkey in November this year, carbon reduction in the transportation sector has become an important step for Taiwan to move towards the Nationally Determined Contribution (NDC 3.0) goal. The Bureau of Standards and Inspection of the Ministry of Economic Affairs has recently completed the formulation of national standards for E10 alcohol gasoline (CNS 12614, CNS 15109), which also laid an institutional foundation for the future promotion of bio-alcohol blended fuel. "Full text..."

title_en: <Taiwan stocks open> South Asia's daily limit rose more than 300 points, but the monthly line was under pressure and turned black. Backtesting 45,000
summary_en: The four major U.S. stock indexes closed down, with TSMC ADR falling more than 4%. Taiwan stocks showed high-end shocks. They opened at 45524.69 points in early trading and rose to an intraday high of 45837.12 points, an increase of more than 300 points. However, they later fell to 45324.62 points, a drop of more than 100 points. They struggled to return to the monthly line, with an estimated trading volume of 890 billion yuan.

title: 南僑擬提行政救濟！  第一線業者告白：官僚慣性恐遭嚴重後果
summary: 中聯油脂的大豆沙拉油檢出一級致癌物超標事件，今（8）日立法院社會福利及衛生環境委員會一整天圍剿衛福部長石崇良，但石崇良仍認為南僑在5月13日就知道有問題，延誤通報才導致官方應變不及，南僑油脂表示自己並未生產問題產品，將提出行政救濟。

summary: 日本央行近年持續調整貨幣政策、升息至30多年來高點，但日圓卻未見明顯反彈，反而持續走弱，也讓市場掀起一波換匯熱潮。不少投資人開始思考，現在究竟是不是布局日圓的好時機？專家指出，真正左右日圓走勢的，並非升息本身，而是全球資金流向與利差交易，投資人更應關注後續關鍵變數。 《詳全文...》

title_en: The Japanese Yen Is Cheaper Every Day, Raising Interest Rates, but Still Devaluing, Experts Reveal the Truth
summary_en: In recent years, the Bank of Japan has continued to adjust its monetary policy and raise interest rates to more than 30-year highs. However, the yen has not rebounded significantly. Instead, it has continued to weaken, which has also caused a wave of currency swaps in the market. Many investors have begun to think about whether now is a good time to invest in the yen. Experts point out that what really affects the trend of the yen is not the interest rate increase itself, but global capital flows and interest rate trades. Investors should pay more attention to subsequent key variables. "Full text..."

title_en: Should Taiwan stocks chase AI technology stocks due to shock? Experts give answers
summary_en: Taiwan stocks have entered a high level, and market volatility has also intensified. "Should we continue to pursue technology stocks, or should we retreat to the defense of high-dividend products?" has become the focus of investors' recent attention. Securities analyst Cai Minghan pointed out that AI has driven Taiwan stocks to usher in a growth market that has been rare in the past, and high-dividend or bond products have performed relatively defensively in this market. Cross-border products that have both "semiconductor growth" and "high dividend yield" are the most balanced answer to the current market. "Full text..."

summary_en: Asian stocks suffered a bloodbath yesterday (7th), and Taiwanese stocks also fell more than a thousand points. In response, Xie Jinhe, chairman of Caixin Media, bluntly said that this stock market correction is not due to the collapse of AI, but to the pressure of deleveraging. Since June, he has seen South Korean investors going all out to leverage, and he believes that "something big will happen." Now the leverage break has brought backlash, and "the whole world is accompanying South Korea to deleverage." "Full text..."

title_en: Exclusive/Taiwan stock market will undergo three major reforms next year! Qianjin stocks are priced at 1 yuan per round, regardless of fractions, and odd-lot matching is shortened to 1 second.
summary_en: High-priced thousand-dollar stocks have flourished in recent years. In order to lower investment thresholds, reduce retail investor price differences, and implement inclusive finance, the latest research directions of the Taiwan Stock Exchange and the Securities Dealers Association have been released. Taiwan stocks will usher in two major new heavyweight systems. The most watched "qianjin stocks (high-priced stocks above a thousand yuan)" will rise. "Reducing the unit (Tick) to 1 yuan" will be officially launched in July next year, and will be fully implemented simultaneously regardless of whole shares or odd lots; at the same time, the matching time for intraday odd lot transactions will also be significantly shortened from the current 5 seconds to 1 second, allowing petty bourgeoisie to trade high-priced stocks with a more "seismic-resistant" effect.

title_en: Taiwan stocks closed/up 255 points to close at 45,734 points, TSMC closed at 2,465 yuan, up 1.02%
summary_en: Taiwan stocks fluctuated higher on the 8th, with the weighted index closing at 45,734.41 points, up 255.3 points, or 0.56%, with a trading volume of 958.3 billion yuan. Taiwan stocks opened at 45,524.69 points on the 8th, with an intraday high of 45,837.12 points and a low of 45,036.64 points. There were more declines than gains on the market, with 431 stocks rising and 665 stocks falling; 17 stocks were trading at the daily limit and 4 stocks were trading at the daily limit. In terms of weight stocks, TSMC (2330) closed at 2,465 yuan, up 25 yuan, or 1.02%, with a trading volume of 23,216 yuan; the intraday high was 2,465 yuan and the lowest was 2,420 yuan. In terms of market groups, semiconductor stocks rose 0.66%, financial stocks rose 1.56%, electronic components rose 0.51%, and computer peripherals rose 0.45%; other electronics fell 1.22%, and Netcom fell 1.92%. In terms of individual stock performance, UMC (2303) rose 6.88%, MediaTek (2454) fell 0.86%, Delta Electronics (2308) fell 0.26%, and Hon Hai (2317) rose 0.21%. (This article is about AI human-machine collaboration. The correct data is subject to the competent authority.)

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Lu Yanci, Taipei, 8th) The Supervisory Yuan investigation report showed that as of March this year, there were as many as 2,897 new Qing’an loans resold, and some of the borrowers were students without financial resources, which attracted the attention of legislators. Finance Minister Zhuang Cuiyun emphasized today that Xinqingan is limited to one loan in a lifetime, and the government has never slackened on owner-occupancy inspections.

title_en: ASE’s production expansion is soaring, and the re-rating market can be expected! Bank of America targets price as high as 750 yuan
summary_en: ASE (3711) has accelerated its production expansion pace across the board. The latest report from foreign investment Bank of America Securities pointed out that thanks to the strong demand for AI and the expansion of fab outsourcing trends, ASE has demonstrated strong capital expenditure execution capabilities this year. Therefore, it maintains its "buy" rating and target price of 750 yuan for ASE. It is currently the highest price in the foreign investment circle and is expected to usher in a new wave of re-rating.

summary: 台股今（8）日開高後陷入震盪，高低震盪幅度約800點，不過散戶仍勇於進場撿便宜。盤中成交量前五大有二檔都是ETF，包括群益臺灣加權正2（00685L）逾41萬張排名第一，主動統一升級50（00403A）逾23萬張排名第五。其他個股包括群創（3481）逾40萬張排名第二，中石化逾29萬張排名第三，友達（2409）逾25萬張排名第四。
