title_en: The Taiwan stock market is in turmoil as retail investors rush to pick up ETFs. The top five stocks in terms of odd-lot trading are among the top 4 ETFs in terms of single-stock trading.
summary_en: Taiwan stocks opened higher today (8th) and fell into shock, with a range of about 800 points. However, retail investors still dared to enter the market to take advantage of the situation. Two of the top five stocks by intraday trading volume are ETFs, including Qunyi Taiwan Weighted Positive 2 (00685L), which ranks first with more than 410,000 shares, and Active Unified Upgrade 50 (00403A), which ranks fifth with more than 230,000 shares. Other stocks include Innolux (3481), which ranked second with more than 400,000 shares, Sinopec, which ranked third with more than 290,000 shares, and AUO (2409), which ranked fourth with more than 250,000 shares.

summary_en: Acer Chuangda (7706), a human resources solution and service provider under the Acer (2353) Group, announced its revenue. The consolidated revenue in June 2026 was 56.79 million yuan, an annual increase of 31.9%; the cumulative consolidated revenue in the first half of the year was 336 million yuan, an annual increase of 35.3%, both hitting a record high in the same period since its establishment.

summary: 融程電（3416）公布2026年6月營收達4.15億元，月增11.8%，年增24.3%，創單月歷史新高紀錄，國防軍工接單強勁帶動全新上升循環。累計2026年1至6月營收為21.23億元，年增30.4%，改寫歷史新高，主要受惠於國防軍工及邊緣 AI 雙引擎驅動，預期全年營運雙位數成長。

title_en: Rongcheng Electric’s revenue/415 million yuan in June, a monthly increase of 11.8%, a record high in a single month
summary_en: Rongcheng Electric (3416) announced that its revenue in June 2026 reached 415 million yuan, with a monthly increase of 11.8% and an annual increase of 24.3%, setting a record high in a single month. Strong orders for the national defense and military industry have driven a new upward cycle. Cumulative revenue from January to June 2026 was 2.123 billion yuan, an annual increase of 30.4%, setting a new historical high. Mainly driven by the dual engines of national defense and military industry and edge AI, double-digit growth in full-year operations is expected.

title_en: Qunyi Certificate Profit/Net profit after tax in the first half of the year tripled to 8.43 billion yuan, exceeding last year’s full year
summary_en: Qunyi Jinding Securities (6005) self-settled that the consolidated pre-tax net profit in June was 1.26 billion yuan, and the after-tax net profit was 930 million yuan. The cumulative consolidated pre-tax net profit in the first half of the year was 9.54 billion yuan, and the after-tax net profit was 8.43 billion yuan. The annual growth rate reached 318%, and the after-tax net profit per share (EPS) was approximately 3.6 yuan.

title_en: Whistleblowers who delay reporting will be fined. Nanqiao issued a serious message: Apply for administrative remedies in accordance with the law.
summary_en: The incident of Zoomlion Oil’s soybean salad oil being found to contain excessive levels of level 1 carcinogens continues to spread. In addition to Zoomlion Oil being fined NT$165.2 million by the Ministry of Health and Welfare, local governments are also simultaneously holding relevant operators accountable. Among them, Nan Qiao, who served as the whistleblower, was also fined NT$3 million by the Taipei City Health Bureau for delaying reporting. In response, Nan Chiau issued a major statement clarifying that the problematic samples were reserved samples, but the oil already in the tank tested normal and it was not notified to the competent authority at that time.

title_en: The low-level investment artifact of "Fourth Legal Person" is here! 10 Taiwanese stock ETFs Q3 stooping to pick up diamonds
summary_en: The weighted index was affected by the pressure on U.S. stocks, and the market fluctuated sideways. Looking forward to the third quarter, the investment trust legal person said that Taiwan stocks are diverging, financing balances are soaring, and the number of open short positions of foreign investors has hit a high. The market trend in July has become volatile, but it is not a systemic risk, but a verification period for the performance of individual companies. It is expected that blue chip stocks will still be bullish in 2027. Chapter 1 If the stock price pulls back in the third quarter, it will provide medium and long-term investors with a good opportunity to buy low. It is recommended that in addition to selecting blue-chip stocks, they can also target Taiwan stock ETFs with a scale of more than 10 billion yuan and a growing number of beneficial ownership units this year. Through the current market turmoil, they will be stuck in batches, which is equivalent to bending down to pick up diamonds. Holding them in the medium and long term will help increase the winning rate and increase investment returns.

summary: 零股交易將再有新制！據透露，證交所已預定在明年7月上路的零股交易第二階段，將「千金股」的零股交易價格，從每5元改為每1元為變動單位，這將是國內「千金股」交易具有里程意義的突破，此外，證交所預定在今年底將零股交易時間從9點10分提前到9點開盤的第一階段新制，上路日期暫訂為12月7日，特別選周一日期作新制的開始。

title_en: A major breakthrough! The price of odd shares of "Qianjin Stock" will drop from 5 yuan to 1 yuan in July next year.
summary_en: There will be a new system for odd lot trading! According to reports, the stock exchange has scheduled the second phase of odd lot trading to be launched in July next year. It will change the trading price of "thousand gold shares" from every 5 yuan to every 1 yuan. This will be a landmark breakthrough for domestic "thousand gold stock" trading. In addition, the stock exchange is scheduled to advance the odd lot trading time from 9:10 to 9:00 at the end of this year. The first phase of the new system will be launched. The launch date is tentatively set for December 7, and a Monday date is specifically chosen as the start of the new system.

Taipower said today that it has mobilized a total of 7,316 manpower, 3,325 vehicles, and 6,634 various machines in the power supply, power generation, and distribution systems. Economic Minister Gong Mingxin called on local governments to implement flood prevention preparations such as clearing ditches and pre-emptying flood detention ponds.

It will fully supply network switches dedicated to data exchange nodes. The shipments will be in September this year, and the estimated shipment volume in one year will reach 20,000 units.

title_en: UAV exports exploded in the first five months, with annual growth of 20 times. Thunder Tiger and Evergreen Aerospace both hit new highs.
summary_en: On the 3rd, the Legislative Yuan submitted the Executive Yuan’s, KMT’s, and People’s Party’s draft drone bills to the three committees of Economy, Foreign Affairs, National Defense, and Finance for review. The legal person believes that no matter which version is used as the main basis, the domestic drone industry supply chain is expected to benefit substantially. UAV concept stocks made a strong statement, with Evergreen Aerospace and Thunder Tiger both hitting record highs. Among them, Evergreen Aerospace was locked at the daily limit, China Optoelectronics rose more than 5% during the session, and Hecheng also hit a new high in the band.

As artificial intelligence, asset tokenization and digital finance continue to develop, the financial innovation industry is expected to usher in more development opportunities.

The salad oil items used by the group have been found to be safe.

title_en: Shunda's revenue is bright. Foreign investors are calling for a target price of 800 yuan. The stock price has soared and reached its limit. More than 9,000 buying orders are waiting in the queue.
summary_en: Battery module factory Shunda's revenue in June was 1.26 billion yuan, reaching the highest level this year. For the first time, American foreign investors included Shunda as a tracking stock and gave it a buy rating with a target price of 800 yuan. After opening high on the 8th, the stock price quickly hit the upper limit of 427.5 yuan and was locked. More than 9,000 buy orders were queued up at the daily limit and market price. Among the BBU group, Xin Shengli also raised its daily limit.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Jiang Mingyan, Taipei, 8th) US stocks closed in the dark, and Taiwanese stocks rose more than 350 points in early trading today, returning to the monthly line, and then fell into the black and fluctuated. Weight stocks such as TSMC and Yageo rose slightly, and UMC surged by more than 6%; PCB groups such as the carrier board trio and CCL trio rebounded, and drone concept stocks continued to strengthen.

title: 零股交易撮合時間5秒縮短至1秒　明年7月上路
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北8日電）金管會持續檢討市場交易制度，立委關切零股撮合時間是否可以從5秒鐘縮短到1秒。證交所董事長林修銘今天表示，考量券商系統穩定性等因素，零股交易撮合時間規劃從目前5秒縮短為1秒，預計明年7月上路。

title_en: Odd lot transaction matching time shortened from 5 seconds to 1 second, will be launched in July next year
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 8th) The Financial Supervisory Commission continues to review the market trading system, and legislators are concerned about whether the odd lot matching time can be shortened from 5 seconds to 1 second. Lin Xiuming, chairman of the stock exchange, said today that taking into account factors such as the stability of the brokerage system, the odd-lot transaction matching time is planned to be shortened from the current 5 seconds to 1 second, and is expected to be launched in July next year.

At the first meeting of the Federal Reserve (Fed) after Bush took over as chairman, the market focused not only on the interest rate decision, but also on changes in policy communication methods, an upward revision of inflation forecasts, and the dot plot showed that the risk of interest rate hikes increased, and interest rate fluctuations may increase in the future.

summary_en: EVA Air issued an ex-dividend cash dividend of 2 yuan on the 8th, but fell into the dilemma of discount interest. The intraday high only rose to 41.95 yuan, failing to return to yesterday's closing price of 42.4 yuan. However, EVA Air General Manager Sun Jiaming continues to be optimistic about the freight market. Sun Jiaming pointed out that the demand for urgent orders in the air cargo market has increased significantly, and the urgent unit price "has no maximum, only higher." Starting from July, NT$300 per kilogram has become the new normal.

title_en: Who is still holding on after the Taiwan stock market crashed 800 points? ABF carrier board's four heroes come back to counterattack, Nandian and Jingshuo soar to the limit
summary_en: U.S. stock prices fell more than 4%, TSMC (2330) ADR plummeted, Taiwan stocks fluctuated violently by more than 800 points on the 8th, and the 45K level alarm sounded for a time. At the critical moment, the four ABF carrier boards Xinxing (3037), Nandian (8046), Jingshuo (3189), and Zhending-KY (4958) came back to fight against the shortcomings, and together they contributed about 60 points to the market's gain during the session. Among them, Nandian and Jingshuo both hit their daily limits, and Zhending also rose by more than 5%, becoming the strongest supporter for bulls and the focus of attracting gold.

title_en: The ex-dividend show of UMC, which is under disposal, is eye-catching. Interest rates are filled in seconds as soon as the market opens.
summary_en: UMC was listed as a disposal stock by the stock exchange. The disposal period started from July 2 to July 15. It went ex-dividend on the 8th and distributed 2.60808262 yuan per share. It opened at 156 yuan in early trading. The interest rate was filled in seconds as soon as the market opened. Although it once turned black during the session, it then rose and turned red. The ex-dividend show was eye-catching.

It was temporarily quoted at 633 yuan, an increase of 46 yuan, or 7.84%. With the blessing of yesterday's Goldman Sachs report, foreign investors also turned from overselling to overbuying.

title_en: Is Taiwan stock market squeezing out banking industry lending? Financial Supervisory Commission: Closely control changes in funds
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, Taiwan, 8th) Trading in Taiwan’s stock market is booming. Legislators are concerned about the significant decline in the unexpired balance of the central bank’s time deposit certificates, the increase in market liquidity, and how to allow funds to flow to the real economy. Peng Jinlong, chairman of the Financial Supervisory Commission, said that changes in funds were closely controlled. During this period, bank deposits increased significantly and loans rose simultaneously, but most of the loans were inflows to enterprises. The Financial Supervisory Commission maintained close contact with the central bank.

summary: 零股交易將有二項重大變革！立法院財政委員會今（8）日質詢時，朝野立委關切盤中零股交易制度優化進度，台灣證券交易所董事長林修銘表示，今年底前將完成盤中零股交易開盤時間調整，零股交易將由現行上午9時10分提前至上午9時，與整股同步交易時間，並將於明年7月實施零股買賣撮合時間由5秒縮短至1秒。

title_en: Odd lot transactions will be carried out earlier and the matching time will be shortened! Lin Xiuming, chairman of the stock exchange, revealed the implementation time point
summary_en: There will be two major changes in odd lot trading! During the Legislative Yuan Finance Committee's inquiry today (8th), the ruling and opposition legislators were concerned about the progress of optimizing the intraday odd-lot trading system. Lin Xiuming, chairman of the Taiwan Stock Exchange, said that the adjustment to the opening time of intraday odd-lot trading will be completed by the end of this year. Odd-lot trading will be advanced from the current 9:10 a.m. to 9:00 a.m., synchronizing with the trading time of whole stocks, and the odd-lot buying and selling matching time will be shortened from 5 seconds to 1 second in July next year.

Nanya also exited from disposal stocks today, and the trading volume increased to 80,000.

title_en: Peng Jinlong: The extension of trading hours for Taiwan stocks will not be implemented for the time being. It is not a priority now
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 8th) The outside world has recently been concerned about whether Taiwan stock trading hours may be extended from 1:30 pm to 3:30 pm. Financial Supervisory Commission Chairman Peng Jinlong said today that the extension of trading hours will not be implemented for the time being. This is not a current priority and there is no timetable. The market has diverse participants and will not promote things before reaching social consensus.

It is not a priority and there is no timetable for extending the trading hours.

With the three major themes of "Technological Water, Resilient Water, and Clean Water", it will showcase water resources management and technology to improve water supply resilience, reduce operational risks, and strengthen production efficiency and international competitiveness. The exhibition is open for online pre-registration from now on. The Trade Association sincerely invites domestic and foreign industry players to register in advance to jointly grasp the new business opportunities of industrial water transformation. title_en: Stock Exchange: The opening trading time for odd lots will be advanced to 9:00 and will be launched before the end of this year
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 8th) The current opening time of Taiwan stocks’ odd-lot trading is 9:10 am, which is different from the 9:00 opening of the whole stock market. Legislators are concerned about why the adjustment of trading time will not take effect until July next year. Lin Xiuming, chairman of the stock exchange, said today that the opening of odd-lot trading will be brought forward to 9 a.m., and it will be implemented before the end of this year.

summary_en: Legislators paid attention to issues such as extended trading and odd-lot trading in the stock market at today's Finance Committee meeting. Among them, regarding the advancement of the odd-lot trading time, Lin Xiuming, chairman of the stock exchange, pointed out in response to legislator Guo Guowen's question that it has been determined that the new system, which will advance the odd-lot trading time to 9 o'clock and be consistent with the whole stock, will be on the road by the end of this year.

title_en: TSMC announces gross profit margin; foreign media predicts it may decline in the future
summary_en: The market is paying attention to the fact that TSMC will hold a press conference on the 16th. TSMC announced that its gross profit margin will rise to 66.2% in the first quarter of 2026, an increase of 3.9 percentage points from the previous quarter, which is better than the upper edge of the company's original forecast range. It is estimated that the gross profit margin in the second quarter is expected to further increase to 66.5%. According to foreign media analysis, as the 2nm process enters mass production and overseas wafer fabs continue to expand, profitability will still face certain pressure in the second half of the year and may decline. "Full text..."

title: 晨暉營收／6月3.36億、年增3.5倍 三大業務齊發+法規紅利助功
summary: 晨暉（1271）8日公告6月營收3.36億元，年增356.81%。公司表示，5月營收受惠美國好市多促銷活動帶動出貨，墊高單月基期，6月營收雖較上月回落，整體表現仍符合公司預期。隨著保健原料、品牌產品與通路業務同步推進，未來單月營收有望維持在2.5億元以上，並隨新品導入、國際客戶拉貨及品牌通路放大逐步向上。
title_zh: 晨暉營收／6月3.36億、年增3.5倍 三大業務齊發+法規紅利助功
summary_zh: 晨暉（1271）8日公告6月營收3.36億元，年增356.81%。公司表示，5月營收受惠美國好市多促銷活動帶動出貨，墊高單月基期，6月營收雖較上月回落，整體表現仍符合公司預期。隨著保健原料、品牌產品與通路業務同步推進，未來單月營收有望維持在2.5億元以上，並隨新品導入、國際客戶拉貨及品牌通路放大逐步向上。
title_en: Chenhui’s revenue/June was 336 million, an annual increase of 3.5 times. Three major businesses were simultaneously launched + regulatory bonuses helped.
summary_en: Chenhui (1271) announced on the 8th that its June revenue was 336 million yuan, an annual increase of 356.81%. The company said that its revenue in May benefited from Costco's promotional activities in the United States, which boosted shipments and boosted the single-month base period. Although revenue in June fell from the previous month, the overall performance was still in line with the company's expectations. With the simultaneous advancement of health-care raw materials, brand products and channel business, future single-month revenue is expected to remain above 250 million yuan, and will gradually increase with the introduction of new products, international customers and the expansion of brand channels.

title_en: The US-Eastern freight rate has been reduced by 10%, and the US-Western ratio has been reduced by 37%. JOC estimates that the price increase at the beginning of the month may be the final glory.
summary_en: The person in charge of the super-large cargo company pointed out that the freight rates raised on the U.S. line on the 1st of this month began to loosen on the third day of launch, and were further reduced yesterday (7th), with each large box (40-foot container) on the U.S. East Line priced at US$9,000. The freight rate was reduced by US$200 last Friday and by another US$700 yesterday. It was revised down twice within a week and has dropped to US$8,100, a decrease of 10%; the price of the US-Western Line has dropped by as much as 36.67%. "Full text..."

title_en: Baorui’s revenue/June was 2.3 billion yuan, a monthly increase of 8.67%, an annual increase of 39.22%, and the single-month revenue set a new record high
summary_en: Baorui (6472) announced on the 8th that its consolidated revenue in June reached 2.29 billion yuan, a monthly increase of 8.67% and an annual increase of 39.22%. The single-month revenue set a record high; the cumulative consolidated revenue in the first half of this year was 9.89 billion yuan, and the annual decrease has converged to 1.14%. The company expects to correct in the second half of the year and return to the annual growth track.

title_en: ADATA's public acquisition, Liuyuan lights up and reaches daily limit
summary_en: The board of directors of ADATA (3260) decided to publicly acquire ordinary shares of Liuyuan (9949) at a cash price of 24 yuan per share. The estimated number of acquisitions is 10,000 to 25,000 shares, accounting for 22.29% to 55.73% of the total issued shares of Liuyuan. The public acquisition period is from July 8 to July 27, 2020. If the number of participants to be sold reaches the minimum acquisition amount, the conditions for this public acquisition will be achieved.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Jiang Mingyan, Taipei, 8th) U.S. stocks closed in the dark, AI technology stocks were weak, and TSMC ADR fell more than 4%; the Taiwan Stock Exchange Weighted Index ended at 1,077.28 points on the 7th, the eighth largest single-day drop in history. According to investment advisory analysis, Taiwan stocks fell below the monthly line, and the strength of the downward support remains to be seen. The index is expected to fluctuate between 45,000 points and 47,500 points this week. Pay attention to the legal meetings of heavyweight companies.

title: 7月8日盤前／AI 雜音未散、中東再添變數 台股震盪拚守45000
summary:
昨日盤勢
費半指數一掃上周陰霾，週一上漲逾2%，激勵台股週二早盤開高，惟5日線之上高檔追價意願薄弱，加上韓股重挫拖累，11點之後賣壓湧現。儘管金融股凱基金、國泰金逆勢拉抬欲撐住指數，但終場仍不敵賣壓，加權指數呈現開高低失守月線。受惠下週生技展題材的生技族群成為盤面資金的避風港表現亮眼，權權值股方面，台積電下跌0.81%，鴻海下跌2.07%，聯發科下跌1.71%，廣達下跌1.32%，台達電下跌5.26%。
盤面強勢股，康霈*、捷敏-KY、長聖、百徽、建碁、共信-KY、泰宗、瑞祺電通、圓祥生技、營邦、漢康-KY創、金穎生技等漲停；蔚華科、禾榮科、能率網通、矽創、聚隆等漲幅6%以上；盤面弱勢股，國巨*、南亞、中光電、環球晶、信昌電、景碩、欣銓、中華化等共46檔跌停；晶宏、長興、京元電子、矽力*-KY、朋程、鈦昇、偉詮電、力山等跌幅9%以上。
終場台灣加權指數下跌1077.28點，以45479.11點作收，成交量為1.17兆元。觀察盤面變化，三大類股漲跌互見，電子下跌2.59%、傳產下跌2.64%、金融上漲1.15%。在次族群部份，以生技醫療、化學生技醫療表現較佳，分別上漲3.41%、0.78

title_en: Pre-market on July 8/AI Noise lingers, the Middle East adds another variable, Taiwan stocks fluctuate and hold on to 45,000
summary_en:
Yesterday's market trend
The Feihan Index swept away the gloom of last week and rose by more than 2% on Monday, encouraging Taiwan stocks to open higher in early trading on Tuesday. However, the willingness to pursue high-end prices above the 5-day line was weak, coupled with the heavy decline of Korean stocks, and selling pressure emerged after 11 o'clock. Although financial stocks Kai Fund and Cathay Gold bucked the trend and tried to support the index, they were still defeated by the selling pressure in the end, and the weighted index showed an opening high and fell below the monthly line. Benefiting from next week's biotechnology exhibition, the biotech community has become a safe haven for market funds and performed well. In terms of value stocks, TSMC fell 0.81%, Hon Hai fell 2.07%, MediaTek fell 1.71%, Quanta fell 1.32%, and Delta fell 5.26%.
Strong stocks on the market, such as Kangpei*, Jimin-KY, Changsheng, Baihui, Aopen, Gongxin-KY, Taizong, Ruiqi Dentsu, Yuanxiang Biotechnology, Yingbang, Hankang-KY Chuang, Jinying Biotechnology, etc., rose by 6%; Weihuake, Herongke, Nengsu Netcom, Sichuang, Julong, etc. increased by 6 More than %; the weak stocks on the market, including Yageo*, Nanya, China Optoelectronics, Global Crystal, Xinchang Electronics, Jingshuo, Xinquan, and Sinochem, etc., fell by the limit in 46 levels; Jinghong, Changxing, KYEC Electronics, Silicon Power*-KY, Pengcheng, Titanium, Weiquan Electronics, Lishan, etc. fell more than 9%.
At the end, the Taiwan Weighted Index fell 1,077.28 points to close at 45,479.11 points, with a trading volume of 1.17 trillion yuan. Observing changes in the market, the three major categories of stocks had mixed gains and losses, with Electronics falling 2.59%, Transcendence falling 2.64%, and Financials rising 1.15%. Among sub-groups, biotech medical care and chemical biotech medical care performed better, with increases of 3.41% and 0.78 respectively.

title: 理財最前線／換了滿手日圓別只放銀行　專家教戰讓外幣長大
summary: 今年金融市場最熱門的2個詞彙，一個是「AI」，另一個則是「日圓」。股市因AI一路創高，日圓卻連連探低，吸引大批喜歡赴日的台灣民眾搶換匯。但換到甜甜價只是開始，真正的問題在於：這筆日圓接下來該放哪裡？面對匯率仍可能持續波動，除了放在外幣帳戶等待升值，是否還有兼顧資產累積與保障功能的配置方式，也成為近期市場熱議話題。

title: 日圓放大術1／日圓天天都便宜　專家點破升息仍止不住貶值真相
summary: 日本央行近年持續調整貨幣政策、升息至30多年來高點，但日圓卻未見明顯反彈，反而持續走弱，也讓市場掀起一波換匯熱潮。不少投資人開始思考，現在究竟是不是布局日圓的好時機？專家指出，真正左右日圓走勢的，並非升息本身，而是全球資金流向與利差交易，投資人更應關注後續關鍵變數。

title: 日圓放大術2／換了日圓別只放外幣帳戶　等待升值期間的資金活化術曝光
summary: 日圓跌至多年低點，不少人開始思考是否應該進場換匯，等待未來升值；而手上本來就滿手日圓的民眾，則苦惱該怎麼有效放大報酬。其實匯率何時反轉沒人能預測，若只是將日圓放在外幣帳戶，等待期間幾乎沒有太多收益；若投入日股或日本基金，又得承擔市場波動風險。對於希望穩健布局日圓資產的人而言，還有什麼方法可運用？

title: 日圓放大術3／宣告利率3%的日圓保單值得買？　專家點名3類人最適合布局
summary: 日圓跌至多年低點，加上新台幣兌日圓匯價維持相對有利的位置，讓不少人開始思考是否趁機布局日圓資產。近期市場推出日圓計價保單，吸引不少保守型投資人關注。不過，專家提醒，這類商品最大的優勢並非短線獲利，而是長期持有下兼顧保障、利率與資產配置；若忽略流動性限制，只期待匯率快速反彈，恐將失去保單的真正價值。

summary: 1960年創業，成立超過一甲子的奇美實業，不僅是全球最大的ABS樹脂供應商，在台灣石化業與台塑集團齊名外，更是知名的幸福企業，今年5月，奇美創辦人許文龍獨子許家彰，從堂叔許春華手中接下千億集團的董座大位，最近已忙著到處巡廠，這位過去鮮少在媒體前曝光的新任掌門人，談起未來，蓄勢待發。

summary: 27年前，奇美創辦人許文龍在日本頒獎台上的一席話，讓在台下的兒子大受震撼，也立下了奇美「Clean and green」的定義，奇美新任董事長許家彰聊起奇美集團當前的強項，就源自於對環保的初心。

title: 奇美神祕新掌門2／近30年前霸氣拍桌　奇美幸福企業源自創辦人的這場任性
summary: 「我父親分秒必爭地工作，就是為了趕快去釣魚！」奇美實業董事長許家彰提到父親、奇美創辦人許文龍時總是笑容滿面，「我跟父親最大的不同，就是沒辦法工作兩天、釣魚五天啦！他真的超厲害的！」

title: 奇美神祕新掌門3／每天被許文龍逼練小提琴　許家彰：小時折磨成一生精神資產
summary: 提到奇美創辦人許文龍，外界常想到的是繪畫、小提琴和釣魚，但對於許文龍的兒子、今年62歲的許家彰來說，意義完全不同。

title_en: Popular stocks》Foreign investors bought 7 consecutive stocks, Kai Fund successfully paid interest
summary_en:
The Taiwan stock market staged a furious market yesterday, with the weighted index opening higher and lower, ending with a drop of more than a thousand points. However, financial stocks bucked the trend and rose. Among them, Kai Fund (2883), which continued to make new highs in profits in the first five months, and Wuwei Investment, which has reached a record high for the first time in a row. It has been oversold for 8 trading days, benefiting from the massive buying force of foreign investors. It closed at 30.1 yuan yesterday, up 1.1 yuan, with a trading volume of more than 125,000 contracts. Kai Fund, which went ex-dividend on June 30, successfully filled the interest rate yesterday.

Kai Fund benefited from Taiwan stock weighting in May...

summary_en:

Global AI demand and computing power competition continue. As cloud service providers (CSPs) increase capital expenditures, Taiwan and South Korea are reaping AI dividends, driving the Taiwan and South Korea stock markets to surge. However, China, known as the "world's factory", seems to have not reaped many dividends from this wave of AI boom. summary_en: Semiconductor major Onsemi (ON-US) announced on Tuesday (7th) that it will sell two chip manufacturing facilities in the Philippines and the United States as part of a drive to cut costs and improve profitability. After the news was announced, ON Semiconductor's stock price fell more than 3% in pre-market trading on Tuesday, but its cumulative gain this year is still close to 75%.

title_en: Baguan's revenue in June increased by 40.14% year-on-year, and both Q2 and H1 revenue hit new highs in the same period.
summary_en: Baguan announced that its revenue in June this year was 308 million yuan, a monthly decrease of 8.69%, and an annual increase of 40.14%. The cumulative second quarter revenue reached 995 million yuan, an annual increase of 40.61%. The consolidated revenue in the first half of the year reached 1.912 billion yuan, an annual increase of 28.64%. The revenue in June, the second quarter and the first half of the year simultaneously hit a record high in the same period in history.

title: 英特爾調漲CPU售價 童子賢：需求熱絡導致缺貨 漲價不必過度擔憂
summary: 英特爾證實調漲部分消費級與伺服器級的 CPU 售價，和碩董事長童子賢今 (7) 日針對此事指出，近期許多關鍵材料陸續漲價，主因為市場需求熱絡導致缺貨，進一步調漲價格是市場常態，認為不必過度擔憂。
title_zh: 英特爾調漲CPU售價 童子賢：需求熱絡導致缺貨 漲價不必過度擔憂

title_en: Intel raises CPU prices. Tong Zixian: Strong demand has led to shortages. Don’t worry too much about price increases.
summary_en: Intel confirmed that it has increased the prices of some consumer-grade and server-grade CPUs. Pegatron Chairman Tong Zixianjin pointed out on the 7th that many key materials have been increasing in price recently, mainly due to shortages due to strong market demand. Further price increases are the norm in the market, and he believes that there is no need to worry too much.

title_en: The 72nd Maritime Festival Kaohsiung District Celebration Ceremony Commends Outstanding Model Port Employees
summary_en: The 72nd Maritime Festival Celebration in Kaohsiung District was grandly held at 5 pm today (7th) at the Chenggong Store of Hi-Lai Hotel. In addition to commending 33 model airport employees in Kaohsiung District and recognizing their long-term persistence and selfless dedication, the celebration also presented special souvenirs to lighthouse and signal station staff and Kaohsiung Port water pilots who have been guarding maritime safety for many years. summary_en: Taiwan's economic growth rate has been revised upward significantly, showing rare high growth momentum, and the market is paying close attention to monetary policy trends. At the meeting of the Board of Supervisors on June 18, the central bank decided to maintain the discount rate, guaranteed loan financing rate and short-term financing rate at 2%, 2.375% and 4.25% respectively, setting a record of nine consecutive freezes. middle

title_en: Preview of five major financial events on July 8
summary_en:
The Economic Daily has compiled five must-know financial events so that readers can quickly grasp the most important financial events every morning.

1. In June, CPI increased by 2.6% year-on-year, a new high in one and a half years. The Accounting and Accounting Office: It will still be above 2% in July.
The General Accounting Office announced yesterday (7th) that the Consumer Price Index (CPI) in June increased by 2.6% year-on-year, reaching the 2% inflation warning line for the second consecutive month...more


2. Huiyin: Foreign investors cannot be allowed to "eat tofu" in dividends, price differences, and exchange differences. How can they be allowed to take everything?
Foreign capital has accelerated its withdrawal from Taiwan stocks, causing the New Taiwan dollar to rapidly fall below the 32 yuan mark against the U.S. dollar. A key Huiyin person who is familiar with the operation of the foreign exchange market said yesterday (7th) that free entry and exit of funds is a market mechanism...more


3. Samsung is so powerful that it has made more money in one quarter than in three years. The market is worried about the battery life of AI demand.
As the artificial intelligence (AI) boom continues to drive demand for high-end memory chips, Samsung Electronics' preliminary operating profit for the second quarter is expected to increase 18 times year-on-year, exceeding the total of the past three years...more


4. Acceleration of the amendment to delete special points for siblings. The "contribution system" of the Ministry of Justice is still controversial.
"Amending the law to delete the special distinction between siblings" will be convened by Legislative Yuan Hanguo-yu tomorrow (9th) for party group consultations. The opposition parties intend to "accelerate" the amendment of the law...more


5. The technology industry’s “hunting factories” are booming in industrial real estate and will become the leader in commercial real estate transactions.
The era of "factory hunting" is coming in the commercial market; Lin Jingchao, general manager of CBRE, said yesterday (7th) that with the active expansion of Huida Taiwan's supply chain, the number of commercial real estate factories in the first half of this year

title_en: Global Semiconductor Group recovers, Q2 growth reaches nearly 10%, hitting a new high in a year
summary_en: Global Crystal (6488-TW) announced today (7th) that its June revenue was 5.62 billion yuan, a monthly increase of 16.16%, and an annual decrease of 1.63%. Its second quarter revenue was 15.21 billion yuan, a quarterly increase of 8.79%, and an annual decrease of 4.96%. The cumulative revenue in the first half of the year was 29.2 billion yuan, an annual decrease of 7.6%; Global Crystal's second quarter revenue was significantly higher than that of the first quarter.

title_en: The Financial Supervisory Committee nods! Yushan Jinbin Sanshang Life’s scheduled base date is 9/1 and must implement the capital increase as promised
summary_en: The Financial Supervisory Commission today (7th) officially approved Yushan Financial Holdings (2884-TW) to acquire 100% of the shares of Smith Barney Life Insurance Co., Ltd. through share conversion. The scheduled merger base date is September 1 this year. Cai Huoyan, deputy director of the Insurance Bureau, said that Yushan Financial Holdings has promised to retain all internal and external back-office and contract employees for three years.

title_en: <Electronic Fifth Brother’s Revenue> Quanta’s revenue hits three highs, single-quarter revenue exceeds trillion yuan for the first time, demand for AI servers continues to be hot
summary_en: Quanta (2382-TW) announced today (7th) that its revenue in June was 385.19 billion yuan, and its revenue in the second quarter was 1.04 trillion yuan. Its cumulative revenue in the first six months of this year was 1.85 trillion yuan, and its revenue in a single month, a single quarter and the first half of the year all hit record highs. Quanta pointed out that the main growth momentum comes from AI servers.

title: 通行荷莫茲海峽單趟戰爭險28或35萬美元　走北邊靠伊朗航道保費低
summary: 雖然美伊已經達成初步停火協議，但是荷莫茲海峽通行仍未恢復正常，今(7)日還傳出卡達國營航運公司LNG傳遭襲擊，國內海運界高階指出，目前船隻離開波斯灣，如果走靠近南邊靠近阿曼的航道，單趟戰爭險保費35萬美元，走北邊靠近伊朗的航道保費28萬美元，因為走北邊是向伊朗申請，伊朗和美國都不會有襲擊動作。 《詳全文...》

title_en: The war insurance for a single trip through the Strait of Hormuz is US$280,000 or US$350,000. The insurance is lower if you take the northern route through the Iranian waterway.
summary_en: Although the United States and Iran have reached a preliminary ceasefire agreement, traffic in the Strait of Hormuz has not returned to normal. On the 7th, it was also reported that Qatar's state-owned shipping company LNG was attacked. Senior officials in the domestic shipping industry pointed out that currently, if a ship leaves the Persian Gulf and takes the southern channel near Oman, the single-trip war insurance premium is US$350,000, and the single-trip war insurance premium is US$280,000 if it takes the northern channel close to Iran. Because if you go north, you will apply to Iran, and neither Iran nor the United States will attack. "Full text..."

title: 外資、主力大戶等瘋狂倒貨 台股失守46K 指數震盪1,535點
summary: 台股昨（7）日開高走低大逆轉，在多空雙殺下，終場大跌1,077點、收45,479點，失守月線支撐，跌點為史上第八慘，高低差達1,535點、居史上第五大。法人認為，行情在震盪換手後，指數仍有機會再戰史上新高。
title_zh: 外資、主力大戶等瘋狂倒貨 台股失守46K 指數震盪1,535點
summary_zh: 台股昨（7）日開高走低大逆轉，在多空雙殺下，終場大跌1,077點、收45,479點，失守月線支撐，跌點為史上第八慘，高低差達1,535點、居史上第五大。法人認為，行情在震盪換手後，指數仍有機會再戰史上新高。
title_en: Foreign investors, major investors and others are frantically dumping stocks. Taiwan stocks fell by 46K and the index fluctuated by 1,535 points.
summary_en: The Taiwan stock market reversed course yesterday (7th) after opening higher and going lower. Under the pressure of both longs and shorts, it ended up plunging 1,077 points to close at 45,479 points, losing its monthly support. The drop was the eighth worst in history, and the difference between high and low reached 1,535 points, ranking fifth largest in history. Legal experts believe that after the market fluctuates and changes hands, the index still has a chance to reach a new high in history.

title: 台積電目標價 小摩喊3,100 預計明年起大幅擴產

summary_en: Although foreign legal persons have sold more than bought TSMC in July, major foreign securities firms have issued reports in support of TSMC. J.P. Morgan Securities pointed out in the latest individual stock report that based on reflecting TSMC's stronger profitability, it has raised its after-tax net earnings per share (EPS) by 5%, 10%, and 16% for 2026-2028, giving it an "outperform" rating and raising the target price to 3,100 yuan, ranking it the seventh highest among foreign capital circles.

summary: 550億元台股活水來了，勞動基金運用局昨（7）日完成新制勞工退休基金、勞工保險基金及國民年金保險基金今年度第一次國內投資相對報酬型委託經營受託機構遴選作業，入選五家名單為中國信託投信、安聯投信、統一投信、滙豐投信、摩根投信，總委託金額共550億元，委任期間五年。

title_en: 55 billion yuan Taiwan stock market is coming
summary_en: The 55 billion yuan Taiwan stock market has come alive. The Labor Fund Utilization Bureau yesterday (7th) completed the selection of trustee institutions for the first domestic investment relative remuneration entrustment operation of the new labor pension fund, labor insurance fund and national pension insurance fund this year. The five selected companies are China Trust Investment Trust, Allianz Investment Trust, Uni-President Investment Trust, HSBC Investment Trust, and Morgan Investment Trust. The total entrustment amount is 55 billion yuan, and the appointment period is five years.

According to legal analysis, the market is highly volatile, forcing buyers to turn to groups with high yields or low base periods for risk aversion, thus driving the two major categories of stocks to buck the trend and post profits.

summary_en: Memory manufacturer Winbond (2344) announced consolidated revenue of 20.597 billion yuan in June, a monthly increase of 2.98% and an annual increase of 189.88%, setting a record high for seven consecutive months. The cumulative revenue in the first half of this year was 98.096 billion yuan, a significant increase of 139.20% from 41.011 billion yuan in the same period last year, reflecting the improved supply and demand in the memory market that drove operational performance. Finally, they decided to "clear out with one click" and lost 380,000 yuan. They lamented that "all the profits made from January to June were lost." "Full text..."

This year, 50 Sino-Philippine Bank colleagues and their families enthusiastically participated in the event. A total of 17.45 kilograms of garbage were cleaned up in the event. They contributed to the urban environment through the street cleaning operation and demonstrated the company's commitment to continue to implement ESG sustainability concepts. "Full text..."

summary_en: Chang Shengxin, President of Citi Taiwan and Chairman of Citi (Taiwan) Bank, said that Citi Global Volunteer Day has entered its 21st year in Taiwan. Over the years, volunteers have traveled all over Taiwan, ranging from financial education camps, beach clean-up activities, going to rural campuses to tell stories, to accompanying the elderly living alone, and continue to provide public welfare services in a variety of ways. In June every year, Citi colleagues also participate in Global Volunteer Day with partners around the world to participate in volunteer services. "Full text..."

title_en: Optimistic about the rigid demand for trade, CoinTop promotes stablecoin settlement services
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 7th) Optimizing that the receipt and payment of stablecoins will become a rigid demand for international trade in the future, Bito Group today announced the launch of a core brand of enterprise-level virtual assets and the launch of "Bito.ONE", a stablecoin settlement service specially created for financial institutions. Currently, Bito has launched pilot projects with 4 banks, and today called on 10 companies to participate in the first wave of trial plans, hoping to integrate into the global financial system.

summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北7日電）金管會今天表示，保險業者提到就算曾提供手術融通機制，仍無法確定是否特定手術多數已從住院手術改為門診手術，目前業界比較確定融通的僅白內障手術，是否還有其他具通案性的手術項目，需衛福部協助提供數據釐清，才有持續與業者溝通的基礎。

title_en: Financial Supervisory Commission: The surgical financing mechanism will be discussed again after the Ministry of Health and Welfare provides data
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 7th) The Financial Supervisory Commission said today that insurance companies have mentioned that even if they have provided surgical financing mechanisms, they are still unable to determine whether most specific surgeries have been changed from inpatient surgeries to outpatient surgeries. At present, the industry is relatively certain that only cataract surgeries are covered. Whether there are other general surgeries, the Ministry of Health and Welfare needs to assist in providing data to clarify, so as to have a basis for continuous communication with the industry.

title_en: DeepSeek is rumored to be developing its own AI chip; U.S. stock index opens lower
summary_en: (Central News Agency, New York, Comprehensive Foreign Reports on the 7th) Despite the impressive financial report released by the semiconductor giant Samsung, the Nasdaq Composite Index of the US stock market opened lower today amid a general decline in chip stocks. In addition to investors questioning the sustainability of the bullish market driven by AI, news of DeepSeek's self-developed AI chips also dampened sentiment in U.S. stocks.

title: 韌性台灣論壇／維護資安韌性走在最前面　中華電信投入後量子密碼加密
summary: 今（7）日下午，中華電信董事長簡志誠出席鏡週刊「2026韌性台灣高峰論壇」，他從「通訊韌性」角度說明中華電信的建置現況與應對方案，同時，也呼應了數位發展部部長林宜敬的「三大不能」論述。簡志誠更以科普方式說明中華電信所提供的加密切片分持技術正可協助資安韌性，考慮到量子電腦世代即將到來，恐影響客戶的密碼安全，中華電信更已投身於後量子密碼加密技術，要做到走在最前面的品牌諾言。

title: 防颱風巴威　經濟部會同相關單位視察北市防汛整備
summary: （中央社記者謝怡璇台北7日電）經濟部今天與內政部、台北市政府視察北市防汛整備。經濟部表示，請市府等各單位把握颱風來襲前的空檔，檢查各項防洪設施，落實機具檢整，包括南深橋防洪陸閘、南深右抽水站等周邊重要防汛系統，應加強清理水溝，清疏下水道確保排水能力。

title_en: Preparing for Typhoon Bavi, the Ministry of Economic Affairs and relevant units inspected the flood prevention preparations of Bei City
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Xie Yixuan, Taipei, 7th) The Ministry of Economic Affairs, the Ministry of Interior, and the Taipei City Government inspected the flood prevention preparations in Taipei City today. The Ministry of Economic Affairs stated that the city government and other units are requested to seize the opportunity before the typhoon strikes, inspect various flood control facilities, and implement the overhaul of equipment, including Nanshen Bridge Flood Control Land Gate, Nanshen Right Pumping Station and other surrounding important flood control systems. They should strengthen the cleaning of ditches and dredge sewers to ensure drainage capacity.

title: 輝達Kyber架構機櫃傳難產雜音　童子賢淡定回應背後大趨勢不變
summary: 台股今（7）日大跌1077點，其中不少個股跌勢與研究機構指稱輝達下一代Kyber架構AI伺服器機櫃恐因PCB太難做而面臨出貨推遲。對此傳言與市況發展，和碩集團董事長童子賢也淡定回應：「目前大趨勢不變，對產業未來維持樂觀態度！」

title: 54家金融機構轉帳顯示戶名　警示戶降至13.7萬戶
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北7日電）金管會今天表示，民眾時有輸錯帳號導致誤轉帳的情形，因此督導財金公司與銀行公會建立轉帳顯示戶名機制，合計54家金融機構上線服務，警示戶從去年第3季15.4萬戶降至今年5月底13.7萬戶，從統計與民眾回饋來看，相關機制已有發揮防詐效果。

title_en: Account names were displayed in transfers from 54 financial institutions, and the number of warning accounts dropped to 137,000.
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 7th) The Financial Supervisory Commission said today that people sometimes enter wrong account numbers and make mistaken transfers. Therefore, it has supervised financial companies and the Banking Association to establish a mechanism for displaying account names in transfers. A total of 54 financial institutions have launched the service, and the number of users with warnings has dropped from 154,000 in the third quarter of last year to 137,000 by the end of May this year. Judging from statistics and public feedback, the relevant mechanisms have played a role in preventing fraud.

title: 中暑住院可理賠　南山人壽獲准試辦抗高溫微型保單
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北7日電）近年受到氣候變遷影響，全球極端高溫事件發生頻率持續增加，金管會今天表示，已核准「南山人壽團體微型熱傷害住院關懷健康保險試辦業務」，若因中暑等熱傷害事故而住院，將可獲得定額保險金新台幣1萬元，今年7月正式試辦。

title_en: Compensation is available for hospitalization due to heat stroke; Nanshan Life Insurance is approved to trial high temperature resistance micro-insurance policy
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 7th) In recent years, due to the impact of climate change, the frequency of extreme high temperature events around the world has continued to increase. The Financial Supervisory Commission said today that it has approved the "Nanshan Life Group Micro Thermal Injury Hospitalization Care Health Insurance Pilot Business". If you are hospitalized due to heat stroke or other heat injury accidents, you will receive a fixed insurance benefit of NT$10,000. The trial will be officially launched in July this year.

summary: （中央社記者潘智義台北7日電）低軌衛星零件供應商昇達科總經理吳東義今天表示，繼毫米波應用於低軌衛星之後，現階段進一步推進至次太赫茲、太赫茲頻率，分別應用於低軌衛星、6G通訊及AI伺服器傳輸。

title_en: Sundaco is optimistic about the three major applications of terahertz frequency: satellites, 6G and AI servers
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Pan Zhiyi, Taipei, 7th) Wu Dongyi, general manager of low-orbit satellite parts supplier Sundaco, said today that following the application of millimeter waves to low-orbit satellites, the current stage is further advancing to sub-terahertz and terahertz frequencies, which are used in low-orbit satellites, 6G communications and AI server transmission respectively.

summary: （中央社記者趙敏雅台北7日電）經濟部長龔明鑫今天表示，隨著地緣政治情勢變化，非紅供應鏈已成國際趨勢，政府希望推動5大信賴產業非紅化，與全球民主國家建立更緊密的供應鏈鏈結，甚至形成生態體系，以強化韌性。

title_en: Gong Mingxin: Promote the non-Redization of the Five Trusted Industries and Strengthen Resilience through International Links
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhao Minya, Taipei, 7th) Minister of Economic Affairs Gong Mingxin said today that as the geopolitical situation changes, non-red supply chains have become an international trend. The government hopes to promote the non-red supply of five major trust industries, establish closer supply chain links with democratic countries around the world, and even form an ecosystem to strengthen resilience.

title_en: In response to Typhoon Bawei, the Port Bureau made advance arrangements to activate 12 miles of offshore ship clearance
summary_en: In response to the impending Typhoon Bawei, the Harbor Bureau of the Ministry of Transport will activate the 12-mile offshore warning zone control mechanism on the eve of the issuance of the maritime typhoon warning, calling on all types of ships sailing in the waters surrounding Taiwan to stay away from dangerous sea areas as soon as possible to take shelter. Illegal merchant ships that fail to evacuate in accordance with the instructions will be strictly dealt with in accordance with the law. Foreign merchant ships will be prohibited from entering the port in accordance with the Commercial Port Law. Domestic merchant ships will implement the safe operation and pollution prevention management system (NSM) in accordance with the law to maintain navigation safety in the sea. "Full text..."

title_en: ADATA decided to publicly acquire more than 22.29% of Liuyuan's shares at RMB 24 per share.
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhang Jianzhong, Hsinchu, 7th) The board of directors of memory module manufacturer ADATA decided today to publicly acquire common shares of Liuyuan for NT$24 per share in cash. It is expected to acquire 10 million to 25 million shares, approximately 22.29% to 55.73% of Liuyuan's equity.

title: 國泰投信風波　總經理張雍川以督導不周主動請辭
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北7日電）國泰投信因誤踩利害關係人投資紅線，導致補償金額達新台幣9.48億元。國泰金今天代國泰投信公告，國泰投信總經理張雍川以督導不周理由主動請辭總經理一職，於7月8日生效，並由資深副總經理鄭立誠暫代其職務。

title_en: Cathay Investment Bank crisis: General Manager Zhang Yongchuan voluntarily resigns due to poor supervision
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 7th) Cathay Pacific Investment Bank mistakenly stepped on the red line of stakeholder investment, resulting in a compensation amount of NT$948 million. Cathay Financial announced today on behalf of Cathay Investment Trust that Cathay Investment Trust general manager Zhang Yongchuan voluntarily resigned from the post of general manager citing poor supervision, effective July 8, and was temporarily replaced by senior deputy general manager Zheng Licheng.

title: 韌性台灣論壇／極端氣候挑戰通訊韌性　中華電信簡志誠「海地星空」也需電力多層次備援
summary: 今（7）日下午，中華電信董事長簡志誠出席鏡週刊「2026韌性台灣高峰論壇」，並以「海地星空到量子資安打造數位國土韌性防護」發表演說，為現場人士說明肩負台灣通訊重任的中華電信是如何走在最前面，多年前中華電信所提出的「海地星空」不僅已經層層做足更互為備援，同時他也坦承「電力基礎還是支援海地星空的重要因素！」為此，中華電信也提供不同程度的電力備援方案。

title: 韌性台灣論壇／從減碳變戰略角色　聯合再生張為策：綠能是供應鏈盾牌
summary: 聯合再生能源執行長張為策今(7)日出席鏡週刊舉辦的「2026韌性台灣高峰論壇」，他表示，能源自主是國際競爭力的一環，雖然近期產業遇輿論逆風，但能源韌性可增加產業競爭力、社區恢復力，以及環境生命力，已從過去的「減碳角色」，升級為「戰略資源」。

title: 韌性台灣論壇／中華電信領先引進全光網路　董座簡志誠妙喻如網路高鐵
summary: 談到中華電信通訊服務目標，董座簡志誠以一句「智慧韌性贏信賴、AI乘光展未來」明確交代，而其中的「乘光展未來」指的就是中華電信正積極引進的全光網路（All-Photonics Network，APN）。一向幽默也了解市場語言的簡志誠也將光纖網路、全光網路各自比喻為台鐵、高鐵，說明兩種技術同時存在、各有所長，也為台灣通訊韌性提供不同選擇。

title: 韌性台灣論壇／台灣企業最怕供應鏈中斷　勤業眾信揭4維度避雷管制紅線
summary: 在地緣政治新常態下，全球貿易制裁與出口管制影響供應鏈韌性，其中地緣經濟對抗已躍升為未來兩年全球最嚴重的短期風險。勤業眾信策略、風險與交易服務資深執行副總經理陳鴻棋今（7）日於「韌性台灣高峰論壇」指出，大國將貿易、科技與供應鏈武器化，透過制裁與出口管制進行博弈。面對供應鏈中斷的風險，他建議，企業應從追求生產效率，轉向建立具備適應力、高耐受度的「韌性網路」。

title: 韌性台灣論壇／雷虎科技打造無人機非紅供應鏈　陳冠如：全面提升台灣國防韌性
summary: 受惠於國防預算創新高與「國防自主無人載具採購特別條例」草案推動，台灣軍工股如火朝天。在「韌性台灣論壇」上，雷虎科技（Thunder Tiger）董事長陳冠如，從無人機到供應鏈，從台灣到歐美市場開拓，無所不談。雷虎科技無人機發展是創新中的一個縮影，也描繪出台灣韌性國防網的一面。

title: 韌性台灣論壇／務實建立台灣能源韌性 童子賢：應重啟核一歡迎來辯論
summary: 和碩集團董事長童子賢出席鏡週刊「2026韌性台灣高峰論壇」，以「從能源韌性看台灣的機會與挑戰」為題發表演說，站在台灣當前發展與產業所需、同時借鏡國際案例提出看法。童子賢為現場貴賓聽眾直接親解核能2大優勢與外界2大疑慮，並重申台灣能源政策「到了轉折的時刻！」明確拋出4大建議並提出333能源組合目標，也幽默說道：「核一仍能使用，歡迎公開辯論！」

title: 韌性台灣論壇／韌性是台灣標籤！　經長龔明鑫：顧好中小企就不怕風險
summary: 經濟部長龔明鑫今（7）日出席鏡週刊舉辦的「2026韌性台灣高峰論壇」，他致詞時提到，台灣這十年來充分發揮韌性，一路在美中貿易戰、新冠疫情、AI轉型下度過難關，甚至因禍得福，所以我們要繼續顧好中小微企業的韌性，思考未來十年的策略。

title: 韌性台灣論壇／強化台灣韌性　數發部長林宜敬：網路不能斷、系統不能停、關鍵資料不能丟
summary: 數發部部長林宜敬表示，數發部在強化台灣韌性的時候有三個重要目標，第一個是網路不能斷，第二是系統不能讓駭客入侵導致停止運作，第三個是關鍵資料不能丟失。林宜敬強調，這些事情對台灣非常重要，數發部將會做一系列的防範措施。

title: 韌性台灣論壇／國安會副祕書長林飛帆：台灣要避免現狀被中國破壞　以實力捍衛和平
summary: 國家安全會議副秘書長林飛帆表示，台灣要避免現狀被中國破壞，必須要以實力捍衛和平，因為韌性並非從天而降，而是需要被投資，並且透過政府和社會的參與，不斷強化，如果今天不做，明天不會無中生有，連SOP（標準作業程序）都不知道。

title: 離岸風電也來了    星星電力簽下風睿能源50億度綠電
summary: 今年計畫登錄興櫃，泓德能源旗下的電力服務管理商星星電力今（7）日宣布，與風睿能源集團（SRE）正式簽署購電協議（PPA），合約期間將買SRE旗下海盛風電共50億度電，將離岸風電納入綠電供應組合。

title: 問題油吹哨者南僑也被罰？ 網友怒轟：解決提出問題的人
summary: 中聯油脂致癌大豆沙拉油事件影響層面持續擴大，衛福部今（7）日表示，針對中聯延遲通報及追查過程中涉有不實情形，將依《食安法》開罰1億6520萬元，創下史上最高裁罰金額，雖然南僑是第一個自主檢驗發現問題的業者，但因未依規定即時通報，可能也會被罰，消息一出網友譁然，驚呼「破壞皇城內的和氣」、「以後不要雞婆自主檢查」、「先解決發現問題的人」。

title: 台股史上第8慘失守46K！禾伸堂、景碩等跌停　康霈、建碁逆勢漲停
summary: 台股今日開低走低，終場大跌1,077.28點，為史上第8大跌點，終場以45,479.11點作收。台積電等權值股遭遇殺盤，台積電跌20元收在2,440元，禾伸堂、景碩、國巨*、穎崴等跌停，而康霈*、建碁、捷敏-KY等逆勢漲停。

title: 4字頭還買得到！通車倒數　三鶯線3大卡位熱區曝光
summary: 台北捷運「三鶯線」在6月底展開為期2個月的免費試乘，通車進入最終倒數階段，歷經10年建設的新北交通大動脈，打破三峽、鶯歌長久以來的「邊緣感」，軌道經濟點燃房市，儘管今年受房市管控政策影響，漲勢和緩下來，但專家認為，未來在地的人口移入、生活圈升級等利多，房市正式從「預期行情」走向「實質行情」，持續受到自住買盤的青睞。

title: 00685L「1拆24」首日爆量逾60萬張　小資瘋搶正2 ETF
summary: 今年上半年以 136.84% 的驚人漲幅奪下台股 ETF 績效冠軍的群益臺灣加權正2（00685L），在進行「1拆24」的股票分割後，於今（7）日正式恢復交易。分割後的買賣參考價為 12.75 元，今日早盤以 13.09 元開高，隨即吸引買盤瘋搶，盤中成交量一舉突破60萬張。

title: 張國煒親駕首架藝術機「空山銀」返台　8月再迎「空山金」
summary: 星宇航空首架特別塗裝機「STARLUX AIRSORAYAMA 空山銀」，昨（5）日正式飛抵台灣，這架由星宇航空攜手日本藝術家空山基打造的A350-1000（機身編號B-58553），由星宇航空董事長張國煒親赴法國土魯斯接機，並親自執飛返台，班機於昨日上午11時38分降落桃園國際機場，銀色機身首度現身台灣，也吸引不少航空迷到場迎接。

title_en: Taiwan Shipbuilding's losses since Q2 have mainly come from the exchange rate. The key to turning a profit for the whole year is also the exchange rate.
summary_en: Taiwan Shipbuilding (2208)'s revenue in May was 1.410 billion, an annual decrease of 81.91% and a monthly decrease of 27.21%. Company executives pointed out that after the two "Hai Kun" follow-up submarines were signed at the end of March last year, the amount originally spent on design and procurement was officially accounted for. , due to the increase in revenue in May last year; as for the self-accrued pre-tax loss of 98 million yuan in May, the cumulative pre-tax loss in the first five months was 188 million yuan, mainly affected by the exchange rate. Whether the company can successfully turn a loss into a profit this year, the exchange rate will be a big key factor. "Full text..."

title_en: National airlines’ revenue soared in May; Evergreen, China Airlines, and Xingyu set new records
summary_en: National Airlines’ May operating report card has been released. On the eve of the peak summer vacation season, the AI supply chain has driven air transport demand and the travel market continues to heat up, the revenue has simultaneously achieved outstanding performance. Among them, EVA Air's monthly consolidated revenue was 22.329 billion yuan, an annual increase of 22.11%, setting a record high; China Airlines Group's May consolidated revenue was 21.23 billion yuan, also setting a new single-month record; StarLux Airline benefited from the growth of both passenger and cargo, with total revenue in May of 4.826 billion yuan, an annual increase of 41%, setting a new single-month high; Taiwan's Tigerair, with a 22% annual revenue increase in May, wrote its best results for the same period in the past. "Full text..."

summary_en: Taiwan Photomask (2338) held a board meeting today and approved the disposal of its six factory assets in Zhunan to Silicon Products. summary_en: The Airports and Ports Bureau of the Ministry of Transport issued a personnel order this evening (10th). Deputy Director Chen Binquan was transferred to the deputy director of the Transportation Research Institute of the Ministry of Transport. Lu Qingquan, Deputy Director of the Aviation Administration Department, was transferred to the position of Director Secretary of the Airports and Ports Bureau. summary: 為提升機車安全、降低機車事故率，減少傷亡發生，交通部今 (10) 日宣布，將全面推動「機車左轉安全精進措施」，包括將左轉專用道與左轉保護時相列為路口改善的核心重點，也將因地制宜地導入交通工程配套措施進行改善。

title_en: To reduce the casualties of motorcycle users, the Ministry of Transport: Use road engineering improvements to promote left-turning measures for motorcycles
summary_en: In order to improve motorcycle safety, reduce motorcycle accident rates, and reduce casualties, the Ministry of Transport announced today (10th) that it will comprehensively promote "Motorcycle Left Turn Safety Improvement Measures", including making left-turn lanes and left-turn protection phases the core focus of intersection improvement, and will also introduce traffic engineering supporting measures according to local conditions for improvement.

summary: LINE Pay(7722-TW) 今 (10) 日公布 5 月營收 7.5 億元，創史上單月次高，較去年同期成長 17.19%，累計今年前 5 月營收達 35.02 億元，年增 15.07%。受惠於多元消費場景持續擴展及母親節檔期消費需
title_zh: LINE Pay 5月營收7.5億元創史上單月次高 前5月年增15%
summary_zh: LINE Pay(7722-TW) 今 (10) 日公布 5 月營收 7.5 億元，創史上單月次高，較去年同期成長 17.19%，累計今年前 5 月營收達 35.02 億元，年增 15.07%。受惠於多元消費場景持續擴展及母親節檔期消費需
title_en: LINE Pay’s revenue in May reached 750 million yuan, the second highest monthly revenue in history, with an annual increase of 15% in the first five months
summary_en: LINE Pay (7722-TW) announced today (10th) that its May revenue was 750 million yuan, the second-highest monthly figure in history, an increase of 17.19% over the same period last year. The cumulative revenue for the first five months of this year reached 3.502 billion yuan, an annual increase of 15.07%. Benefiting from the continued expansion of diversified consumption scenarios and consumer demand during Mother’s Day

title: AI史詩級行情！凱基證估明年企業獲利成長25％　指數可望挑戰5萬點
summary: 面對地緣政治升溫與通膨壓力未解，全球市場進入高檔震盪階段，凱基證券今（10）日發布今（2026）年下半年投資展望，凱基投顧董事長朱晏民以「史詩級行情」為題開場，受惠AI需求爆發與CSP資本支出上調，供應鏈訂單與獲利預期同步提升。預估今（2026）年台股企業獲利成長達40%，明（2027）年仍具約25%成長動能，以明年預估盈餘21倍本益比推算，指數高點挑戰5萬點。 《詳全文...》

title_en: AI epic quotes! KGI estimates that corporate profits will grow by 25% next year and the index is expected to challenge 50,000 points
summary_en: Faced with rising geopolitical tensions and unresolved inflationary pressures, the global market has entered a stage of high-end shocks. KGI Securities released its investment outlook for the second half of this year (2026) today (10th). Zhu Yanmin, chairman of KGI Investment Consulting, opened with the title "Epic Market". Benefiting from the explosion of AI demand and the increase in CSP capital expenditures, supply chain orders and profit expectations have increased simultaneously. The profit growth of Taiwanese companies is expected to reach 40% this year (2026), and will still have about 25% growth momentum next year (2027). Based on a price-to-earnings ratio of 21 times next year's estimated earnings, the index high will challenge 50,000 points. "Full text..."

title_en: Guangsheng's revenue in May increased by 116% year-on-year, setting a new monthly high, benefiting from the rising demand for AI data centers and strong shipments
summary_en: Guangsheng announced that its revenue in May was 1.725 billion yuan, a monthly increase of 94.67%, and an annual increase of 116.02%. The single-month revenue also set a record high. According to statistics, the consolidated revenue from January to May this year (2026) was 5.317 billion yuan, an annual increase of 34.24%. Order visibility has been seen by the end of this year (2026).

title: 寶成1-5月營收突破千億元 年衰退幅度收歛至2.79%
summary: 寶成今 (10) 日公布最新營收資訊 2026 年 5 月自結營收為 217.02 億元，月減 2.88%，年增 0.17%，累計 2026 年 1- 5 月自結營收為 1071.38 億元，較 2025 年同期衰退 2.79%。

title_en: Baocheng's revenue from January to May exceeded 100 billion yuan, and the annual recession narrowed to 2.79%
summary_en: Baocheng announced its latest revenue information today (10th). Its self-collected revenue in May 2026 was 21.702 billion yuan, a monthly decrease of 2.88% and an annual increase of 0.17%. The cumulative self-collected revenue from January to May 2026 was 107.138 billion yuan, a decrease of 2.79% compared with the same period in 2025.

title_en: 10 stocks including TSMC went ex-dividend, and the index evaporated by more than 52 points
summary_en: The stock exchange announced tomorrow (11th) that Huaxin (1605), Baoling Fujin (1760), Changyuan (2030), Huatai (2329), TSMC (2330), Delu (3030), Innolux (3481), Tianer Technology (6834), Qingxin-chuang (6951), Fubon Media (8454) and other 10 issue-weighted stock price index component stocks are trading ex-dividend. Among them, the market value of TSMC's issuance will be reduced by approximately 155.5 billion yuan, accounting for approximately 47.84 points of the issue-weighted stock price index. After the aforementioned 10 index sampling stocks go ex-dividend, the reduced market value will account for approximately 52.66 points of the issue-weighted stock price index. "Full text..."

title_en: Foreign investors slashed 93.5 billion yuan, sold over 437.4 billion yuan in 5 days, and continued to sell 15,500 TSMC shares without interest.
summary_en: Taiwan stocks closed at 43,502.78 points today (10th), down 1,568.16 points or 3.48%, setting the third largest closing point in the history of Taiwan stocks. The transaction value reached 1.13 trillion yuan, of which foreign investors oversold 93.574 billion yuan, the eighth largest overselling in history. There were five consecutive sales, with a total of 437 overselling in five days.

summary_en: Yesterday (9th), only the Dow Jones closed in the red among the four major U.S. stock indexes, and large electronic stocks generally pulled back to consolidate. Today (10th), Taiwanese stocks lost their rebound momentum, falling more than 1,400 points, and temporarily lost the monthly support of 43,349 points. The seller of the capital renewal station adjusted 93.574 billion yuan, which was the eighth largest single-day oversold amount in history. The first oversold stock was Kai Fund (2883), which adjusted 92,000 yuan, and TSMC (2330), which adjusted 15,000 yuan. "Full text..."

summary: 輔信 (2405-TW) 今 (10) 日公告 5 月營收 1.5 億元，雖呈現月減，不過年增 8.4%，累計今年前 5 月營收 7.37 億元。輔信指出，受惠產品組合優化，加上高階產品貢獻增加，平均銷售單價提高，挹注 5 月營收表現。

title_en: Fuxin benefited from optimized product portfolio and increased contribution from high-end products. Revenue in May was RMB 150 million, an increase of 8% year-on-year.
summary_en: Fuxin (2405-TW) announced today (10th) that its revenue in May was 150 million yuan. Although it showed a monthly decrease, it still increased by 8.4% year-on-year. The cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 737 million yuan. Fuxing pointed out that benefiting from the optimization of product mix and the increased contribution of high-end products, the average sales unit price increased, which boosted the revenue performance in May.

title_en: Xinli’s revenue in May increased year-on-year, benefiting from the shipment of environmentally friendly materials and high-additional products
summary_en: Xinli announced today that its revenue in May was 101 million yuan, a monthly increase of 5.53%, and an annual increase of 0.38%. The cumulative consolidated revenue from January to May this year (2026) was 425 million yuan, an annual increase of 5.44%. Xinli said that May was mainly due to the steady growth in demand for environmentally friendly materials and the increase in shipments of high value-added products.

title_en: Taiwan’s mobile phone price reduction list in May welcomes the off-season and enlarges profits. Google’s foldable flagship has dropped by RMB 26,000, nearly 50% off
summary_en: Jiesheng Communications, Taiwan's largest telecommunications store chain, announced the latest list of price-reduced mobile phones in May. Channel price changes this month broke the steady contraction in previous months, showing polarized shocks. In order to attract traffic during the off-season, brands and distributors had to adopt radical profit-sharing tactics. As a result, the overall decline span of models on the price list this month widened sharply from 4% to 46%.

title_en: There is a solution for semiconductor wastewater regeneration: "Electric drive separation and concentration technology" is the key to recycling into a net-zero breakthrough
summary_en: The team of Distinguished Professor Hou Jiahong of National Taiwan University's Institute of Environmental Engineering successfully proposed an innovative "electrically driven separation and concentration technology" today (10), which allows low-concentration fluorine-containing wastewater that was originally difficult to use to be converted into reusable recycling resources, bringing a key breakthrough for the semiconductor industry to promote waste water resources and net-zero transformation.

title: 聯發科「抓去關」挨轟　金管會：調整警示標準、縮短處置期
summary: 美伊戰爭之後，台股指數屢創新，日前聯發科（2454）因短線漲幅過大，遭到分盤交易處置，引發處置股制度調整討論，今（10）日金管會報告出爐，截至今（2026）年5月25日，千元以上之股票約有50檔，日均成交量將近兆元，相較2024年間股市站上二萬點時之千元以上公司檔數、日均成交量、市場規模等，均有明顯增加，未來督導證交所、櫃買中心配合股價調升幅度評估規劃合理之公布注意股票警示標準，以達到預警目的，並縮短處置期間之可行性。 《詳全文...》

title_en: MediaTek’s “catch and remove” policy was criticized. Financial Supervisory Commission: Adjust warning standards and shorten the disposal period
summary_en: After the US-Iraq war, the Taiwan stock index has repeatedly set new records. Recently, MediaTek (2454) was subject to split trading due to excessive short-term gains, triggering discussions on the adjustment of the disposal stock system. Today (10th) the Financial Supervisory Commission report was released. As of May 25th (2026), there are about 50 stocks with more than 1,000 yuan, and the average daily trading volume is nearly Trillion yuan. Compared with the number of stocks above 1,000 yuan when the stock market reached 20,000 points in 2024, the number of company stocks, average daily trading volume, market size, etc. have all increased significantly. In the future, stock exchanges and over-the-counter buying centers will be supervised to evaluate the stock price increase and plan reasonable announcements of stock warning standards to achieve the purpose of early warning and shorten the feasibility of the disposal period. "Full text..."

title_en: <Electronic Fifth Brother’s Revenue> Pegatron’s three major products grew, with revenue of 95.9 billion yuan in May, double-digit growth year-on-year
summary_en: Pegatron (4938-TW) announced today (10th) that its revenue in May was 95.963 billion yuan, with double-digit growth every month. The cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 427.258 billion yuan. Pegatron pointed out that the growth of its three major products including information, consumer electronics and communication products drove revenue performance in May.

title: 嘉威生活淡季不淡 5月營收3.34億元年增達78.61%
summary: 雖處於傳統第二季的淡季，但嘉威生活 (3557-TW)(10) 日公布的最新營收資訊顯示，5 月營收單月營收達 3.34 億元，月增 27.31%，年增 78.61%；2026 年 1-5 月營收 20.28 億元，年減幅已收斂至 17.82%。
title_zh: 嘉威生活淡季不淡 5月營收3.34億元年增達78.61%

title_en: Jiawei Life is not weak in the off-season, with revenue in May reaching 334 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of 78.61%
summary_en: Although it is in the traditional off-season of the second quarter, the latest revenue information released by Jiawei Life (3557-TW) (10) showed that its monthly revenue in May reached 334 million yuan, a monthly increase of 27.31% and an annual increase of 78.61%; revenue from January to May 2026 was 2.028 billion yuan, and the annual decrease has converged to 17.82%.

title: 權值股頻遭關禁閉！金管會提分階段檢討制度 評估縮短處置期
summary: 台股今年勢如破竹站上 4 萬點，千金股百花齊放，電子族群成為吸金焦點，然而，聯發科、國巨等多檔大型電子權值股因股價波動劇烈，接連遭證交所實施俗稱「關禁閉」的處置措施，引發市場擔憂，恐衝擊整體台股的資金流動性

title_en: Equity stocks are banned! The Financial Supervisory Commission proposes a phased review system to assess the shortening of the resolution period
summary_en: The Taiwanese stock market has been on a tear this year, reaching 40,000 points. Gold stocks are in full bloom, and electronics groups have become the focus of attracting money. However, due to violent stock price fluctuations, many large electronics weight stocks such as MediaTek and Yageo have been subject to the stock exchange's implementation of disposal measures commonly known as "lockdowns", which has triggered market concerns and may affect the liquidity of the overall Taiwan stock market.

title: 自行車廠巨大5月營收53.57億元年增近6% 擺脫連13個月來衰退
summary: 巨大今日公布最新營收資訊，2026 年 5 月營收 53.57 億元，月減 3.42%，年增 5.81%，累計 2026 年 1-5 月營收爲 234.28 億元，年減 15.26%。值得注意是，巨大 5 月營收擺脫過去連續 13 個月來的單月年衰退窘況。

title_en: The huge bicycle factory's revenue in May increased by nearly 6% to 5.357 billion yuan, breaking away from the 13th consecutive month of decline.
summary_en: Giant announced its latest revenue information today. Revenue in May 2026 was 5.357 billion yuan, a monthly decrease of 3.42%, and an annual increase of 5.81%. The cumulative revenue from January to May 2026 was 23.428 billion yuan, an annual decrease of 15.26%. It is worth noting that the huge revenue in May broke out of the past 13 consecutive months of single-month annual decline.

summary: 財信傳媒董事長謝金河今（10）日發文指出，近期全球股市忽跌忽漲，讓投資人心情七上八下，「而極端的預測通常都是錯的。」文中他更點名「末日博士」魯比尼、「新興市場教父」墨比爾斯、《富爸爸窮爸爸》作家羅伯特清崎、「商品大王」吉姆羅傑斯及《大賣空》作者麥可貝瑞等5位名人，直指這些國際大師往往憑感覺做預測，並勉勵投資人與其盲從大師，不如自己努力做功課。 《詳全文...》

title_en: Rich dad is on the list! Xie Jinhe named "5 masters": extreme predictions are often wrong
summary_en: Xie Jinhe, chairman of Caixin Media, issued an article today (10th) pointing out that the recent fluctuations in global stock markets have made investors feel confused, "and extreme predictions are usually wrong." In the article, he also named "Doctor Doom" Roubini and "The Godfather of Emerging Markets" Mobius Five celebrities, including "Rich Dad Poor Dad" author Robert Kiyosaki, "Commodity King" Jim Rogers and "The Big Short" author Michael Berry, pointed out that these international masters often make predictions based on their feelings, and encouraged investors to do their own homework instead of blindly following the masters. "Full text..."

title: 大同電力設備延後出貨 5月營收35億元年月雙衰退
summary: 大同今日公告 5 月營收 35.82 億元，年月雙衰退，不過累計今年前 5 月營收 192.09 億元，小幅年增。大同指出，因部分電力新能源事業，配合客戶現地安裝影響交期，且原計劃 5 月出貨電力設備延至 6 月出貨，拖累 5 月營收表現。

title_en: Datong Power Equipment Shipments Delayed, Revenue in May of 3.5 Billion Yuan, Double Decline in Years and Months
summary_en: Datong announced today that its revenue in May was 3.582 billion yuan, a double decline year-on-year. However, its cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 19.209 billion yuan, a slight annual increase. Datong pointed out that due to the on-site installation of some power new energy businesses, which affected the delivery time, and the original planned shipment of power equipment in May was postponed to June, it dragged down the revenue performance in May.

summary_en: Shen Nao (2450-TW) held a forum today (10th). Shen Nao said that in the first quarter, non-operating income decreased by about 40% compared with the same period last year, but the company's overall financial situation is still quite sound. Facing the second half of operations, the company will focus its revenue on the shipment of new Apple mobile phones with AI topics, in line with the continued expansion of e-commerce.

title_en: Taiwan stock market turmoil intensifies, foreign investors double bullish stocks lead gains and resist falls
summary_en: Taiwan stocks have corrected their gains in recent days, and the market has been volatile. Experts believe that before the short-term selling pressure is released, it is advisable to operate cautiously and flexibly. Yushan Gold (2884) and other "double long operation stocks" that have both overbuying by foreign investors and covering positions through borrowing and selling have a chip advantage and indicator significance, and are expected to lead the rise and resist the fall in the market outlook.

summary: 光隆今日公布最新營收資訊，光隆 2026 年 5 月營收 8.89 億元，月增 44%、年增 4.4%，重回年增長軌道。累計 2026 年 1-5 月營收 29.5 億元，年減 12.1%。光隆並預期，第二季獲利將優於去年同期。

title_en: Guanglong’s revenue in May increased to 889 million yuan on a monthly basis and on a year-on-year basis. It is estimated that all business groups will recover simultaneously in Q3
summary_en: Guanglong announced its latest revenue information today. Guanglong's revenue in May 2026 was 889 million yuan, a monthly increase of 44% and an annual increase of 4.4%, returning to the annual growth track. Cumulative revenue from January to May 2026 was 2.95 billion yuan, an annual decrease of 12.1%. Guanglong also expects second-quarter profits to be better than the same period last year.

title: 台積電不排除因通膨漲價！稱AI不是泡沫、否認海外建廠是因政治施壓
summary: 台積電財務長黃仁昭接受 BBC 專訪表示，通膨已推升營運成本，公司不排除未來調漲晶片代工價格，但不會出現大幅漲價。同時強調 AI 並非泡沫，最先進製程將持續留在台灣，海外擴產主要來自客戶需求而非地緣政治壓力。
title_zh: 台積電不排除因通膨漲價！稱AI不是泡沫、否認海外建廠是因政治施壓
summary_zh: 台積電財務長黃仁昭接受 BBC 專訪表示，通膨已推升營運成本，公司不排除未來調漲晶片代工價格，但不會出現大幅漲價。同時強調 AI 並非泡沫，最先進製程將持續留在台灣，海外擴產主要來自客戶需求而非地緣政治壓力。
title_en: TSMC does not rule out price increases due to inflation! Says AI is not a bubble and denies that building overseas factories is due to political pressure
summary_en: In an exclusive interview with the BBC, TSMC Chief Financial Officer Huang Renzhao said that inflation has pushed up operating costs and the company does not rule out raising chip foundry prices in the future, but there will not be a significant price increase. At the same time, it emphasized that AI is not a bubble, and the most advanced manufacturing processes will continue to remain in Taiwan. Overseas production expansion mainly comes from customer demand rather than geopolitical pressure.

title_en: Brokerage firms’ fundraising surge continues! Fubon Securities plans to issue 5 billion yuan of subordinated bonds
summary_en: Taiwanese stocks have continued to hit highs this year, driven by AI themes and capital market conditions. Market trading volume has remained at a high level, and demand for brokerage margin trading and unlimited-purpose loan lending has increased simultaneously. Fubon Gold (2881) announced on the 10th that its subsidiary Fubon Securities will issue NT$5 billion in unsecured sub-prime ordinary corporate bonds to further enhance financial resilience and add to the recent wave of fund-raising by securities firms.

title: 門診手術日增衝擊醫療險理賠　金管會邀保險業研商
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北10日電）金管會今天邀保險業開會探討醫療險理賠3大議題，包括住院手術改為門診手術後，是否放寬給予住院理賠；三班護病比入法引起「一日手術」理賠界定，以及在宅急症照護保險。其中，針對一日手術是否可擴及醫療險的住院理賠，業者多認為不宜放寬，應回歸保單契約條款。

title_en: The increasing number of outpatient surgeries affects medical insurance claims. The Financial Supervisory Commission invites the insurance industry to discuss
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 10th) The Financial Supervisory Commission today invited the insurance industry to hold a meeting to discuss three major issues in medical insurance claims, including whether to relax inpatient claims after inpatient surgeries are changed to outpatient surgeries; the definition of "one-day surgery" claims due to the introduction of three shifts of nursing staff into the law, and home emergency care insurance. Among them, as to whether one-day surgery can be extended to hospitalization claims under medical insurance, many industry players believe that it is not appropriate to relax the policy and should return to the terms of the policy contract.

title_en: Taiwan Kangsheng Biosimilar Drug Recognition Authorization Fund, May Revenue 100 Million Yuan, Double-digit Growth Month-to-Month
summary_en: Taiwan Kangsheng's revenue in May was 117 million yuan, with double-digit growth every month. The cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 507 million yuan. Tai Kangsheng pointed out that the recognition of authorization fees for the biosimilar drug EG1206A in May, coupled with the transfer of the existing CDMO project to Zhubei and the start of GMP production preparatory work for the new project in May, pushed up the revenue performance in May.

title_en: The European and Chinese bicycle markets are growing hugely, and Merida’s revenue increased year-on-year in May
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Pan Zhiyi, Taipei, 10th) Bicycle factory Juju Group announced today that its consolidated revenue in May was NT$5.357 billion, a 6% increase from the same period last year; the cumulative consolidated revenue in the first five months was NT$23.428 billion, a year-on-year decrease of 15%. Merida's consolidated revenue in May was 2.285 billion yuan, an annual increase of 18%; the cumulative consolidated revenue in the first five months was 9.968 billion yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 17%.

title: 〈房產〉生育率低下卻偏愛萌寵毛小孩  全台15縣市「毛孩比小孩多」
summary: 房仲業者觀察農業部與內政部資料，全台 2025 年家犬與家貓預估總數達 320.5 萬隻，但相比同年 0-14 歲幼年人口僅約 268.2 萬人，其中更有 15 縣市的貓犬數量遠超小孩。

title_en: <Real Estate> The fertility rate is low but they prefer cute furry babies. There are more furry babies than children in 15 counties and cities in Taiwan.
summary_en: Real estate agents observed data from the Ministry of Agriculture and the Ministry of the Interior. The total number of domestic dogs and cats in Taiwan is estimated to reach 3.205 million in 2025, but compared with the population of children aged 0-14 in the same year, it is only about 2.682 million. Among them, the number of cats and dogs in 15 counties and cities far exceeds that of children.

title_en: <Focus Stocks> Satellite laser connection SpaceX theme rammed, Ryder Optoelectronics-KY bucked the trend and hit the daily limit of 600 yuan
summary_en: Optical fiber passive component factory Ryder Optoelectronics - KY (7717-TW) benefited from the hot topic of low-orbit satellites. Today (10th), the stock price was not afraid of the sharp decline of the market. It opened lower and higher in early trading. During the session, with the entry of large orders, the price limit was turned on. It not only broke through the daily limit of 654 yuan, but also successfully recovered the monthly and short-term moving averages, standing back at the 600 yuan mark.

title_en: Demand for AI continues to strengthen, manufacturing investment exceeds 700 billion yuan in first quarter, up 14.5% year-on-year
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zeng Yuting, Taipei, 10th) The Ministry of Economic Affairs today announced an overview of manufacturing investment and operations in the first quarter of this year. Benefiting from the continued boom in demand for AI, high-performance computing and cloud data services, which has driven semiconductor companies to expand advanced processes and high-end packaging and testing production capacity, the domestic fixed asset purchases in the manufacturing industry in the first quarter reached NT$700.1 billion, a quarterly increase of 1.3% and an annual increase of 14.5%.

title_en: Datong: Shipment of power equipment postponed to June, revenue in May dropped 13% monthly
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Pan Zhiyi, Taipei, 10th) Datong Corporation announced today that its consolidated revenue in May was NT$3.582 billion. Due to the impact of some new power energy businesses' cooperation with customers on on-site installation, delivery delays, and the original planned shipment of power equipment from May to June, revenue in May fell by 14.3% year-on-year and 13.45% month-on-month. The cumulative revenue in the first five months was 19.209 billion yuan, an annual increase of 1.02%.

title: 美科技股震盪擴大 美國電力 ETF 具防禦特性、定期定額人數成長猛
summary: 近期美科技股遇高估值逆風，市場獲利賣壓湧現，造成以科技股為主的那斯達克指數，6月以來跌幅擴大，顯示資金紛紛撤出科技股，轉向公用事業、必需消費股避險，其中美國電力股擁有公用基建防禦特性，兼具AI能源基建雙題材，今年以來持續吸引定期定額扣款人數成長，根據投信投顧公會統計，截至2026年4月底，海外電力能源ETF定期定額人數表現，以新光美國電力基建ETF（009805）每月扣款人數增加2,626人最多，人數增幅約179%，最新規模也突破百億達109.21億元，成為目前規模最大的海外能源ETF。
title_zh: 美科技股震盪擴大 美國電力 ETF 具防禦特性、定期定額人數成長猛
summary_zh: 近期美科技股遇高估值逆風，市場獲利賣壓湧現，造成以科技股為主的那斯達克指數，6月以來跌幅擴大，顯示資金紛紛撤出科技股，轉向公用事業、必需消費股避險，其中美國電力股擁有公用基建防禦特性，兼具AI能源基建雙題材，今年以來持續吸引定期定額扣款人數成長，根據投信投顧公會統計，截至2026年4月底，海外電力能源ETF定期定額人數表現，以新光美國電力基建ETF（009805）每月扣款人數增加2,626人最多，人數增幅約179%，最新規模也突破百億達109.21億元，成為目前規模最大的海外能源ETF。
title_en: U.S. technology stocks fluctuated and expanded. The U.S. power ETF has defensive characteristics and the number of regular quotas has increased sharply.
summary_en: Recently, U.S. technology stocks have encountered headwinds of high valuations, and market profit selling pressure has emerged, causing the Nasdaq index, which is dominated by technology stocks, to expand its decline since June. This shows that funds have withdrawn from technology stocks and turned to public utilities and consumer staples stocks for risk avoidance. Among them, U.S. power stocks have the defensive characteristics of public infrastructure and have dual themes of AI energy infrastructure. This year, they have continued to attract an increase in the number of regular fixed deductions. According to statistics from the Investment Trust and Investment Consultants Association, as of the end of April 2026, among the regular quotas of overseas power energy ETFs, Shin Kong U.S. Power Infrastructure ETF (009805) has the largest increase in the number of monthly debits of 2,626 people, an increase of approximately 179%. The latest scale has also exceeded 10 billion and reached 10.921 billion yuan, making it currently the largest overseas energy ETF.

title: 散戶資金越跌越買 主動式 ETF 成交量竄升成焦點
summary: 中東地緣政治風險升溫，市場避險情緒轉濃，台股10日開低走低跌破44K關卡。然而，大盤震盪並未澆熄台灣投資人的進場意願，反而激發越跌越買的動力，宛如當年叱吒外匯市場的日本渡邊太太。在資金湧入下，ETF成交量持續放大，其中主動式ETF更成為盤面吸金焦點，台灣的散戶大軍展現了驚人的越跌越買鋼鐵意志。
title_zh: 散戶資金越跌越買 主動式 ETF 成交量竄升成焦點

title_en: The more retail funds fall, the more they buy, and active ETF trading volume surges into focus
summary_en: Geopolitical risks in the Middle East have heated up, and market risk aversion has become stronger. Taiwan stocks opened lower on the 10th and fell below the 44K mark. However, the market shock did not extinguish Taiwanese investors' willingness to enter the market. Instead, it stimulated the motivation to buy more as the prices fell, just like Japan's Mrs. Watanabe who dominated the foreign exchange market back then. With the influx of funds, the trading volume of ETFs continues to increase, and active ETFs have become the focus of attracting gold. Taiwan's retail investors have shown an astonishing iron will to buy more as they fall.

title_en: China Airlines' revenue hits record high in May; Tigerair and Starlux simultaneously achieve success
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Jiang Mingyan, Taipei, 10th) China Airlines' consolidated revenue in May was NT$21.23 billion, a record high for a single month in the past. Benefiting from the booming passenger market, cargo operations revenue increased by 53.5% year-on-year; Tigerair Taiwan's revenue in May was a record high for the same period in history, and StarLux Airline's May revenue and cargo revenue both hit record highs.

summary: 電子特殊氣體供應商兆捷科技（6959）10日公布5月營收5,761萬元，年增55.11％、月增4.2％；前五月累計營收2.62億元，年減7.66%。受惠高階氣體產品穩健成長，帶動營收年、月雙增。

title_en: Zhaojie's revenue in May increased by 55% year-on-year, Electronic Special Gas Q4 moves towards mass production
summary_en: Electronic special gas supplier Zhaojie Technology (6959) announced on the 10th that its May revenue was 57.61 million yuan, an annual increase of 55.11% and a monthly increase of 4.2%; the cumulative revenue in the first five months was 262 million yuan, an annual decrease of 7.66%. Benefiting from the steady growth of high-end gas products, revenue increased year-on-year and month-on-month.
