title_en: Eastern Wind Energy's revenue hits record high in May; submarine cables and natural gas drive growth
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Jiang Mingyan, Taipei, 10th) Dongfang Wind Energy’s May revenue reached a record high of 1.479 billion yuan, an annual increase of 38%, and an annual increase of 48% in the first five months; AI submarine cables have entered the peak of recognition; the natural gas business layout drives medium and long-term growth. By the end of this year, it will join hands with DeepOcean to expand the European natural gas market and lay out offshore energy business opportunities in Southeast Asia.

title: TASA與看見．齊柏林基金會簽MoA　攜手衛星影像校正
summary: （中央社記者趙敏雅台北10日電）國家太空中心（TASA）今天與看見．齊柏林基金會簽署合作協議（MoA），攜手教育推廣與衛星影像校正等。TASA董事長吳誠文表示，已故導演齊柏林之子齊廷洹延續父親的環境教育推廣，齊柏林衛星也以太空科技延續齊柏林精神，透過不同視角讓更多人重新認識台灣。

title_en: TASA and seeing. Zeppelin Foundation signs MoA to work with satellite image correction
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhao Minya, Taipei, 10th) The National Space Center (TASA) today met with Jianjian. The Zeppelin Foundation signed a cooperation agreement (MoA) to join hands in educational promotion and satellite image correction. TASA Chairman Wu Chengwen said that Qi Tinghuan, the son of the late director Zeppelin, continued his father's environmental education promotion, and Zeppelin Satellite also continued the Zeppelin spirit with space technology, allowing more people to re-understand Taiwan through different perspectives.

title: VIX 恐慌指數低於平均 美股逢低分批長線布局契機佳
summary: 雖然美股於近期震盪，不過觀察恐慌指數仍維持低檔，近期於20附近遊走，尚未觸及歷史上常見的恐慌區間。法人認為，美股本波下跌可視為調整配置與布局優質資產的機會，而非全面降低風險部位的訊號，加上美股下半年平均表現都不錯，都有約一成以上的漲幅空間，勝率也都有八成以上，建議可把握美股逢低分批布局的好時機。
title_zh: VIX 恐慌指數低於平均 美股逢低分批長線布局契機佳
summary_zh: 雖然美股於近期震盪，不過觀察恐慌指數仍維持低檔，近期於20附近遊走，尚未觸及歷史上常見的恐慌區間。法人認為，美股本波下跌可視為調整配置與布局優質資產的機會，而非全面降低風險部位的訊號，加上美股下半年平均表現都不錯，都有約一成以上的漲幅空間，勝率也都有八成以上，建議可把握美股逢低分批布局的好時機。
title_en: The VIX panic index is lower than average, and U.S. stocks have good opportunities for long-term layout in batches on dips.
summary_en: Although the U.S. stock market has been volatile recently, the panic index remains low. It has been hovering around 20 recently and has not yet touched the panic range that is common in history. The legal person believes that the current decline in U.S. stocks can be seen as an opportunity to adjust allocation and deploy high-quality assets, rather than a signal to comprehensively reduce risk positions. In addition, the average performance of U.S. stocks in the second half of the year is good, with more than 10% room for growth, and the winning rate is also more than 80%. It is recommended to seize the good opportunity to deploy in batches when U.S. stocks dip.

title: 台中海線停電　台電初判環境潮濕致設備絕緣不良
summary: （中央社記者謝怡璇台北10日電）台中市海線地區今天下午2時許，發生大甲、沙鹿、清水等地區停電。台電初步研判，疑因近期豪雨不斷，環境潮濕導致變電所現有匯流排比壓器設備絕緣不良，引發停電。

title_en: Taichung sea line power outage: Taipower initially determined that the humid environment caused poor equipment insulation
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Xie Yixuan, Taipei, 10th) Power outages occurred in Dajia, Shalu, Qingshui and other areas in the Haixian area of ​​Taichung City at around 2 pm today. According to Taipower's preliminary research, it is suspected that the recent heavy rains and humid environment caused poor insulation of the existing busbar voltage comparator equipment in the substation, causing the power outage.

title: CAE市場持續擴大　虎門科技5月營收創同期新高
summary: 虎門科技（6791）10日公告5月合併營收5,893萬元，較去年同期成長5.6％；累計今年前五月營收3.29億元，年增9.7％，當中5月及前五月營收已連續3個月同步創歷年同期新高。虎門直接受惠於電腦輔助工程（CAE）市場需求持續擴大，營收已創下連續41個月單月營收年增表現，營運規模穩健擴增。

title_en: The CAE market continues to expand. Humen Technology’s revenue in May hit a new high for the same period
summary_en: Humen Technology (6791) announced on the 10th that its consolidated revenue in May was 58.93 million yuan, an increase of 5.6% over the same period last year; its cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 329 million yuan, an increase of 9.7% year-on-year. The revenue in May and the first five months has hit a record high for the same period in the past for three consecutive months. Humen has directly benefited from the continued expansion of market demand for computer-aided engineering (CAE). Its revenue has achieved 41 consecutive months of annual revenue growth in a single month, and its operating scale has steadily expanded.

title_en: The Korean stock market exploded into the 8,000-point era. Experts: Commercial law revision is the key
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Yang Qifang, Seoul, 10th) The South Korean stock market has performed strongly in the past year, with the Korea Composite Stock Price Index (KOSPI) exceeding the 8,000-point mark. Kim Se-hwan, president of the Capital Market Research Institute, said that the main reason is that the "Commercial Code" was revised three times last year after the Lee Jae-myung government took office. The government plays a very important role and hopes to maintain consistent policies.

title: 中租前五月稅後純益年成長4% EPS 4.91元
summary: 中租-KY（5871）今（10）日公告2026年5月自結合併營收為新台幣83.7億元，較去年同期成長1%，前五月累計營收為新台幣403.2億元，年減2%，5月自結合併稅後純益19.1億元，年成長21％、月成長11月，累計前五月合併稅後純益為91.9億元，年成長4%，累計每股稅後純益（EPS）為4.91元，主要以台灣和東協地區業務升溫較顯著。
title_zh: 中租前五月稅後純益年成長4% EPS 4.91元
summary_zh: 中租-KY（5871）今（10）日公告2026年5月自結合併營收為新台幣83.7億元，較去年同期成長1%，前五月累計營收為新台幣403.2億元，年減2%，5月自結合併稅後純益19.1億元，年成長21％、月成長11月，累計前五月合併稅後純益為91.9億元，年成長4%，累計每股稅後純益（EPS）為4.91元，主要以台灣和東協地區業務升溫較顯著。
title_en: Chailease’s after-tax net income in the first five months grew by 4% annually, with EPS of 4.91 yuan.
summary_en: Chailease-KY (5871) announced today (10th) that its self-consolidated consolidated revenue in May 2026 was NT$8.37 billion, an increase of 1% from the same period last year. The cumulative revenue in the first five months was NT$40.32 billion, a year-on-year decrease of 2%. After tax, self-consolidated consolidation in May Net profit was 1.91 billion yuan, with an annual growth of 21% and a monthly growth of 11 months. The cumulative consolidated after-tax net profit for the first five months was 9.19 billion yuan, with an annual growth of 4%. The cumulative after-tax net profit per share (EPS) was 4.91 yuan, mainly in Taiwan and the ASEAN region. The business has heated up significantly.

title_en: The profits of the three telecom giants are released, and Taiwan’s majors retain the title of EPS king in the first five months
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Jiang Mingyan, Taipei, Taiwan, 10th) The three telecommunications companies announced their May profits. Taiwan's May EPS was 0.5 yuan, and the profit per share in the first five months was 2.34 yuan. It beat Chunghwa Power's 0.44 yuan and 2.22 yuan, and Far EasTone Telecom's 0.37 yuan and 1.76 yuan, regaining the single-month EPS king and retaining the EPS king in the previous five months. Chunghwa Power's revenue and EBITDA in May were new highs for the same period; Far EasTone's operating income increased significantly.

title: 梅雨助攻估全台進帳3.7億噸　烏山頭蓄水率重回2成
summary: （中央社記者謝怡璇台北10日電）梅雨帶來連日大雨，據水利署統計，此波降雨全台水庫預計進帳3.7億噸，有2億噸水已入庫。其中，南化、曾文及烏山頭水庫預估入流量合計超過1.3億噸，烏山頭水庫蓄水率更時隔15天站回2成，預估可持續回升。

title_en: Meiyu helped Taiwan earn an estimated 370 million tons, and Wushantou’s water storage rate returned to 20%
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Xie Yixuan, Taipei, 10th) The plum rain brings consecutive days of heavy rain. According to statistics from the Water Resources Department, Taiwan's reservoirs are expected to receive 370 million tons of rain during this wave of rainfall, and 200 million tons of water have been stored in the reservoir. Among them, the total estimated inflow of Nanhua, Zengwen and Wusantou reservoirs exceeds 130 million tons. The water storage rate of Wushandou Reservoir has returned to 20% after 15 days, and is expected to continue to rise.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter He Xiuling, Taipei, 10th) Food leader Uni-President Enterprise announced today that its revenue in May was NT$59.18 billion, an annual increase of 2.7%, a new high for the same period. Uni-President told a reporter from Central News Agency that it benefited from the growth of the food industry and reinvestment in two major enterprises, including Uni-President Enterprise China Holdings and Uni-President Supermarket.

title_en: 〈Focus stocks〉AI enthusiasm crowds out pan-e-sports promotions. Momentum-KY's revenue in May declined both year-on-year and fell more than half the limit.
summary_en: Dynamics announced that its revenue in May was 63.86 million yuan, a double decline in both years and months. The cumulative revenue in the first five months was 479 million yuan, a year-on-year decrease of nearly 40%. Dynamics pointed out that mainly due to the reallocation of resources due to the AI ​​boom, pan-esports customers have become more cautious in purchasing goods, which dragged down revenue performance in May and also made the stock price weak today, falling by more than half the limit.

title_en: <Real Estate> Kaohsiung’s household density reached a new high in the first quarter. The high household density in the Protein District outperformed the Yolk District in terms of household density.
summary_en: Kaohsiung houses are getting built more and more, and people are getting more and more crowded. According to statistics from the Kaohsiung City Housing Statistics Information Network, the household density in Kaohsiung City has been increasing year by year. As of the first quarter of this year, the city's household density reached 411 households per square kilometer, a new high. Among various administrative districts, the household density in Xinxing District reached 12,727 households per square kilometer, making it the administrative district with the highest household density in the city.

title: 郭哲榮：暴漲+暴跌=空頭？
summary: 近期台股猶如坐雲霄飛車，盤勢震盪劇烈：週一大跌 1500 多點，週二立刻報復性大漲 1200 多點，結果今天又重挫將近 1500 點，直接把前一天的漲幅通通回吐。面對這樣劇烈的暴漲暴跌，許多投資人心驚膽跳，紛紛詢問這是否代表空頭市場已經來臨？雖然這幾天的盤面波動極大，但我認為這並非空頭反撲，而是因為最近一週市場正密集面臨幾件重大總經事件的干擾，導致資金在短線上出現恐慌與觀望。

title_en: Guo Zherong: Skyrocketing + Plunging = Short?
summary_en: The Taiwan stock market has been on a roller coaster ride recently, with violent market fluctuations: it fell by more than 1,500 points on Monday, then immediately retaliated by rising by more than 1,200 points on Tuesday. As a result, it fell by nearly 1,500 points today, giving up all the gains from the previous day. Faced with such a violent rise and fall, many investors were frightened and asked whether this meant that the short market had arrived? Although the market has been extremely volatile in the past few days, I think this is not a short-selling counterattack, but because the market has been intensively facing the interference of several major economic events in the past week, causing funds to panic and wait and see in the short term.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Lu Yanci, Taipei, 10th) The Treasury Department of the Ministry of Finance has actively promoted the electronic operation of treasury payments in recent years. According to statistics, last year, NT$4.9597 billion was allocated to the treasury, and 2.16 million payees were paid. The electronic operation of treasury payments and the rate of inter-bank remittance of payees to collect treasury funds reached 99.01% and 98.96%, respectively, an increase of 3.8 percentage points and 1.99 percentage points from 2015.

title_en: Hot money continues to flow out before the US CPI is announced, and the New Taiwan dollar depreciates by 5 consecutive times and hits a new low in nearly 2 months.
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Pan Ziyu, Taipei, 10th) The United States is about to release the Consumer Price Index (CPI) for May. If inflation heats up, it may strengthen market expectations for the Federal Reserve to raise interest rates. Before the release of key data, foreign investors continued to adopt adjustment strategies, aggressively overselling Taiwan stocks and remittances. The stock exchange rate fell simultaneously. The New Taiwan dollar closed at 31.668 yuan against the US dollar, down 5 cents, setting a new low in the past two months.

summary_en: Gogolook (6902), a trustworthy technology service provider, announced today (10th) that its May consolidated revenue was 101 million yuan, a monthly increase of 2% and an annual increase of 27.7%. Cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 503 million yuan, an annual increase of 25.7%, and also a record high for the same period in history.

title_en: Billionaire Youde Feng hopes the national team will take over. Guo Taiqiang: Sorry for the small shareholders
summary_en: When Senwei Energy (referred to as: Senwei) was contracted by Fuwei Energy to undertake the second phase of the Taipower Offshore Wind Power Generation Project (referred to as: Taipower Phase 2), it suffered a series of natural and man-made disasters and misjudged failures, and even reached the point where it had to be delisted. It was quite heartbreaking in the eyes of small shareholders, and the hard-earned money became wallpaper. What the industry is more concerned about is, "Taipower's second phase is like this, what about the other larger Youde wind field?" In this regard, Guo Taiqiang, chairman of Zhengwei and Senwei, revealed in an exclusive interview with this magazine: "We have been looking for someone to talk to, hoping to let other players take the lead." This means that Senwei will take a back seat but still maintain a stake. "Full text..."

summary: 力積電（6770）於 2026年6月9日透過發行海外存託憑證及員工認股籌資8.86億美元，本次發行之海外存託憑證(GDS)將於盧森堡證券交易所掛牌，每單位GDS為15股力積電普通股，發行價格為 31.65美元；GDS訂價相當於台股每股新台幣66.68元，較9日該公司股票平均成交價約折價5.73%。力積電將依未來營運發展善用資金購置機器設備、導入新技術，以強化國際競爭力。 《詳全文...》

title_en: Power Semiconductor successfully raised US$886 million to strengthen investment in future momentum
summary_en: Power Semiconductor (6770) On June 9, 2026, US$886 million was raised through the issuance of overseas depositary receipts and employee stock subscriptions. The overseas depositary receipts (GDS) of this issuance will be listed on the Luxembourg Stock Exchange. Each unit of GDS is 15 shares of Power Semiconductor Manufacturing Co., Ltd., and the issue price is US$31.65. The GDS price is equivalent to NT$66.68 per Taiwanese stock, which is approximately 5.73% discount to the average trading price of the company's stock on the 9th. Based on future operational development, Power Semiconductor will make good use of funds to purchase machinery and equipment and introduce new technologies to strengthen its international competitiveness. "Full text..."

summary: 工業電腦廠磐儀（3594）10日公布今年5月營收為 2.61億元，月增38.12%、年增53.27%，創單月歷史新高紀錄；累計磐儀今年前五個月營收為9.65億元，年增40.53%。

title_en: ARBOR's May revenue increased by 38.12% monthly, hitting a new monthly high
summary_en: Industrial computer manufacturer ARBOR (3594) announced on the 10th that its revenue in May this year was 261 million yuan, a monthly increase of 38.12% and an annual increase of 53.27%, setting a new monthly record. ARBOR's cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 965 million yuan, an annual increase of 40.53%.

title: 東哥遊艇5月營收227萬元 年減99.7%
summary: 台灣豪華遊艇製造商東哥遊艇（8478）今（10）日公告5月合併營收227萬元，較去年同期減少99.7%。該公司指出，主要是因產品單價高，營收表現受產品組合差異而有所波動，此屬營業特性。

title_en: Dongge Yachting’s revenue in May was 2.27 million yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 99.7%
summary_en: Taiwanese luxury yacht manufacturer Dongge Yachts (8478) announced today (10th) that its consolidated revenue in May was 2.27 million yuan, a decrease of 99.7% compared with the same period last year. The company pointed out that this is mainly due to the high unit price of products and revenue performance fluctuating due to differences in product mix. This is an operating characteristic.

title_en: Taiwan wins the telecom profit per share king! Self-financed earnings per share in May hit a 22-month high of 0.5 yuan
summary_en: Taiwan Telecom (3045) announced its operating performance in May on the 10th. Benefiting from its three major engines, it continued to achieve good results. The net profit per share in May was 0.5 yuan, a new high performance in 22 months. The cumulative net profit per share for the first five months was 2.34 yuan. The single-month and cumulative net profit per share surpassed Chunghwa Electronics (2412), and it continued to win the telecom profit per share king.

title: LINE Pay擴展消費場景　5月營收7.47億創單月次高
summary: （中央社記者吳家豪台北10日電）行動支付品牌LINE Pay今天公布5月營收約新台幣7.47億元，年增17.2%，創單月歷史次高，主要受惠於多元消費場景持續擴展及母親節檔期消費需求，帶動5月整體交易表現穩健成長。
title_zh: LINE Pay擴展消費場景　5月營收7.47億創單月次高

title_en: LINE Pay expands consumption scenarios; revenue in May reached 747 million, the second highest in a single month
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Wu Jiahao, Taipei, 10th) Mobile payment brand LINE Pay announced today that its revenue in May was approximately NT$747 million, an annual increase of 17.2%, the second highest in single-month history. This was mainly due to the continued expansion of diversified consumption scenarios and consumer demand during Mother’s Day, which drove the overall transaction performance in May to grow steadily.

title: 美時營收／5月23.24億元、年增106% Alvogen 合併效應持續發酵
summary: 美時（1795）10日公布5月營收23.24億元，年增106%；前五月累計營收140.54億元，年增67%。美時表示，5月營收大幅年增，主要受惠於Alvogen的合併；今年前五月累計營收也大幅成長，除持續受惠於Alvogen的合併外，B2B業務強勁成長，也對營收帶來貢獻。
title_zh: 美時營收／5月23.24億元、年增106% Alvogen 合併效應持續發酵

title_en: Lamex’s revenue/May 2.324 billion, an annual increase of 106%, Alvogen’s merger effect continues to ferment
summary_en: Lamex (1795) announced on the 10th that its May revenue was 2.324 billion yuan, an annual increase of 106%; the cumulative revenue in the first five months was 14.054 billion yuan, an annual increase of 67%. Lamex stated that revenue in May increased significantly year-on-year, mainly due to the merger of Alvogen; cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year also increased significantly. In addition to continuing to benefit from the merger of Alvogen, the strong growth of B2B business also contributed to revenue.

title_en: Dayan Biomedical’s revenue in May was 200 million yuan, a year-on-year increase of 29.1%
summary_en: Dayan Biomedical (7780) announced on the 10th that its consolidated revenue in May reached 202 million yuan, an annual increase of 29.16%; from January to May this year, the cumulative consolidated revenue reached 838 million yuan, an increase of 36.53% compared with the same period last year, both setting new highs for the same period in the past, demonstrating the brand's continued upward growth momentum.

title: 巨大、美利達今年首次單月營收較去年同期成長
summary: 自行車雙雄5月單月營收較去年同期轉為正成長，巨大集團（9921）2026年5月份合併營收53.57億元，較去年同期成長5.81%，從元月年減兩成、2月年減四成之後，情況逐漸改善，成為今年首次單月較去年同期成長。前五月累計合併營收234.28億元，較去年同期減少15.5%。
title_zh: 巨大、美利達今年首次單月營收較去年同期成長

title_en: Huge and Merida’s first monthly revenue growth this year compared with the same period last year
summary_en: The bicycle duo's monthly revenue in May turned positive compared to the same period last year. Huge Group (9921)'s consolidated revenue in May 2026 was 5.357 billion yuan, an increase of 5.81% compared with the same period last year. After a year-on-year decrease of 20% in January and a 40% year-on-year decrease in February, the situation gradually improved, becoming the first single-month growth this year compared with the same period last year. The cumulative consolidated revenue in the first five months was 23.428 billion yuan, a decrease of 15.5% compared with the same period last year.

summary: （中央社記者吳家豪台北10日電）工業電腦廠磐儀看準全球邊緣人工智慧（Edge AI）與自動化需求持續升溫，今天公布5月合併營收約新台幣2.61億元，年增53.3%，創單月歷史新高；前5個月累計營收9.65億元，年增40.5%。

title_en: ARBOR's revenue reaches new high in May, seizing edge AI and automation business opportunities
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Wu Jiahao, Taipei, 10th) Industrial computer manufacturer ARBOR, targeting global demand for edge artificial intelligence (Edge AI) and automation, continues to heat up. Today it announced consolidated revenue in May of approximately NT$261 million, an annual increase of 53.3%, a record high in a single month; cumulative revenue in the first five months was NT$965 million, an annual increase of 40.5%.

title: 台積電現金股利6元11日除息　影響台股指數約47點
summary: （中央社記者曾仁凱台北10日電）台積電明天將除息，每股配發現金股利新台幣6元，台灣證券交易所今天特別公告提醒，台積電明天除息發行市值將因此減少約1555億元，占發行量加權股價指數約47.84點。

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zeng Renkai, Taipei, 10th) TSMC will be ex-dividend tomorrow, with a cash dividend of NT$6 per share. The Taiwan Stock Exchange made a special announcement today to remind that TSMC’s ex-dividend issue tomorrow will reduce its market value by approximately NT$155.5 billion, accounting for approximately 47.84 points of the issuance-weighted stock price index.

title: 良維5月營收9.36億元創高 下半年看旺
summary: 良維（6290）10日公布5月營收為9.36億元，為歷史次高，同期新高，月增2.71%，年增8.61%；今年前五個月營收44.58億元，創同期新高，年增9.18%，在大電流產品出貨暢旺下，6月業績將挑戰新高。

title_en: Liangwei’s revenue hit a high of 936 million yuan in May and is expected to be prosperous in the second half of the year
summary_en: Liangwei (6290) announced on the 10th that its revenue in May was 936 million yuan, the second highest in history and a new high in the same period, with a monthly increase of 2.71% and an annual increase of 8.61%. In the first five months of this year, its revenue was 4.458 billion yuan, a new high in the same period, with an annual increase of 9.18%. With the shipment of high-current products booming, its performance in June will challenge new highs.

title: 中華電攜手日本NTT　成立IOWN AI科技基金
summary: （中央社記者江明晏台北10日電）中華電信今天宣布，攜手日本電信電話株式會社NTT及國際策略夥伴，共同設立IOWN AI Fund科技基金，該基金將透過投資人工智慧（AI）時代的尖端技術，擴大IOWN（創新光學與無線網路）生態系並創造全新商機。

title_en: Chunghwa Electronics joins hands with Japan's NTT to establish IOWN AI Technology Fund
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Jiang Mingyan, Taipei, 10th) Chunghwa Telecom announced today that it has joined hands with Nippon Telegraph and Telephone Corporation NTT and international strategic partners to jointly establish the IOWN AI Fund technology fund. The fund will expand the IOWN (Innovative Optics and Wireless Networks) ecosystem and create new business opportunities by investing in cutting-edge technologies in the artificial intelligence (AI) era.

title_en: Gold is booming. Citi: It fell another 20% in September and back-tested $3,500.
summary_en: The price of gold has plummeted since hitting an all-time high of US$5,594.82 per ounce on January 29. Citi analysts have recently warned that the short-term decline in gold prices may not be over yet. If the Strait of Hormuz remains closed until the end of summer, the price of gold may drop to US$3,500 per ounce, which is 20% lower than the current market price. "Full text..."

title: 茂訊強固電腦軍工訂單強勁 看好今年營運優於去年
summary: 茂訊（3213）10日召開股東會，展望後市，茂訊預期今年強固電腦及通路事業皆維持成長態勢。董事長沈頤同表示，茂訊目前強固電腦營收已超越通路業務，將成為公司最主要的成長引擎，在全球各國增加軍費開支下，茂訊強固電腦在軍工領域訂單持續成長，預估今年整體營收成長幅度可望落在10~30%，獲利表現亦將優於去年。
title_zh: 茂訊強固電腦軍工訂單強勁 看好今年營運優於去年

title_en: Maoxun has strong computer and military orders and is optimistic that this year’s operations will be better than last year’s
summary_en: Maoxun (3213) held a shareholders' meeting on the 10th. Looking ahead to the market outlook, Maoxun expects that both its computer and distribution businesses will maintain growth this year. Chairman Shen Yitong said that Maoxun's rugged computer revenue has surpassed the channel business and will become the company's most important growth engine. As countries around the world increase military expenditures, Maoxun rugged computer orders in the military industry continue to grow. It is estimated that the overall revenue growth rate this year is expected to be 10 to 30%, and profit performance will also be better than last year.

title: 華航集團5月營收212.3億元 創歷年新高
summary: 華航（2610）集團 5 月合併營業收入為 212.30 億元，較去年同期增幅 27.73%，創歷年單月新高。其中客運收入 110.98 億元，較去年同期增幅 11.86%，寫下歷年同期新高；貨運收入 82.63 億元，較去年同期增幅 53.50%，亦較上月增加 12.8%，創下今年新高。
title_zh: 華航集團5月營收212.3億元 創歷年新高

title_en: China Airlines Group’s May revenue reached 21.23 billion yuan, a record high
summary_en: China Airlines (2610) Group’s consolidated operating income in May was 21.230 billion yuan, an increase of 27.73% from the same period last year, setting a new monthly high in history. Among them, passenger revenue was 11.098 billion yuan, an increase of 11.86% over the same period last year, setting a new high for the same period in the past; cargo revenue was 8.263 billion yuan, an increase of 53.50% over the same period last year, and an increase of 12.8% over the previous month, setting a new high this year.

title_en: Foreign investment sales exceeded 93.5 billion yuan! These 4 active ETFs were so popular that they actually bought more than 30,000 shares of the first fund.
summary_en: The Taiwan stock market closed at 43,225.54 points on the 10th, a sharp drop of 1,478.9 points. Among the three major legal entities, only investment funds oversold, while foreign investors sold over 93.574 billion yuan. According to statistics, foreign investors oversold the top ten, and active ETFs accounted for 4. The overselling active unified upgrade 50 (00403A) reached the most with 94,398 contracts, followed by the selling Chaokai Fund (2883) with 92,625 contracts. However, it was favored by foreign investors. The top spot for overselling was First Gold (2892).

title: 欣新網5月營收創高 看旺下半年營運
summary: 全整合電商營運服務商欣新網（2949）今（10）日公告5月合併營收5.84億元，月增14.1%，年增26.1%，創歷年同期新高；累計今年前五月營收24.96億元，年增20.6%，創歷年同期新高紀錄。欣新網表示，受惠於母親節檔期商機，以及品牌客戶對一站式電商解決方案需求持續提升，帶動營收穩健成長。
title_zh: 欣新網5月營收創高 看旺下半年營運
summary_zh: 全整合電商營運服務商欣新網（2949）今（10）日公告5月合併營收5.84億元，月增14.1%，年增26.1%，創歷年同期新高；累計今年前五月營收24.96億元，年增20.6%，創歷年同期新高紀錄。欣新網表示，受惠於母親節檔期商機，以及品牌客戶對一站式電商解決方案需求持續提升，帶動營收穩健成長。
title_en: Xinxin.com’s revenue hits record high in May, optimistic about operations in the second half of the year
summary_en: Xinxin.com (2949), a fully integrated e-commerce operation service provider, announced today (10th) that its consolidated revenue in May was 584 million yuan, a monthly increase of 14.1% and an annual increase of 26.1%, a record high for the same period in previous years; the cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 2.496 billion yuan, an annual increase of 20.6%, a record high for the same period in previous years. Xinxin.com said that it benefited from business opportunities during Mother's Day and the continued increase in demand from brand customers for one-stop e-commerce solutions, driving steady revenue growth.

title_en: Revenues of many major heavy-duty manufacturers hit peaks in May, benefiting from the AI ​​industry’s push for goods
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhong Rongfeng, Taipei, 10th) Major heavy-duty electronics manufacturers have successively announced their May revenue. Yali and Huacheng's revenue in the first five months hit a new high for the same period in the past five months. The May revenue of Shidian and ZTE hit a new high for the same period in the past. This was mainly due to the application of artificial intelligence in the AI ​​industry to drive the purchase of heavy-duty electric equipment.

title: 台積電、群創、富邦媒等10檔明日除息 加權指數將蒸發逾52點
summary: 臺灣證券交易所表示，11日計有台積電（2330）、群創（3481）、富邦媒（8454）、華新（1605）、寶齡富錦（1760）、彰源（2030）、華泰（2329）、德律（3030）、天二科技（6834）、青新-創（6951）等10檔加權指數成分股將除息，其中，台積電市值將減少約1,555億元，將使加權指數蒸發約47.84點。前述10檔指數採樣股票除息後，將使加權指數減少約52.66點。
title_zh: 台積電、群創、富邦媒等10檔明日除息 加權指數將蒸發逾52點
summary_zh: 臺灣證券交易所表示，11日計有台積電（2330）、群創（3481）、富邦媒（8454）、華新（1605）、寶齡富錦（1760）、彰源（2030）、華泰（2329）、德律（3030）、天二科技（6834）、青新-創（6951）等10檔加權指數成分股將除息，其中，台積電市值將減少約1,555億元，將使加權指數蒸發約47.84點。前述10檔指數採樣股票除息後，將使加權指數減少約52.66點。
title_en: Ten stocks including TSMC, Innolux, and Fubon Media will ex-dividend tomorrow, and the weighted index will evaporate by more than 52 points.
summary_en: The Taiwan Stock Exchange stated that on the 11th, there were TSMC (2330), Innolux (3481), Fubon Media (8454), Huaxin (1605), Baoling Fujin (1760), Changyuan (2030), Huatai (2329) , Delu (3030), Tianer Technology (6834), Qingxin-chuang (6951) and other 10 weighted index constituent stocks will go ex-dividend. Among them, TSMC's market value will decrease by approximately 155.5 billion yuan, which will evaporate approximately 47.84 points from the weighted index. After the aforementioned 10 index sampling stocks go ex-dividend, the weighted index will decrease by approximately 52.66 points.

title: 八方雲集5月營收創次高 漢來美食、瓦城、豆府同期新高
summary: 餐飲市場消費動能持續升溫，連鎖餐飲集團5月營收繳出亮眼成績。其中，八方雲集（2753）5月合併營收達8億元，創單月歷史次高及同期新高；漢來美食（1268）、瓦城（2729）及豆府（2752）也同步改寫歷年5月新高，顯示母親節聚餐需求加上展店效益發酵，帶動餐飲業提前迎接暑假旺季商機。
title_zh: 八方雲集5月營收創次高 漢來美食、瓦城、豆府同期新高
summary_zh: 餐飲市場消費動能持續升溫，連鎖餐飲集團5月營收繳出亮眼成績。其中，八方雲集（2753）5月合併營收達8億元，創單月歷史次高及同期新高；漢來美食（1268）、瓦城（2729）及豆府（2752）也同步改寫歷年5月新高，顯示母親節聚餐需求加上展店效益發酵，帶動餐飲業提前迎接暑假旺季商機。
title_en: Bafang Yunji’s revenue hit second-highest in May, while Hi-lai Food, Wa City and Doufu achieved new highs in the same period.
summary_en: The consumption momentum in the catering market continues to heat up, and chain catering groups posted outstanding results in revenue in May. Among them, the consolidated revenue of Bafang Yunji (2753) in May reached 800 million yuan, the second highest in single-month history and a new high in the same period; Hi-Lai Cuisine (1268), Wa City (2729) and Doufu (2752) also set new highs in May, showing that the demand for Mother's Day dinner parties and the fermentation of store benefits have driven the catering industry to welcome the business opportunities of the summer vacation season in advance.

title: 中鋼5月營收300億元年增2% 後市持續正向
summary: 中鋼（2002）10日公布5月合併營收299.5億元，較去年同期293.1億元增加6.4億元、年增2.19%；累計前5月營收1400億元、年減1%。中鋼單月營收維持年增表現，後市正向發展。

title_en: Sinosteel’s revenue in May was RMB 30 billion, up 2% year-on-year, and the market outlook continues to be positive
summary_en: Sinosteel (2002) announced on the 10th that its May consolidated revenue was 29.95 billion yuan, an increase of 640 million yuan from 29.31 billion yuan in the same period last year, an annual increase of 2.19%; the cumulative revenue for the first five months was 140 billion yuan, an annual decrease of 1%. Sinosteel's single-month revenue maintained year-on-year growth performance, and the market outlook is developing positively.

title: 維田5月營收月增27.91% 今年營運季季增
summary: 工業電腦廠維田（6570）公告5月合併營收達1.17億元，月增27.91%，年增32.11%，持續繳出年月雙增佳績。1~5月累計營收4.5億元，較去年同期增加19.23%，營運維持高檔，維田表示，目前多個專案出貨順暢，動能十分強勁，貢獻5月營收超越億元大關，且訂單能見度直達年底。預期今年營運表現將呈現季季增，全年展望樂觀，營收目標雙位數成長。
title_zh: 維田5月營收月增27.91% 今年營運季季增
summary_zh: 工業電腦廠維田（6570）公告5月合併營收達1.17億元，月增27.91%，年增32.11%，持續繳出年月雙增佳績。1~5月累計營收4.5億元，較去年同期增加19.23%，營運維持高檔，維田表示，目前多個專案出貨順暢，動能十分強勁，貢獻5月營收超越億元大關，且訂單能見度直達年底。預期今年營運表現將呈現季季增，全年展望樂觀，營收目標雙位數成長。
title_en: Weitian’s May revenue increased by 27.91% month-on-month, and this year’s operating quarter increased
summary_en: Industrial computer manufacturer Weitian (6570) announced that its consolidated revenue in May reached 117 million yuan, a monthly increase of 27.91% and an annual increase of 32.11%, continuing to achieve double annual and monthly growth. Cumulative revenue from January to May was 450 million yuan, an increase of 19.23% over the same period last year, and operations remained high-end. Weitian said that currently, multiple projects are shipping smoothly and the momentum is very strong, contributing to revenue in May exceeding the 100 million yuan mark, and order visibility will continue until the end of the year. It is expected that this year's operating performance will show quarterly growth, the full-year outlook is optimistic, and the revenue target is double-digit growth.

title: 智冠營收／5月5.61億元 年增7.69%
summary: 智冠科技（5478）公布115年5月合併營收新台幣5.61億元，與上月相當。5月份集團持續推出遊戲產品周年慶活動及版本更新內容，維持產品熱度與玩家活躍度；累計前五月營收30.52億元，年增15.64%，集團各事業群營運持續發展，整體營收維持穩健成長。

title_en: Zhiguan’s revenue/561 million yuan in May, an annual increase of 7.69%
summary_en: Zhiguan Technology (5478) announced consolidated revenue of NT$561 million in May 2015, which was equivalent to the previous month. In May, the group continued to launch game product anniversary events and version updates to maintain product popularity and player activity. The cumulative revenue for the first five months was 3.052 billion yuan, an annual increase of 15.64%. The operations of each business group of the group continued to develop, and the overall revenue maintained steady growth.

title: 森崴下市到底發生什麼事　郭台強「小孩玩大車」始末
summary: 森崴能源（簡稱：森崴）上市不及5年，將於本（6）月23日正式下市，同時也是台灣第一家下市的綠能風電股，引發各界的討論與關心「森崴到底發生什麼事情？」讓3萬多名小股東恐血本無歸。業內人士則是直言，森崴旗下的富崴能源搶標離岸風電2期的財務規劃錯誤，造成今日危機。上（5）月29日，集團大家長暨森崴董事長郭台強接受本刊獨家專訪，坦承用森崴旗下的富崴投標千億風電案是「小孩玩大車」。 《詳全文...》

title_en: What happened when Senwei was off the market? The whole story of Terry Gou's "child playing with a big car"
summary_en: Senquan Energy (abbreviated: Senquan) has been listed for less than five years and will be officially delisted on June 23. It is also the first green energy wind power stock in Taiwan to delist, sparking discussion and concern from all walks of life. Industry insiders, on the other hand, bluntly said that the financial planning error of Fuquan Energy, a subsidiary of Senquan, to grab the bid for the offshore wind power phase 2 caused today's crisis. On May 29, Guo Taiqiang, the head of the group and chairman of Senquan, admitted in an exclusive interview with this magazine, admitting that the bidding for 100 billion wind power with Senquan-owned Fuquan was "a child playing with a big car". "Full text..."

title_en: Zhengling Shareholders Meeting/AI will drive revenue growth by 30% to 50% this year, with orders expected to reach 2027
summary_en: Zhengling (8147) held a shareholders' meeting on the 10th. After the meeting, the company stated that the demand for AI products is strong, and AI revenue this year is expected to grow by 40 to 50%. The legal person estimates that, driven by AI, the overall revenue this year will grow by 30 to 50%. Order visibility has reached 2027, and the new product switch external pluggable optics (XPO) cooling module will also significantly contribute to revenue next year.

title_en: Fubon Media’s revenue in May was 8.987 billion yuan, and the ex-dividend market on the 11th attracted attention
summary_en: momo Fubon Media (8454) announced today (10th) that its consolidated revenue in May was 8.987 billion yuan, a monthly increase of 8.5%, and an annual increase of 4.1%. The cumulative consolidated revenue from January to May this year was 43.86 billion yuan, an annual increase of 1.5%. Fubon Media pointed out that May benefited from the demand for Mother’s Day gifts, and the purchase of beauty and health care, 3C home appliances and other categories has heated up; after entering June, the 618th National Day relay will debut, and the summer home appliances will enter the peak purchasing season, and the mid-year campaign is expected to continue.

title_en: Energy Department: New rooftop photovoltaic system will be launched in August and must withstand level 17 gusts
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Xie Yixuan, Taipei, 10th) The policy of compulsory rooftop photovoltaics for large-scale new buildings will go into effect on August 1. The Energy Department stated that it has upgraded the standards for rooftop photovoltaic installations to withstand 17-level wind gusts. Photovoltaic installations must also be included in construction planning, and inspections are required every two years to enhance the resilience and safety of electricity.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zeng Renkai, Taipei, 10th) Selling pressure emerged on technology stocks. The Taiwan Stock Market Index closed at the lowest point of the day today. The transaction value was approximately NT$1.324093 billion; the three major legal entities collectively sold more than NT$117.364 billion.

title_en: Li Ying's profit/profit reached a record high of 37.37 million yuan in May. AI chips detonated the rigid demand of the circular economy.
summary_en: Liying (7820) announced on the 10th that its revenue in May was 37.377 million yuan, a monthly increase of 11.55% and an annual increase of 38.72%, setting a new single-month high. This was mainly due to the explosion in demand for AI chips, which continued to drive the utilization rate of the semiconductor industry. , due to the rigid demand to promote the circular economy of waste hydrofluoric acid and calcium fluoride sludge; the cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 168 million yuan, an annual increase of 56.09%, and the cumulative revenue in the first five months has reached 56.57% of last year’s annual revenue of 298 million yuan.

title_en: Xinqingan 2.0 interest subsidy 2 codes, plans to reduce the code in years and exit in the 7th year
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Lu Yanci, Taipei, 10th) The new Qing'an 2.0 will be released at the end of June. The outside world is concerned about whether public equity banks will continue interest subsidies and the five-year grace period. The bank director revealed today that the interest subsidy may be phased out year by year. In the first three years, the government and public banks will maintain a total subsidy of 2 digits, and then reduce it by half a digit each year in four years. In other words, the interest subsidy will be phased out in the seventh year, but a decision is still pending.

title: 圓裕5月營收1.8億元 記憶體缺貨干擾出貨
summary: 軟板廠圓裕企業（6835）今日公告5月份合併營收1.8億元，累計1-5月營收9.79億元，分別較去年同期減少19.29％與7.29％。受到車用電子缺料、筆電記憶體缺貨影響，5月四大應用產品出貨均有減少，影響營收表現。圓裕表示，記憶體缺貨恐將持續一段時間，公司將持續開發新客戶，爭取多元化、量產規模產品訂單，配合泰國廠後段SMT製程進入量產，達到規模經濟。

title_en: Yuanyu's revenue in May was 180 million yuan, memory shortage disrupted shipments
summary_en: Flexible board factory Yuanyu Enterprise (6835) announced today that its consolidated revenue in May was 180 million yuan, and its cumulative revenue from January to May was 979 million yuan, a decrease of 19.29% and 7.29% respectively compared with the same period last year. Affected by the shortage of materials for automotive electronics and laptop memory, the shipments of the four major application products decreased in May, affecting revenue performance. Yuan Yu said that memory shortages may continue for some time. The company will continue to develop new customers, strive for diversified and mass-production product orders, and cooperate with the Thai factory's back-end SMT process to enter mass production to achieve economies of scale.

title: 輝達被評為「未來最佳公司」 相關 ETF 帶頭衝
summary: 華爾街日報首度推出「未來最佳公司」排名，主要評估標普500成分股企業在關鍵指標上的表現，而輝達（NVIDIA）、Alphabet、微軟、Meta及思科依序為第一名到第五名，而勝出的原因在於這些公司的「創新能力」、「財務實力」及「AI準備度」，顯示全球科技龍頭在AI時代下持續掌握產業發展主導權。

NVIDIA, Alphabet, Microsoft, Meta and Cisco ranked first to fifth in order. The reason for winning is the "innovation ability", "financial strength" and "AI readiness" of these companies, which shows that global technology leaders continue to dominate industrial development in the AI ​​era.

title_en: Dazong’s revenue in May was 3.023 billion yuan, an annual increase of 812.5%
summary_en: System integration factory Dazong (3147) announced today (10th) that its revenue in May was 3.023 billion yuan, a monthly increase of 176.5% and an annual increase of 812.5%. The growth rate is very alarming. Market estimates indicate that such an astonishing growth in revenue was mainly due to the impact of large orders from customers. The company previously said that customers began to place orders in advance due to rising memory prices.

title: 八方雲集5月合併營收8億 年增13.34%
summary: 八方雲集（2753）公告2026年5月合併營收8.0億元，較2026年4月單月營收7.6億元月增加5.16%，較2025年5月同期營收的7.1億元成長13.34%，創歷年同期新高；累計2026年1至5月合併營收38.2億元，較2025年同期35.9億元成長6.56%，累計營收同樣寫下歷年同期新高紀錄。

title_en: Bafang Yunji’s consolidated revenue in May was 800 million, an annual increase of 13.34%
summary_en: Bafang Yunji (2753) announced consolidated revenue of RMB 800 million in May 2026, an increase of 5.16% from the single-month revenue of RMB 760 million in April 2026, and an increase from the revenue of RMB 710 million in the same period in May 2025. 13.34%, a new high for the same period in previous years; the cumulative consolidated revenue from January to May 2026 was 3.82 billion yuan, an increase of 6.56% from 3.59 billion yuan in the same period in 2025, and the cumulative revenue also set a new high record for the same period in previous years.

title: 大同5月營收年月雙減 電力設備遞延出貨所致
summary: 大同（2371）10日公告5月合併營收35.82億元，月減13.45%，年減14.30%。公司表示，主要由於部分電力新能源事業配合客戶現地安裝影響交期，且原計劃5月出貨的電力設備延至6月出貨所致；累計今年前5月合併營收192.09億元，年增1.02%。

title_en: Datong’s revenue in May dropped both year and month due to delayed shipment of power equipment
summary_en: Datong (2371) announced on the 10th that its consolidated revenue in May was 3.582 billion yuan, a monthly decrease of 13.45% and an annual decrease of 14.30%. The company stated that this was mainly due to the fact that some new power businesses had to cooperate with customers on-site installation, which affected the delivery date, and the power equipment originally planned to be shipped in May was postponed to June. The cumulative consolidated revenue in the first five months of this year was 19.209 billion yuan, an annual increase of 1.02%.

title_en: The third high-priced stock "Hongjin" has doubled 10 times; orders are fully loaded with badminton courts and production lines
summary_en: In recent years, the AI theme has driven up Taiwanese stocks, and semiconductor equipment manufacturer Hongjin (7769) has been the strongest. Since its listing on the Taiwan Stock Exchange more than a year ago, the stock price has soared more than 10 times. Despite the recent fluctuations in Taiwanese stocks, Hongjin has remained at around NT$7,000, making it the third most expensive stock in Taiwan. According to CTWANT's investigation, this "super dark horse" has been hiding in the alleys of Taichung Daya Industrial Zone. In recent years, with the explosion of orders, it has not only continued to purchase more factories and land to build its own factories, but also had to convert badminton courts and restaurants into production lines in order to cope with the full capacity demand. title: Uber One會員方案漲價　月訂閱120元調升至199元
summary: （中央社記者江明晏台北10日電）Uber今天宣布，UberOne會員方案更新，出國也能享會員福利，並同步調整方案價格，既有會員則自7月13日後，月訂閱費用將由新台幣120元調整為199元，年訂閱則由新台幣1200元調整為1990元，漲價幅度約65%；Uber強調，漲價是因應新增福利，與外送專法無關。
title_zh: Uber One會員方案漲價　月訂閱120元調升至199元
summary_zh: （中央社記者江明晏台北10日電）Uber今天宣布，UberOne會員方案更新，出國也能享會員福利，並同步調整方案價格，既有會員則自7月13日後，月訂閱費用將由新台幣120元調整為199元，年訂閱則由新台幣1200元調整為1990元，漲價幅度約65%；Uber強調，漲價是因應新增福利，與外送專法無關。
title_en: Uber One membership plan price increases, monthly subscription raised from 120 yuan to 199 yuan
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Jiang Mingyan, Taipei, 10th) Uber announced today that it has updated its UberOne membership plan. You can also enjoy membership benefits when traveling abroad. It will also adjust the plan price simultaneously. Existing members will subscribe monthly starting from July 13. The cost will be adjusted from NT$120 to NT$199, and the annual subscription will be adjusted from NT$1,200 to NT$1,990, a price increase of about 65%. Uber emphasized that the price increase is in response to new benefits and has nothing to do with the delivery law.

title: NCC：廣電媒體新聞涉AI生成內容　應清楚揭露全程標示
summary: （中央社記者趙敏雅台北10日電）國家通訊傳播委員會（NCC）今天通過「廣電媒體製播新聞應用AI指引」，提供廣電媒體製播新聞導入AI時，作為建立自律規範的參考基準。NCC強調，新聞內容若涉及AI生成內容，揭露標示應明顯可辨識，並全程清楚標示。
title_zh: NCC：廣電媒體新聞涉AI生成內容　應清楚揭露全程標示
summary_zh: （中央社記者趙敏雅台北10日電）國家通訊傳播委員會（NCC）今天通過「廣電媒體製播新聞應用AI指引」，提供廣電媒體製播新聞導入AI時，作為建立自律規範的參考基準。NCC強調，新聞內容若涉及AI生成內容，揭露標示應明顯可辨識，並全程清楚標示。
title_en: NCC: Radio and television media news involving AI-generated content should clearly disclose the entire process of labeling
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhao Minya, Taipei, 10th) The National Communications Commission (NCC) today passed the "Guidelines for the Application of AI in Broadcasting and Television Media Production and Broadcasting News", providing a reference benchmark for establishing self-regulatory norms when radio and television media introduce AI into news production and broadcasting. The NCC emphasizes that if the news content involves AI-generated content, the disclosure label should be clearly identifiable and clearly marked throughout.

title: 劍麟營收／5月4.02億元 年增2.04％
summary: 劍麟（2228）10日公布5月營收為4.02億元，年增2.04％。累計1至5月營收20.33億元。主要受惠旗下汽車事業部Tier 1安全零組件供應商客戶拉貨維持穩健，加上近期美國關稅調降，有助於創造北美客戶訂單轉單機會，帶動單月營運表現較去年同期回升。

title_en: Jianlin’s revenue/402 million yuan in May, an annual increase of 2.04%
summary_en: Jianlin (2228) announced on the 10th that its May revenue was 402 million yuan, an annual increase of 2.04%. Cumulative revenue from January to May was 2.033 billion yuan. Mainly benefiting from the steady demand for orders from Tier 1 safety component suppliers of its automotive division, and the recent reduction in U.S. tariffs, which helped create opportunities to transfer orders from North American customers, driving single-month operating performance to rebound compared with the same period last year.

title: 專家：中國挾持需求鏈實力　牽制澳洲礦物產業
summary: （中央社記者丘德真雪梨10日專電）澳洲戰略政策研究所（ASPI）國安研究計畫主任柯尼（John Coyne）表示，正當澳洲致力建構供應鏈安全以維護國家韌性的同時，中國正挾持其「需求鏈實力」（power of the demand chain）塑造對其有利的市場環境，進而牽制攸關澳洲經濟命脈的礦物產業。
title_zh: 專家：中國挾持需求鏈實力　牽制澳洲礦物產業
summary_zh: （中央社記者丘德真雪梨10日專電）澳洲戰略政策研究所（ASPI）國安研究計畫主任柯尼（John Coyne）表示，正當澳洲致力建構供應鏈安全以維護國家韌性的同時，中國正挾持其「需求鏈實力」（power of the demand chain）塑造對其有利的市場環境，進而牽制攸關澳洲經濟命脈的礦物產業。
title_en: Expert: China hijacks demand chain strength to contain Australia’s mineral industry
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Qiu Dezhen, Sydney, 10th) John Coyne, Director of the National Security Research Program of the Australian Strategic Policy Institute (ASPI), said that while Australia is committed to building supply chain security to maintain national resilience, China is using its "power of the demand chain" to shape a market environment that is favorable to it, thereby constraining the mineral industry that is the lifeline of Australia's economy.

title: 金管會研議調高注意股門檻　縮短處置股「關禁閉」時間
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北10日電）高價股聯發科日前交易情形觸及證交所異常定義遭到「關禁閉」處置，引發討論，根據金管會檢討報告指出，考量近年台灣資本市場規模持續成長，有關公告股票注意與處置標準，應配合市場結構變化做適度檢討，金管會將督導證交所及櫃買中心配合股價調升幅度，評估規劃合理的公布注意股票警示標準，同時，評估縮短處置期的可行性。

title_en: The Financial Supervisory Commission considers raising the threshold for attention stocks and shortening the "lockdown" time for disposal stocks
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 10th) The recent trading situation of high-priced stock MediaTek violated the stock exchange's definition of abnormality and was "closed", triggering discussion. According to the review report of the Financial Supervisory Commission, considering the continued growth of Taiwan's capital market in recent years, relevant announcements of stock precautions and disposal standards should be appropriately reviewed in line with changes in market structure. The Financial Supervisory Commission will supervise stock exchanges and over-the-counter buying centers to adjust to the extent of stock price increases, evaluate the planned and reasonable announcement of stock warning standards, and at the same time evaluate the feasibility of shortening the disposal period.

summary: 營建類股10日大漲4.45%、多檔漲停，主因央行總裁楊金龍確認「選擇性信用管制就到這裡」，市場解讀政策最壞情況已過，讓類股上演慶祝行情；信義房屋（9940）提醒，10日營建股大漲仍需觀察是否為一日行情，第2季央行理監事會議將是下一個關鍵。

title_en: The president of the central bank said, "Selective credit control ends here", inspiring a retaliatory rebound in construction stocks.
summary_en: Construction stocks surged 4.45% on the 10th, with multiple daily limits, mainly because the central bank president Yang Jinlong confirmed that "selective credit control is here." The market interpreted the worst-case scenario of the policy as having passed, allowing stocks to celebrate. Xinyi Housing (9940) reminded that it still needs to be observed whether the surge in construction stocks on the 10th is a one-day trend. The second quarter central bank supervisory board meeting will be the next key.

title_en: Baoya’s revenue/2.439 billion yuan in May, an annual increase of nearly 20%, a record high in a single month
summary_en: Baoya (5904) announced on the 10th that its revenue in May was 2.439 billion yuan, an annual increase of 19.24%, setting a record high in a single month; its cumulative revenue in the first five months was 11.781 billion yuan, an annual increase of 14.74%, simultaneously setting a new high record for the same period. Baoya mainly benefited from the rising demand for summer products and continued investment in store openings, driving revenue to maintain double-digit growth.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Pan Ziyu, Taipei, 10th) The National Archives will hold a two-day "International Symposium on Digital Governance and Smart Services for Archives Management" starting today, inviting experts from the United States and Canada to deliver special speeches to discuss archive applications in the AI ​​era. Ye Junxian, chairman of the National Development Council, said he hopes to draw a blueprint for future development through emerging technologies and make archives an intellectual asset within everyone’s reach.

summary: 台康生技（6589）10日公告5月營收1.16億元，年增56.35%、月增約42.08%；前五月累計營收5.07億元，年增43.25%。台康5月營收年、月雙增，對下半年營收亦表示樂觀。

title_en: Taikang Biotechnology’s revenue/116 million yuan in May, double year-on-year and monthly growth, strong revenue momentum in the second half of the year
summary_en: Taikang Biotechnology (6589) announced on the 10th that its revenue in May was 116 million yuan, an annual increase of 56.35%, and a monthly increase of approximately 42.08%; the cumulative revenue in the first five months was 507 million yuan, an annual increase of 43.25%. Taikang's revenue in May increased both year-on-year and monthly, and it also expressed optimism about its revenue in the second half of the year.

title: 棄息？台積電除息前收2,255元下跌50元 短短5天下跌7%
summary: 台股10日以43,225.54點收盤，下跌1,478.9點，權王台積電（2330）除息前面臨棄息賣壓，股價收在2,255元，下跌50元，跌幅2.17%；統計股價在衝上收盤天價的2,425元之後走跌，短短5個交易日跌掉170元，跌幅7.01%，月線失守。
title_zh: 棄息？台積電除息前收2,255元下跌50元 短短5天下跌7%

title_en: Abandon interest? TSMC closed at NT$2,255 before ex-dividend, down NT$50, down 7% in just 5 days
summary_en: The Taiwan stock market closed at 43,225.54 points on the 10th, down 1,478.9 points. The powerful TSMC (2330) faced selling pressure before ex-dividend. The stock price closed at 2,255 yuan, down 50 yuan, or 2.17%. According to statistics, the stock price fell after reaching the sky-high closing price of 2,425 yuan. In just 5 trading days, it fell 170 yuan, a decrease of 7.01%, and the monthly line fell.

title: 上奇營收／5月3.42億元、年減6％ 企業用戶受供應商交貨遞延影響
summary: 資訊服務廠上奇科技（6123）10日公告2026年5月自結合併營收為3.42億元，較去年同期減少6％。各業務表現方面，上奇指出，雲端服務維持強勁成長動能，數位印刷服務表現穩健；企業用戶服務則因部分專案受供應商交貨時程延遲影響，營收較去年同期略為減少。整體營收結構方面，企業服務占49％、雲端服務占42％、數位印刷服務占％。
title_zh: 上奇營收／5月3.42億元、年減6％ 企業用戶受供應商交貨遞延影響

title_en: Shangqi’s revenue/May was 342 million yuan, a year-on-year decrease of 6%. Enterprise users were affected by supplier delivery delays.
summary_en: Information services factory Shangqi Technology (6123) announced on the 10th that its consolidated revenue in May 2026 was 342 million yuan, a decrease of 6% from the same period last year. In terms of business performance, Shangqi pointed out that cloud services maintained strong growth momentum and digital printing services performed steadily; enterprise user services saw revenue slightly decrease compared to the same period last year as some projects were affected by supplier delivery delays. In terms of the overall revenue structure, enterprise services account for 49%, cloud services account for 42%, and digital printing services account for %.

title_en: Tigerair Taiwan’s revenue/May was 1.52 billion yuan, an annual increase of approximately 22%, setting a new high for the same period

title: 三大法人倒貨1,174億元！台股崩1,479點失月線 台積電營收創高能撐除息？
summary: 台股10日上演大跳水行情，早盤一度在被動元件、光學族群撐盤下將跌點收斂至30點內，但午盤後權值股賣壓全面出籠，台積電（2330）、聯發科（2454）、鴻海（2317）等電子權值股領跌，被動元件、記憶體及ABF載板族群同步走弱，拖累指數終場重挫1,478.9點、收43,225.54點，不僅跌破月線，也創下近期最大單日跌點之一，成交值達1.3兆元。三大法人進入第五日賣超，繼續調節1,173.64億元。

title_en: The three major legal persons dumped 117.4 billion yuan! Taiwan stock market crashed 1,479 points and lost its monthly line. Can TSMC's high revenue support ex-dividend?
summary_en: The Taiwan stock market staged a sharp plunge on the 10th. In early trading, the decline was narrowed to within 30 points under the support of passive components and optical groups. However, after midday, the selling pressure on weighted stocks was fully released, with TSMC (2330), MediaTek (2454), Hon Hai (2317) and other electronics companies Equity stocks led the decline, and the passive component, memory and ABF carrier board groups simultaneously weakened, dragging the index down 1,478.9 points to close at 43,225.54 points. Not only did it fall below the monthly line, but it also set one of the largest single-day drops in recent times, with a transaction value of 1.3 trillion yuan. The three major legal entities entered the fifth day of overselling and continued to adjust to 117.364 billion yuan.

title: 台股大跌怎麼辦？凱基證券：下半年投資首選「LEAD」策略
summary: 面對地緣政治升溫與通膨壓力未解，全球市場進入高檔震盪階段。凱基證券10日發布2026下半年投資展望，由凱基投顧董事長朱晏民、凱基證券財畠管理處主管阮建銘與凱基香港國際財富管理首席投資總監梁啟棠解析全球經濟、股市趨勢與資產配置策略，並提出「LEAD」投資主軸，協助投資人在震盪中穩健布局。

title_en: What to do if Taiwan stock market plummets? KGI Securities: The “LEAD” strategy is the preferred investment strategy in the second half of the year
summary_en: Faced with rising geopolitical tensions and unresolved inflationary pressures, the global market has entered a stage of high-level volatility. KGI Securities released its investment outlook for the second half of 2026 on the 10th. KGI Chairman Zhu Yanmin, KGI Head of Wealth Management Department Ruan Jianming, and KGI Hong Kong International Wealth Management Chief Investment Officer Liang Qitang analyzed the global economy, stock market trends and asset allocation strategies, and proposed the "LEAD" investment main axis to help investors maintain a steady layout amid shocks.

title_en: Taiwan stocks trembled by 1,000 points for three days in a row! Legal Person: Seize the Taiwan Stock ETF Pullback Opportunity
summary_en: The Taiwan stock market closed down by a thousand points on the 10th, with prices rising and falling by a thousand points for three consecutive days. How should investors respond? The legal person suggests that investors at this stage may invest in Taiwan stock ETFs that can respond to the market’s active and flexible stock selection strategies, or high-interest ETFs with high interest income protection.

title_en: StarLux Airlines revenue/May 4.826 billion, an annual increase of 41.19%, a total of 23.2 billion yuan, an annual increase of 27.77%
summary_en: StarLux Airlines (2646)’s total revenue in May 2026 was 4.826 billion yuan, with a monthly growth rate of 3.12% and an annual growth rate of 41.19%. The cumulative total revenue from January to May reached 23.266 billion yuan, an increase of 27.77% compared with the same period last year. In terms of passenger transport, passenger transport revenue in May was 3.632 billion yuan, an annual increase of 37%.

title_en: Jiexun's revenue returned to positive growth in May; Dallas bonded warehouse will increase performance in the second half of the year
summary_en: Jiexun (2643)'s revenue in May this year was 649 million yuan, a monthly increase of 6.43% and an annual increase of 6.72%. The cumulative revenue in the first five months of this year was 2.715 billion yuan, an annual decrease of 17.54%. Sun Gangyin, the company's general manager, pointed out that revenue in the first five months of last year was as high as 3.282 billion yuan, an annual increase of 84.32%. This is because the company has done a lot of charter business. This year, it will no longer pursue revenue and stop charter business. It is committed to optimizing the profit structure and is optimistic about sea and air freight in the third quarter. "Full text..."

title_en: Innolux’s revenue/20.6 billion yuan in May, a monthly decrease of 2.78% and an annual increase of 10.28%
summary_en: Innolux (3481) announced on the 10th that its consolidated revenue in May this year was 20.648 billion yuan, a monthly decrease of 2.78% and an annual increase of 10.28%. The cumulative consolidated revenue in the first five months of this year was 108.529 billion yuan, an annual increase of 15.88%. The stock price fell by 4.8 yuan on the 10th, with a trading volume of more than 125,500 contracts, closing at 44.3 yuan.

title: 台股休息一天又重摔 史上第六大跌點 分析師：一特徵符合技術回檔
summary: 台北股市再度出現殺，指數開低走低，終場加權股價指數以4萬3225點作收，大跌1478點，創下史上第6大收盤跌點，跌幅達3.31％，成交量1兆3240億元。專家分析，此波下跌主要反映漲多後的技術性修正，AI與高頻寬記憶體HBM需求並未出現改變，整體仍屬「短空長多」格局。

title_en: Taiwan stocks fell again after a day off, the sixth-largest drop in history. Analyst: One characteristic is consistent with technical retracement
summary_en: The Taipei stock market experienced another sell-off, with the index opening lower and closing at 43,225 points, a sharp drop of 1,478 points, setting the sixth-largest closing point in history, with a drop of 3.31%, and a trading volume of NT$1.324 billion. Experts analyze that this wave of decline mainly reflects the technical correction after the bullish increase. The demand for AI and high-bandwidth memory HBM has not changed, and the overall situation is still a "short-short, long-long" pattern.

title: 公會：5月機械出口值創新高　電子設備寫新猷助攻
summary: （中央社記者鍾榮峰台北10日電）台灣機械工業同業公會今天下午公布5月機械出口值35.01億美元，創歷史單月新高，連續16個月正成長，其中電子設備5月單月出口7.19億美元，也創單月新高；工具機出口1.94億美元，出口金額與主要出口市場逐漸轉正，機械公會預期工具機下半年市況優於上半年。

title_en: Guild: Machinery export value hit a new high in May, electronic equipment hit new heights
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhong Rongfeng, Taipei, 10th) The Taiwan Machinery Industry Association announced this afternoon that the value of machinery exports in May was US$3.501 billion, a record monthly high and growing for 16 consecutive months. Among them, the export of electronic equipment in May was US$719 million, also a new monthly high; the export of machine tools was US$194 million. The export value and major export markets have gradually turned positive. The Machinery Association expects that the market situation of machine tools in the second half of the year will be better than that of the first half.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Lu Yanci, Taipei, 10th) Taiwan Financial Holdings’ profits are stable, but its subsidiary Bank of Taiwan Life Insurance Co. often suffers losses, which has attracted the attention of legislators. Taiwan Financial Holdings Chairman Ling Chung-yuan said today that Bank of Taiwan Life has endured historical burdens and violent market fluctuations in recent years, and hopes to promote product optimization, improve financial investment performance, internal system improvements, and risk control.

title_en: Taiwan stocks plunged 1,478 points, closing at a low of 43,225 points and falling below the monthly line
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporters Zeng Renkai and He Xiuling, Taipei, 10th) Selling pressure emerged on technology stocks. Taiwan stocks were under pressure today and sold sharply after midday. The concentrated market index closed at the lowest point of the day, down 1,478.90 points, closing at 43,225.54 points, falling below the monthly line of about 43,349 points, the sixth largest closing point in history. Yesterday, it rebounded by 1,201 points, and it was all forfeited today. The transaction value was approximately NT$1.324 billion.

title_en: The sidewalk on Zhengzhou Road in North City collapsed and a transformer box collapsed. Taipower: No power outage was caused.
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Xie Yixuan, Taipei, 10th) A sidewalk on Zhengzhou Road in Taipei City collapsed this morning, and the transformer box above collapsed. Taipower stated that the tilt of the transformer box did not cause power outages for users. Due to severe soil loss under the road, potholes were formed, which caused the transformer to collapse due to insufficient foundation support. It has mobilized manpower for emergency repairs.

title: 創控營收／5月4,093萬元創同期新高、年增51.32% AMC 剛性需求強
summary: 半導體先進製程AMC奈米監測設備大廠創控科技（6909）於10日公告5月營收4,093萬元，較去年同期成長51.32％，並創下歷年同期新高；累計1-5月營收1.79億元，接近去年同期的歷年新高。公司持續多元開拓產品應用場域與客戶，整體營運穩定擴張，在維持逐季推升的正常淡旺季節奏下，全年營運成長優於產業整體水準之上可期。

title_en: Chuangkong’s revenue/May 40.93 million hit a new high for the same period, an annual increase of 51.32% AMC has strong rigid demand
summary_en: Chuangkong Technology (6909), a major manufacturer of advanced semiconductor process AMC nano-monitoring equipment, announced on the 10th that its revenue in May was 40.93 million yuan, an increase of 51.32% over the same period last year, and a record high for the same period last year. The cumulative revenue from January to May was 179 million yuan, close to the record high for the same period last year. The company continues to diversify its product application fields and customers, and its overall operations are expanding steadily. While maintaining the normal rhythm of off-peak and peak seasons that increases quarter by quarter, it is expected that the annual operating growth will be better than the overall industry level.

summary: （中央社記者趙敏雅台北10日電）台灣第一個自製衛星星系「福衛八號」首顆齊柏林衛星去年11月升空入軌，今年1月展開正式取像任務。國家太空中心今天公開15張拍攝台灣的影像，台北橋與淡江大橋、桃園航空城、清水斷崖及九棚國家發射場域基地等入鏡，讓民眾一起看見台灣。

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhao Minya, Taipei, 10th) The first Zeppelin satellite of Taiwan's first self-made satellite galaxy "Formosat 8" was launched into orbit in November last year and launched its official imaging mission in January this year. The National Space Center released 15 images of Taiwan today, including the Taipei Bridge and Tamjiang Bridge, Taoyuan Aviation City, Qingshui Cliff, and the Jiupeng National Launch Site Base, allowing the public to see Taiwan together.

title: 台股收盤／大跌1478點收43225點 台積電收2255元跌2.16%
summary: 台股10日開高走低，盤中賣壓持續加重，加權指數終場收在43,225.54點，下跌1,478.9點，跌幅3.3%，成交量約1.32兆元。台股10日開盤為44,581.45點，盤中最高44,676.49點，最低下探43,225.54點。盤面跌多漲少，上漲265家、下跌843家；漲停14家、跌停17家。權值股方面，台積電（2330）收2,255元，下跌50元，跌幅2.16%，成交量42,395張；盤中最高2,300元、最低2,255元。盤面族群方面，半導體類股下跌3.17%，電子組件下跌6.25%，電腦週邊下跌3.73%，其他電子下跌4.81%，網通下跌2.07%，金融類股下跌2.04%。個股表現方面，台達電（2308）下跌8.9%，聯發科（2454）下跌7.15%，鴻海（2317）下跌5.22%，日月光投控（3711）下跌5.27%；廣達（2382）逆勢上漲1.46%。（此文章為AI人機協作，正確數據以主管機關為準。）

title_en: Taiwan stocks closed/slumped 1,478 points to close at 43,225 points, TSMC closed at 2,255 yuan, down 2.16%
summary_en: Taiwan stocks opened higher and lower on the 10th, with intraday selling pressure continuing to intensify. The weighted index closed at 43,225.54 points, down 1,478.9 points, or 3.3%, with a trading volume of approximately 1.32 trillion yuan. Taiwan stocks opened at 44,581.45 points on the 10th, with an intraday high of 44,676.49 points and a low of 43,225.54 points. The market fell more than rose, with 265 companies rising and 843 companies falling; 14 companies reached the daily limit and 17 companies fell below the limit. In terms of weight stocks, TSMC (2330) closed at 2,255 yuan, down 50 yuan, or 2.16%, with a trading volume of 42,395 yuan; the intraday high was 2,300 yuan and the lowest was 2,255 yuan. In terms of market groups, semiconductor stocks fell by 3.17%, electronic components fell by 6.25%, computer peripherals fell by 3.73%, other electronics fell by 4.81%, Netcom fell by 2.07%, and financial stocks fell by 2.04%. In terms of individual stock performance, Delta Electronics (2308) fell 8.9%, MediaTek (2454) fell 7.15%, Hon Hai (2317) fell 5.22%, ASE Investment Holdings (3711) fell 5.27%; Quanta (2382) bucked the trend and rose 1.46%. (This article is about AI human-machine collaboration. The correct data is subject to the competent authority.)

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zeng Renkai, Taipei, 10th) Bizlian-KY, a major cable manufacturer, suspended trading today. Immediately after the Taiwan stock market closed in the afternoon, it held a major press conference to announce that the board of directors had resolved to sign a share sale and purchase agreement with a fund investment company managed by Blackstone and its subsidiaries to acquire Interplex Datacom, the data communications business of Interplex Group, in cash.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhong Rongfeng, Taichung, 10th) Machine tool manufacturer Chengtai Group and smart manufacturing solution manufacturer New Generation Technology signed a strategic cooperation memorandum in Taichung today. The two parties will deepen cooperation in machine tools, automation, robots and smart manufacturing technologies, focus on the application of artificial intelligence AI, robots and electric vehicles, and expand into the markets of mainland China, Taiwan, ASEAN and India.

summary: 台積電（2330）受惠AI晶片訂單持續湧進及先進製程售價穩定上揚， 5月合併營收繳出4169.75億元佳績，續創單月新高，月增1.5%，年增30.1%；累計今年前五月合併營收1 兆 9618.04億元，年增30.0%。

title_en: TSMC’s revenue in May hit a new monthly high of 416.975 billion yuan, holding steady at 400 billion yuan for three consecutive months.
summary_en: TSMC (2330) benefited from the continued influx of AI chip orders and the steady rise in prices of advanced processes. In May, consolidated revenue was 416.975 billion yuan, a new monthly high, with a monthly increase of 1.5% and an annual increase of 30.1%. The cumulative consolidated revenue in the first five months of this year was 1.961804 billion yuan, an annual increase of 30.0%.

title_en: Selling pressure on technology stocks emerges, Taiwan stock market drops 1,478 points, sixth largest in history
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zeng Renkai, Taipei, 10th) Selling pressure emerged on technology stocks, and Taiwan stocks were under pressure today. They sold sharply after midday. The weighted index closed at the lowest point of the day, down 1,478.90 points, to close at 43,225.54 points, falling below the monthly line of about 43,349 points, the sixth largest closing point in history. The 1,201 points that the market rebounded yesterday were all forfeited today. The transaction value was approximately NT$1.324 billion.

title: 台股崩1,400點誰還撐住？馬斯克揭太空AI1衛星藍圖 茂迪亮燈、元晶爆量
summary: 台股10日午盤遭遇空頭血洗，大盤崩跌逾1,400點，44,000點大關失守，連早盤強勢的被動元件也受挫。但太陽能族群逆勢吸引買盤進駐。主因於SpaceX執行長馬斯克首度公開「AI1」太空AI衛星規畫，目標2027年大舉建置太空AI運算平台，並導入大規模太陽能發電，引爆市場對太空能源需求的想像空間，帶動茂迪（6244）、元晶（6443）、聯合再生（3576）等個股逆勢走強。

title_en: Who can hold on when the Taiwan stock market collapses by 1,400 points? Musk unveils blueprint for space AI1 satellite, Maodi lights up, Yuanjing explodes
summary_en: Taiwan stocks suffered a bloodbath from short sellers in midday trading on the 10th. The market collapsed by more than 1,400 points and fell below the 44,000-point mark. Even the strong passive components in early trading suffered setbacks. However, the solar energy group bucked the trend and attracted buyers. The main reason is that SpaceX CEO Musk disclosed the "AI1" space AI satellite planning for the first time, aiming to build a large-scale space AI computing platform in 2027 and introduce large-scale solar power generation, which detonated the market's imagination of space energy demand, driving Motech (6244), Yuanjing (6443), United Regeneration (3576) and other stocks to buck the trend and strengthen.

summary: （中央社記者潘智義台北10日電）史上首次由美國、加拿大與墨西哥3國聯合舉辦的世界盃足球賽即將登場，參賽隊伍由32隊增至48隊，利多題材帶動製鞋股漲勢，豐泰今天盤中高點93.5元，勁揚逾8%，6月以來大漲33%；來億-KY最高達285.5元，漲逾4%，6月以來漲幅高達70%。

title_en: Three countries will host the FIFA World Cup, and shoemaking stocks will surge in June
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Pan Zhiyi, Taipei, 10th) The first World Cup football tournament in history, jointly organized by the United States, Canada and Mexico, is about to take place. The number of participating teams has increased from 32 to 48. The bullish theme has driven the rise of shoemaking stocks. Fengtai’s intraday high today was 93.5 yuan, soaring more than 8%, up 33% since June; Laiyi-KY reached a maximum of 285.5 yuan, up more than 4%, and an increase of 70% since June.

title: 台股重挫凶手是這些 但分析師說拉回是買點、這些族群最看好
summary: 台股連日來出現暴跌暴漲走勢，大盤指數震盪激烈，10日開低走低午盤後賣壓加重，指數進一步下殺，盤中重挫逾千點；證券分析師表示，除了美軍再度空襲伊朗，市場擔憂中東衝突升溫，衝擊股市之外，後續將公布CPI、PPI、及SpaceX將掛牌上市也是影響市場投資氣氛的重要關鍵；但分析師強調，拉回是買點，預估6月將是類股輪動的表現，不看指數看個股。

title_en: These are the culprits of Taiwan's stock market plunge. But analysts say pullbacks are buying points, and these groups are the most optimistic.
summary_en: Taiwan stocks have experienced sharp declines and surges in recent days, with the market index fluctuating fiercely. After opening lower on the 10th, selling pressure intensified after midday, and the index fell further, falling more than 1,000 points during the session; securities analysts said that in addition to the U.S. military air strikes on Iran again, the market is worried about the escalation of conflicts in the Middle East. , in addition to impacting the stock market, the subsequent announcement of CPI, PPI, and the listing of SpaceX are also important factors affecting the market investment sentiment; however, analysts emphasized that pulling back is a buying point, and it is expected that June will be a rotation of stocks, and individual stocks will not look at the index.

title: 台韓股市上下洗刷 韓股熔斷成常態 法人：看好台韓企業獲利睥睨全球
summary: 近期台韓股市受美股科技股回檔影響，震盪加劇，其中韓股「熔斷」更成常態。但法人表示，從基本面觀察，台韓企業獲利動能持續向上，長線展望依然亮眼，短期波動多為市場情緒反應。在AI與半導體產業驅動下，台韓企業獲利成長具備高度確定性，長期競爭力可望睥睨全球。

title_en: Stock markets in Taiwan and South Korea are going up and down, and meltdowns in South Korean stocks have become the norm. Legal person: Optimistic about the profits of Taiwan and South Korea companies and looking at the world
summary_en: Recently, the Taiwan and South Korea stock markets have been affected by the pullback of US technology stocks, and the volatility has intensified. Among them, the "circuit breaker" of Korean stocks has become the norm. However, the legal person said that from a fundamental perspective, the profit momentum of Taiwan and South Korea companies continues to rise, the long-term outlook is still bright, and short-term fluctuations are mostly reactions to market sentiment. Driven by the AI ​​and semiconductor industries, the profit growth of Taiwan and South Korea companies is highly certain, and their long-term competitiveness is expected to surpass the world.

title: 輝能科技與 OPmobility 簽署 MOU 啟動固態電池模組合作評估
summary: 固態電池廠輝能科技於法國時間6月9日宣布，已與永續移動領域的全球領導者，以及全球移動產業參與者的技術合作夥伴OPmobility 共同簽署合作備忘錄。雙方將就「輝能固態電池芯」導入「電動車用電池模組及／或電池包」的整合與共同開發展開合作討論，期以更高性能與更具競爭力的系統化解決方案，回應全球電動車市場的快速成長需求。

title_en: Huineng Technology and OPmobility signed MOU to start cooperation evaluation of solid-state battery modules
summary_en: Solid-state battery manufacturer Huineng Technology announced on June 9, French time, that it has signed a memorandum of cooperation with OPmobility, a global leader in the field of sustainable mobility and a technology partner for global mobile industry participants. The two parties will cooperate and discuss the integration and joint development of "Huineng solid-state battery cells" into "electric vehicle battery modules and/or battery packs", hoping to respond to the rapid growth of the global electric vehicle market with higher-performance and more competitive system solutions.

title: 半導體廢水再生新契機　台大提出電驅動分離濃縮技術
summary: （中央社記者趙敏雅台北10日電）台灣半導體產業高度依賴水資源，製程產生的含氟廢水因處理與再利用困難，長期被視為高成本、高負荷的棘手問題。台灣大學團隊提出電驅動分離濃縮技術，使難以利用的低濃度含氟廢水轉為可再利用的循環資源，也有助降低半導體廢水再生處理成本。

title_en: New opportunities for semiconductor wastewater regeneration: National Taiwan University proposes electric-driven separation and concentration technology
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhao Minya, Taipei, 10th) Taiwan’s semiconductor industry is highly dependent on water resources. The fluoride-containing wastewater generated by the manufacturing process has long been regarded as a high-cost and high-load thorny problem due to the difficulty of treatment and reuse. The National Taiwan University team proposed electric-driven separation and concentration technology to convert low-concentration fluorine-containing wastewater that is difficult to use into a reusable recycling resource. It also helps reduce the cost of semiconductor wastewater regeneration and treatment.

title: 逾100億美元關稅待退　美法官敦促川普政府加速處理
summary: （中央社紐約9日綜合外電報導）美國國際貿易法庭（Court of International Trade）法官今天敦促川普政府，加快退還逾100億美元已徵收但後來遭最高法院裁定違法的關稅款項，但未進一步發布強制執行的新命令。

title_en: More than $10 billion in tariffs awaiting rollback, U.S. judge urges Trump administration to speed up processing
summary_en: (Central News Agency, New York, Comprehensive Foreign News Report on the 9th) A judge of the U.S. Court of International Trade (Court of International Trade) today urged the Trump administration to speed up the refund of more than $10 billion in tariffs that were imposed but were later ruled illegal by the Supreme Court, but did not issue any further new orders for enforcement.

title: 航運業者：5月貨櫃市況增溫　燃油附加費擬逐月調
summary: （中央社記者江明晏台北10日電）貨攬業者台驊表示，5月貨櫃航運市場較第1季明顯改善，遠洋航線需求回溫、旺季前備貨需求增加，6月歐美線運價上揚。中菲行指出，部分企業持續提前安排出貨，帶動海運運價，主要船公司已將燃油附加費調整頻率，由每季1次提高至每月1次。

title_en: Shipping Industry: Container market conditions will heat up in May and fuel surcharges will be adjusted monthly
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Jiang Mingyan, Taipei, 10th) Cargo agent Taihua said that the container shipping market improved significantly in May compared with the first quarter, with demand for ocean routes recovering, demand for stocking before the peak season increasing, and freight rates on European and American lines rising in June. China Philippines Bank pointed out that some companies continue to arrange shipments in advance, driving up ocean freight rates. Major shipping companies have increased the frequency of fuel surcharge adjustments from once per quarter to once per month.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Pan Ziyu, Taipei, 10th) The General Accounting Office announced that the Consumer Price Index (CPI) rose by more than 2% in May, triggering concerns about inflation and the need for a preventive interest rate hike. Yang Jinlong, president of the central bank, said that the war in the Middle East lasted longer than expected, and the central bank may revise the CPI forecast upward as a result. However, so far, Taiwan has no imported inflation.

title_en: Is money entering Taiwan's stock market "four loans under one roof" a systemic risk? Yang Jinlong: Still far away
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Pan Ziyu, Taipei, 10th) Taiwan stock investment boom, the market has recently discussed the phenomenon of "four loans under one roof", and legislators have questioned whether there may be systemic risks. In this regard, Yang Jinlong, president of the Central Bank, said today that the speed of gold flow to the stock market is indeed faster than before, and the Financial Supervisory Commission continues to pay close attention, but he personally believes that the current situation is "still far from systemic risk."

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zhang Jianzhong, Taipei, 10th) When the huge wave of AI accelerates the iteration of advanced semiconductor manufacturing processes, it is an indisputable fact that international materials giants will face the risk of falling behind if they do not immediately "jointly develop" with TSMC. JSR, a major Japanese material manufacturer that has always been conservative, has aggressively expanded its investment in Taiwan. Behind it is not only the magnetic effect of TSMC's US$56 billion in capital expenditures per year, but also the irreversible localization strategy of the US-Japan-Taiwan Iron Triangle ecosystem.

summary: 萬海航運(2609)於今(9)日公告5月合併營收為新台幣138.04億元，月增6.75 %，年增22.90 %；累計全年營收603.75億元，年增1.03%。隨著全球運力持續吃緊，遠洋航線運價此波漲勢最為凌厲，而在遠洋外溢效應帶動下，萬海表示市場預期近洋航線運價也將持續跟進漲勢，此波上升趨勢可望一路延續至年底的傳統旺季。 《詳全文...》

title_en: Wanhai’s revenue in May increased by 22.90% year-on-year and is optimistic that the upward trend will continue until the end of the year
summary_en: Wan Hai Shipping (2609) announced today (9) that its consolidated revenue in May was NT$13.804 billion, a monthly increase of NT$13.804 billion. %, an annual increase of 22.90%; the cumulative annual revenue was 60.375 billion yuan, an annual increase of 1.03%. As global shipping capacity continues to be tight, the freight rates on ocean routes have seen the sharpest increase this time. Driven by the spillover effect of ocean routes, Wan Hai said the market expects that freight rates on near-ocean routes will also continue to follow the rising trend. This upward trend is expected to continue into the traditional peak season at the end of the year. "Full text..."

title: 陽明5月營收年增22.22%　主因歐美進口商提前拉貨

title_en: Yang Ming’s May revenue increased by 22.22% year-on-year, mainly due to European and American importers pulling goods in advance
summary_en: Yang Ming Shipping (2609)'s monthly revenue in May was NT$15.104 billion, an increase of NT$2.746 billion from April's revenue, an increase of 22.22%. The company pointed out that in response to rising cost pressures and potential supply chain disruption risks, European and American importers generally adopted a strategy of pulling goods in advance, driving up booking demand, causing the supply of space to tighten, and thus supporting the recent trend of stronger freight rates. "Full text..."

title_en: The current oil price and carbon tax give Huiyang energy-saving ships a competitive advantage. The sales of old ships are estimated to be slightly lower than last year.
summary_en: Huiyang-KY (2637) held a press conference on the afternoon of the 9th. The company's chief financial officer Xue Yijun pointed out that the EU has begun to collect 100% carbon tax this year, which translates into about 25% of the oil price and about 8% of the EU ETS, which is equivalent to an increase of about 35% in fuel costs. About 60% of Huiyang's 130 ships are energy-saving ships, which is beneficial to the company's competitiveness and can be considered a positive impact. "Full text..."

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Zeng Renkai and He Xiuling, Taipei, 9th) The high-end fluctuations in Taiwan's stock market have intensified. The Taiwan Stock Exchange announced today evening that Shin Kong Securities reported a huge breach of contract at connection cable factory Jiabiqi, with an amount of NT$149.5 million. The OTC Buying Center also announced that memory control chip factory Phison defaulted on delivery, with a total default amount of NT$22.842 million. The total amount of defaulted delivery in the two reported cases reached approximately NT$172.34 million.

summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 9th) SpaceX is about to be listed through an initial public offering (IPO). Fubon Financial today announced on behalf of Fubon Life that it plans to participate in the initial public offering of common shares of Space Exploration Technologies Corp. (SpaceX) listed on the Nasdaq (Nasdaq) in the United States, with a maximum subscription amount of US$600 million.

title: 資本市場熱　國泰金：增資國泰證券50億支持業務成長
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北9日電）國泰金今天代子公司國泰證券公告董事會辦理現金增資案，由母公司國泰金全額認購。國泰金表示，今年資本市場熱絡，國泰證券規模穩健成長，為支持業務發展，規劃增資國泰證券50億元，強化其資本結構。
title_zh: 資本市場熱　國泰金：增資國泰證券50億支持業務成長
summary_zh: （中央社記者蘇思云台北9日電）國泰金今天代子公司國泰證券公告董事會辦理現金增資案，由母公司國泰金全額認購。國泰金表示，今年資本市場熱絡，國泰證券規模穩健成長，為支持業務發展，規劃增資國泰證券50億元，強化其資本結構。
title_en: Capital market hot Cathay Gold: Increased capital of 5 billion from Cathay Securities to support business growth
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 9th) Cathay Financial today announced on behalf of its subsidiary Cathay Securities that the board of directors will handle a cash capital increase, which will be fully subscribed by the parent company Cathay Securities. Cathay Gold stated that the capital market is booming this year and Cathay Securities has grown steadily. In order to support business development, it plans to increase the capital of Cathay Securities by 5 billion yuan to strengthen its capital structure.

title: 今彩539第115140期開獎
summary: （中央社台北9日電）今彩539第115140期開獎，中獎號碼28、25、17、10、20。3星彩中獎號碼613，4星彩中獎號碼5602。

title_en: Jincai 539 No. 115140 lottery draw
summary_en: (Central News Agency, Taipei, 9th) The 115140th lottery draw of today’s lottery 539, the winning numbers are 28, 25, 17, 10, 20. The winning number for the 3-star lottery is 613, and the winning number for the 4-star lottery is 5602.

title: 金管會：核准4壽險發現金股利　金額達200.39億元
summary: （中央社記者蘇思云台北9日電）金管會今天表示，截至目前7家壽險申請發放股利，目前已核准4家壽險發放股利，核准金額達新台幣200.39億元。
title_zh: 金管會：核准4壽險發現金股利　金額達200.39億元
summary_zh: （中央社記者蘇思云台北9日電）金管會今天表示，截至目前7家壽險申請發放股利，目前已核准4家壽險發放股利，核准金額達新台幣200.39億元。
title_en: Financial Supervisory Commission: Approved 4 life insurance cash dividends amounting to 20.039 billion yuan
summary_en: (Central News Agency reporter Su Siyun, Taipei, 9th) The Financial Supervisory Commission said today that so far 7 life insurance companies have applied for dividends, and 4 life insurance companies have been approved to pay dividends, with the approved amount reaching NT$20.039 billion.

title: 阻貶印尼盾　印尼央行意外升息1碼
summary: （中央社雅加達9日綜合外電報導）印尼中央銀行今天出乎市場意料之外，宣布調高基準利率1碼，以拉抬印尼盾匯價，印尼股市聞訊反彈走高。

title_en: To prevent the depreciation of the Indonesian rupiah, the Indonesian central bank unexpectedly raised interest rates by 1 yard.
summary_en: (Central News Agency, Jakarta, comprehensive foreign news report on the 9th) The Central Bank of Indonesia surprised the market today and announced a 1-point increase in the benchmark interest rate to boost the exchange rate of the Indonesian rupiah. The Indonesian stock market rebounded after hearing the news.
